name: Eric Underwood, Chairman
subject: CALL TO ACTION: Inheritance Tax - LB468💰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🚨Testify Online or In-person🚨 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1d7832421a1/n41kepo7ku-12729342?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1e1e42542a&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | **Is Nebraska's Inheritance Tax Fair? LB468 Offers a Solution.**
**_INHERITANCE BILL LB468_
(Senator Clements’ Priority Bill)**

**Nebraska's inheritance tax system is outdated and unfair. It's the only tax in Nebraska based on your relationship to the deceased, not the value of the estate. This creates a system where distant relatives and non-family members face drastically higher tax rates, often forcing them to sell inherited property, like family farms, just to pay the tax.

Nebraska is also one of only a handful of states with an inheritance tax at all, putting us at a competitive disadvantage. **

**LB468 offers a common-sense reform.

Currently, taxes range from 1% for immediate family to 15% for non-relatives. LB468 would set a rate of 1% for everyone inheriting property in Nebraska, with a $100,000 exemption.**

[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cfd403bcb7&e=25844e23a8) **CALL TO ACTION ** **[Hearing on Wednesday, February 5, 2025](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=eace9ab7f9&e=25844e23a8) ** **Time 1:30pm ** **Room 1524 ** **• Testify in person ** **• Sign sheet at hearing door ** **• Submit online testimony by 8:00 am Wednesday, Feb. 5. **
* **Fairness:** The current system is based on who you know, not the value of what you inherit. LB468 makes the system fair for everyone.
* **Family Farms:** Imagine a farmer passing away, leaving their land to a niece or nephew. Under the current system, the tax burden could force them to sell the farm just to pay the inheritance tax. LB468 protects family farms and legacies.
* **Competitive Advantage:** Neighboring states have eliminated or reduced their inheritance taxes, making Nebraska less attractive for families and businesses. LB468 helps Nebraska compete.
* **Reliable Funding:** County "slush funds" based on inheritance tax revenue are unpredictable. LB468 encourages responsible county budget management.
* **Death Tax:** The inheritance tax is often called a "death tax," because it penalizes people during a difficult time. LB468 reduces this burden.

**Email Revenue Committee Senators:
• [Sen. R. Brad von Gillern, Chairperson](mailto:bvongillern@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Mike Jacobson, Vice Chairperson](mailto:mjacobson@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Eliot Bostar](mailto:ebostar@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. George Dungan](mailto:gdungan@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Teresa Ibach](mailto:tibach@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Kathleen Kauth](mailto:kkauth@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Dave Murman](mailto:dmurman@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Tony Sorrentino](mailto:tsorrentino@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)** **\--Chairman Eric Underwood
Republican Party of Nebraska**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Wobbly Institutions
body:
The most deadly air crash in a generation. Chinese AI coming out at a fraction of the cost. A wave of Executive orders. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=507f4a8725&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
|
---
| “There’s too much going on right now – it’s hard to keep track of.” This is what a friend of mine said to me this week. The most deadly air crash in a generation. Chinese AI coming out at a fraction of the cost. A wave of Executive orders. Federal funds cut off for a day and then restored. Cabinet Secretary nominees undergoing contentious Senate hearings. An offer to 2 million Federal employees to resign. ICE enforcement actions in different cities. There were also a couple of shootings that would have made headlines in other times that barely registered. One person called the new administration’s approach “Shock and awe.” Another called it, “Flood the zone with shit.” Also below the radar was the final forum of candidates to chair the DNC. The Party is casting about for leadership and a vision. The proceedings were interrupted by half-a-dozen protests by climate activists. Some are asking, “What do we do to resist the new administration?” The truth is the time for effective resistance was 13 months ago, when the Democrats were enabling Joe Biden’s disastrous re-election campaign. A competitive primary would have potentially changed the trajectory that led to Trump’s return. The Democrats failed their test and have rendered themselves moot for the next 2 years minimum, quite possibly a good deal longer. Now, the most important actors are not the minority party, but a handful of Republican Senators who have demonstrated independence and principle in different contexts: Lisa Murkowski, Susan Collins, Bill Cassidy, John Curtis, and, new to the picture, Mitch McConnell who is now in “I can do whatever I want at the age of 82” mode. Also, deficit-minded fiscal conservatives in the House will be key figures in the upcoming budget negotiations. Going against Trump will be a difficult task for those within the Republican Party though – it’s one reason why the country is crying out for an independent political movement to shore up those who want to make decisions free of party orthodoxy. You can see that in the fate of Dean Phillips, who challenged Joe Biden and was cast out of DC as a result. You can also see that among the Republican Senators who are clearly struggling with some of Trump’s Cabinet picks. The defunding of government programs by the OMB in the name of vetting ‘woke’ expenditures was particularly troubling, as it impacted everything from Medicaid to Meals on Wheels and cast hundreds of thousands of Americans into confusion and uncertainty, forcing a walk back just a day later. It evinced a real lack of understanding of the real-world impact of these programs and put ideology over any sort of sensible governance. Also not good – Trump blaming diversity initiatives for the tragic air collision in D.C. That won’t prevent future collisions in a stressed system. Institutions are wavering, as those being placed in charge of them don’t actually believe in them. Government led by those who don’t believe in government won’t lead to good places. We are in the era that I feared we would enter 8 years ago when I decided to enter public life: the time of institutional disintegration. There are many rational things to do in this time. Unplug. Take care of yourself and those around you. Build new things. Solve problems. Improve your environment. Most of the things in our lives are good or bad regardless of the political-industrial landscape. I thought that I could help us avoid Trump’s re-election in 2020. My biggest contribution in ’24 was backing up Dean Phillips in his challenge to Joe Biden and then urging Joe to step aside after his disastrous debate. Forward is working on things for ’25, ’26, and ’28. If you want to link up with people in your state, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=f5cba818f9&e=0f227c2ae3). I’m excited for some developments that I believe are around the corner. But for those who are saddened by some of the developments of this past week, you’ve got company. The honeymoon is already over.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=8aa19ed9f7&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=74dffbe7fc&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0d9b13c7f1) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0d9b13c7f1).
---

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I’m a dairy farmer, not a career politician.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250203-8748&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8748%2E614464%2Ebh0C8P)
Peter,
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**
I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.
**[This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. Can I count on you to split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us prepare for this special election and flip NY-21 blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250203-8748&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8748%2E614464%2Ebh0C8P)**
**[CHIP IN NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85307?refcode=em20250203-8748&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8748%2E614464%2Ebh0C8P)**
The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions. Now more than ever, we need a leader who understands the issues families face on a daily basis. In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there.
**[This special election is our first opportunity to fight back and flip a seat, so we need all hands on deck. clean_body: I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. Peter, I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer. I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today. The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions. Now more than ever, we need a leader who understands the issues families face on a daily basis. In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, Blake | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor). Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? USAID has played a vital role in monumental achievements, such as dismantling apartheid and supporting a democratic South Africa. This isn’t just about politics; it’s about protecting our institutions and our commitment to a just and equitable world. After everything Trump has done for our country, he’s been stabbed in the back.
Because the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at him.
They wanted you to turn on Trump after two impeachments.
They wanted you to abandon him when they issued his first indictment.

After only a _**MONTH**_ of being the _**47th PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES!**_
__**But we know your name isn’t on that list.**__

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziptpkeg0h301iiag9d3bk4udoklo1ts632s1tk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z46vp44tv9jabjsd8ks2tuvvip02sr8ptbk1ds1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjn5ifa7pighnlitc580v68batj3q51ei5p2r5j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqoqi1g9411sk63vp3tsmt23vl9glha0bje9mflo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za6uhbq06qsogk2fppq5l462r4t3l59unf063k78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4sdgmepb246h22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6b4bf7khamn5dk24duh7hs2o3nobbpmte2gspko_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhmepr0cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zimkcmg593b8ptkhv844t0of60n1bl1amr2voft8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c3hm6pr7c1hm49fg)

body:
The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. And meanwhile?

| |

| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zp5722nb42364me9dgvkabhj3g77v6c2tuudufc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhm1or4c9h2bs)

---
| | The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. And meanwhile? **You and your cash could be caught in the crossfire. ** But there’s a way to prepare. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it: “Terrifying.” And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0083d63u1sl37u6r0bfkt0idsgf45d1i6r8e5ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhm1or4c9h2bs) Here’s why: many might not realize how these decisions could ripple through their finances. The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Within the IRS code is an obscure provision... one that might not make sense unless you understood what it really means. But the important part? This IRS provision — [**a loophole, if you will**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zn3v9qui0q01odco8t1tjnjttmj7crlsv7cbqun0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhm1or4c9h2bs) — could help you protect your wealth from inflation and market uncertainty. It’s straightforward, and might be a way to help build financial confidence for years to come. [**⇒ So here’s how to get it**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2za61elbfj32dlu57cf28qdnucorl5a3q1460aiu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdhm1or4c9h2bs) Time may not be on your side. Secretary of State Marco Rubio sent a warning about the Panama Canal, saying the current status of the trade route is “unacceptable.” According to a summary of Rubio’s meeting with Panamanian president José Raúl Mulino released by the State Department, Rubio said there would have to be “immediate changes” to how the U.S. operates with [...]...Click to read more

---
Former President Biden signed with Creative Artists Agency (CAA) on Monday, giving a window into his post-presidency next moves. “President Biden is one of America’s most respected and influential voices in national and global affairs,” Richard Lovett, co-chair of CAA, said in a statement. “His lifelong commitment to public service is one of unity, optimism, [...]...

[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[French Gynecologist Suspended For Refusing To Treat Trans-Identifying Man](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A gynecologist in southern France has been suspended for a month after saying he couldn’t treat a trans-identifying male. Gynecologists treat conditions specific to women and girls, particularly those affecting female reproductive systems – something biological men don’t have. The patient in France still had intact male genitalia, which requires a doctor with a different [...]...Click to read more

name: Matt Dolan
subject: Sharing exciting news
body:
| | | | MATT DOLAN

February 4, 2025

Dear Friend, I am thrilled to share that I have been named the next CEO of Team NEO, the economic development organization serving the 14 counties of Northeast Ohio. This opportunity is a natural extension of my work in both the public and private sectors, allowing me to continue driving growth and opportunity for our state. I look forward to working alongside the outstanding team at Team NEO, as well as business leaders, public officials, local economic development organizations, and community partners. Together, we will serve as a unified, strategic voice for economic development across Northeast Ohio. For me, public service has never been about a title--it's about making a meaningful difference. As I step into this new role, my focus remains the same: to spur business creation and expansion, attract investment to Ohio, and enhance the quality of life for our citizens. Thank you for your support and friendship. I look forward to our continued relationship. Moving forward I can be reached [via email](mailto:matt@dolanmatt.com), I look forward to staying in touch. Best,
---
|
---
| Matt Dolan
---
|

Dear Peter, As the calendar turns and we welcome the fresh start of 2025, we want to take a moment to thank you for being an invaluable part of this journey. Whether you've been with us from the beginning or recently joined our community, your support, trust, and enthusiasm inspire us to keep focusing on God and engaging the church in the public square. Weren’t able to make AmFest 2024? Do not worry! We had a smashing lineup, and you can see a few clips below! _Pastor Lucas Miles, Allie Beth Stuckey, Pastor John Amanchukwu,_ and _more_ reminded us to keep the church rooted in biblical truth and that Jesus is coming back!

**Putting Faith Into Action**
---
**Monthly Challenge:** This month, let's focus on deepening our faith by memorizing and reflecting on a powerful Bible verse! **Verse of the Month: Revelation 2:2-6** _“I know your works, your labor, and your endurance, and that you cannot tolerate evil people. You have tested those who call themselves apostles and are not, and you have found them to be liars. I know that you have_ _persevered_ _and endured hardship for the sake of my name, and have not grown weary. But I have this against you: You have abandoned the love you had at first. Remember then how far you have fallen; repent, and do the works you did at first. Otherwise, I will come to you and remove your lampstand from its place, unless you repent. Yet you do have this: you hate the practices of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.”_ Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Challenge yourself to reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life.

Stand with us in prayer and consider in your area! By gathering with others to pray for our nation, we can create a powerful community of believers united in seeking God’s guidance and strength. If you feel led, we ask you to consider financially supporting our mission so we can continue to spread God’s Word! | | | | | | | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

| | The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. And meanwhile? **You and your cash could be caught in the crossfire. ** But there’s a way to prepare. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it: “Terrifying.” And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkT-P3CAQxT8N7rBgBmMoXNyJW-mKjS5ZRSktjMGL1l4sgxPl20e-XLRFmpvuvZ_maf78OPdnG-d4n77YxXcx537L_bb0k6PLnm8UZaGjH0oPDBrKgDLR82rsGuAqqMp3vEUlpRSaV9fO8WGEEXVArUNoLEfWCmiUCEFqh6qK3ZHDgAmmhWK61kFohdZ664VVyhHB9nW0xdfxnuPos0tpXdMcS3S5TttUzd21lDUTfCJwInAqm3W3eJ9qN0d3y2WLq-e1SwuBkw2hdwRPKQS_9XEkaIBLTkAe5F1zpsWHfg_467aMf72yo94u-_CbgMxp35wnaN7SSp9csR9NeR8IGsY4fVlsnOn_GAga1TS05S1lAPxBkKB5mdPd-KE8p2V4EEHQXL4_v5qH1RA038709XKh_25Ybd24_orzHLNsiWDTMcGxelU-_cqfHfwJAAD__1JZnqc) Here’s why: many might not realize how these decisions could ripple through their finances. The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Within the IRS code is an obscure provision... one that might not make sense unless you understood what it really means. But the important part? This IRS provision — [**a loophole, if you will**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkT-P3CAQxT8N7rBgBmMoXNyJW-mKjS5ZRSktjMGL1l4sgxPl20e-XLRFmpvuvZ_maf78OPdnG-d4n77YxXcx537L_bb0k6PLnm8UZaGjH0oPDBrKgDLR82rsGuAqqMp3vEUlpRSaV9fO8WGEEXVArUNoLEfWCmiUCEFqh6qK3ZHDgAmmhWK61kFohdZ664VVyhHB9nW0xdfxnuPos0tpXdMcS3S5TttUzd21lDUTfCJwInAqm3W3eJ9qN0d3y2WLq-e1SwuBkw2hdwRPKQS_9XEkaIBLTkAe5F1zpsWHfg_467aMf72yo94u-_CbgMxp35wnaN7SSp9csR9NeR8IGsY4fVlsnOn_GAga1TS05S1lAPxBkKB5mdPd-KE8p2V4EEHQXL4_v5qH1RA038709XKh_25Ybd24_orzHLNsiWDTMcGxelU-_cqfHfwJAAD__1JZnqc) — could help you protect your wealth from inflation and market uncertainty. It’s straightforward, and might be a way to help build financial confidence for years to come. [**⇒ So here’s how to get it**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkT-P3CAQxT8N7rBgBmMoXNyJW-mKjS5ZRSktjMGL1l4sgxPl20e-XLRFmpvuvZ_maf78OPdnG-d4n77YxXcx537L_bb0k6PLnm8UZaGjH0oPDBrKgDLR82rsGuAqqMp3vEUlpRSaV9fO8WGEEXVArUNoLEfWCmiUCEFqh6qK3ZHDgAmmhWK61kFohdZ664VVyhHB9nW0xdfxnuPos0tpXdMcS3S5TttUzd21lDUTfCJwInAqm3W3eJ9qN0d3y2WLq-e1SwuBkw2hdwRPKQS_9XEkaIBLTkAe5F1zpsWHfg_467aMf72yo94u-_CbgMxp35wnaN7SSp9csR9NeR8IGsY4fVlsnOn_GAga1TS05S1lAPxBkKB5mdPd-KE8p2V4EEHQXL4_v5qH1RA038709XKh_25Ybd24_orzHLNsiWDTMcGxelU-_cqfHfwJAAD__1JZnqc) Time may not be on your side. The debt clock is ticking. Inflation might not wait. Click below to request your FREE IRS Loophole Kit today. It’s fast. It’s easy. And it could make all the difference.

**_The Deep State is fighting for their survival._**
Friend, President Trump froze the funding to USAID and now he’s taking steps to shut it down. Without the USAID’s $50 BILLION annual budget, the Deep State will be in shambles.
**_Let me explain..._**
USAID is one of the best funded and most effective institutions controlled completely by the Deep State.
They use the $50 BILLION annual budget as a slush fund to advance their radical progressive social movements and globalist agenda across the world by funding coups, color revolutions, and laundering money back into Democratic campaign coffers through NGOs.
**That’s why 7 months ago, I sponsored a bill to defund USAID, the Deep State Democrat money laundering operation masquerading as “foreign aid”, but only 80 other Republicans joined me and the Uniparty once again bowed to the Deep State.**
Now, with President Trump’s fearless leadership, USAID and the Deep State’s largest single source of funding is being dismantled.
**Without the USAID funding the Deep State is in Deep Trouble!**
This is wonderful news for our country, but if we’ve seen anything over the past decade, we know that the Deep State isn’t going down without a fight.
**[They know that I started this fight, and they are going to attack me with everything they have to keep their power](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9WiF/?__vbtrk=MjczNTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczNTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)****.**

I’ve been fighting this battle every day since I got to Congress with the support of grassroots patriots like you, friend.
While we are rejoicing now, this isn’t over yet, and the Deep State will not go down without a fight.
**_[That’s why I’m asking for your support as I continue to fight, and win, for the American people](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9WiF/?__vbtrk=MjczNTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczNTY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: URGENT: Trump & Elon Are Dismantling USAID—Millions at Risk
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wbc3v-up1lat-kyd76rh9/)
---
# **Trump & Elon Are Dismantling USAID—Millions at Risk**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wbc3v-up1lau-kyd76rh0/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are waging war on USAID, the agency that has saved millions of lives through humanitarian aid for over 60 years. Their reckless, heartless agenda is already causing global chaos—and if we don’t fight back now, the consequences will be catastrophic. Trump has frozen all U.S. foreign aid for 90 days, cutting off critical food, medicine, and disaster relief to those who need it most. Musk, calling USAID a “criminal organization,” is leading the charge to dismantle it through his so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” (DOGE). Sixty senior USAID staff have been placed on leave, while hundreds of contractors have been fired or furloughed overnight. USAID’s website has been shut down, top security officials removed, and its headquarters locked to employees. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is overseeing a “reorganization” that will gut USAID’s budget and merge it into the State Department, stripping it of its independence. This is not about efficiency. This is about power and destruction. USAID has provided life-saving humanitarian aid, strengthened democracy, fought disease outbreaks, and countered authoritarian influence worldwide—and now Trump and Musk want to wipe it out. This is a global emergency, and we cannot afford to sit back and watch them burn everything down. If you believe in humanitarian aid, diplomacy, and America’s leadership on the world stage, now is the time to act. [**_Rush a donation now to help us fight back against Trump, Musk, and the extremist Republicans before it’s too late. Every second we wait, more lives are put in danger. Let’s stand up, fight back, and stop this madness together._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wbc3v-up1lav-kyd76rh1/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

body:

With this new administration comes the Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E), headed by Elon Musk, who will attempt to clean up the federal government.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/wQ7n82BhwHgQr-rBv9oMANiPdxAyMI0-XQtcIxWDs1-BVKUWPqRkTzFxD268c-jLxC8V1g9Wy1oJ-WPYGgRmBubchonDE8t4TFQ_5veusAyppvEFwIZPC95RCSWuLs4zrb10fSNAsvKHMZftKhSOUZm2zbnMWv2-Z8ZzaggvFbQNzK0Y-CflGTi1n4EMrhJ-ikdegcyfWF6AIdHUPZpIuPbiD8x4mKYXXo1NgA_Y2jUVGrmi4D7unWQPVd69Cya5rmdObKp1IR1Ofy8Uclj33fdvjUksos6ch4gSAwstglte427iLDr_g3KSapY_4Vj881iBFuvMH1r7aubEfPuXwzHZyR_lLH0jSWP8Ux12i7MD4XS7ILqswoDF9bqh7-XjeNaVXizWm-twJ5QS5XXSe0ZaGeULxB3qtCmkXZn3m_FqQYMLgx91Xg/AT42LyTnkhIqYYq3fdh7GjPhXAw86wuj/5)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/rm590BwvV6LPexoIZeAIgFVu3xXLMlDe4nxezucv-RKlewZ46UDC1rzN2Dc6i7G3d0KqE1I6MurqToc9oZnFSpCZu_EH1ZpRGxq36iMnizm5ixzVxJCY71AHSZZkotsEpdwPY8KrYK9hpWsnhEZ3SIxB5fQ4wByXQ6Mr-_Gh93BQJzPotEztl2MkTJXAKlXTJaxVs6q90-P8k2nZMNN_DjJiue6AFIc9qFGcN5W_wNTL21opiw7TFBRQKxQG8JZ_VdW0zl9pRDOcVQ4XaEDyTGFqK0OpkU2DqTsxtrJrhIpOmTMd5kTVQztC56hQnalpFN4ssy3r5rvoVCrpf54SZ5CAS5ER12AigXv_SOj4aLjRqGDdwxwQ6g9FFV2wDdUOjK48wnUA08qI0tAyXWQwu-39iyAbvicjRjglg1maoqYFyitLbbBLqQ/YO0z5-IrxjbhYGwTBwrqfo0d8RqL245Z/5)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/qElFOQVYcyHTMB3haPPovxilPklKPZnzVpWn8o2wVBdNkwrFK6YxDA5VcnEhTpPmh0ii2CmtZI5Jd1PRKHCiU_LAob19BuJMWSsf2Yi-n07WuVW5OepCS-Cu6fdz3lT17wTx-preWSAVFHv8XX3666s7mIHVejMCPSprhOT8ZLktr6KjHw3tS57uD1NxNvViSdAdNr73_epQn5bjKI04NqlVVpixR1QxVCpCwzXA5NDhpvFnjeuNtfIdp4kc04Zg67KX1oe3WeHQbRStasG3gFfTU_drhpx5ugv6Qs372-7WnZpM-7z5AFk5693HnOmqXfC39KRBsuKEAjHruVjHSpTtVfB07QjCOciPIuWJycgYimwB5fz2DRhbnUS-5oALR3Yj2cYct-juq6FkMbKFPM1X-m12HkRM2UhgYXi42MC8Vw6d44lVCA/rzPWEulwaUx92mpiMO2wRvU_ZWbwPA3G/5)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/QWYq2Hf3nzqGN07qkblUnlUsDMkbC0oOn7qbdM7obni34BRZ4UupxG9Ivf1y8bLC4oh7x2h8hfiY4ko50EXd1N8pi5SAzZBoTQKbFJ-W0hRV2QPW9ofSJziMuSFJ1c-OdRAz03sml64SIrSYeqI5Uwa77V6hyBEvC0K1DB-I2AAuYdB3HBVctLqpSX5a1FPiJ2rVf8RuqLrCRPZhzHdlYxnxNxhCt6_PYp7F08_ehFXQ21DLjwg1sK6yIr_Glf42235aVDtwKLXRT3YBoyonb-9QPRu42pcV6cr4HWrgBmkE21zRYGwQ4TNi7klrtawAbFmHn75u6nJOZ1x2JIESMAtXhhlz3OrAOMhhm3rd6wJk5GkwnnzHRVUSZ-xieBat32G4kkWOGJYOS2n6P8luxgVhIjUEJhVIElOmjg83NGscpRKGw32ErA/pUaFmHW_52_K6kINg4EcEmLX_TxDopBA/5)

# Tuesday, February 4, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1968, Edinburg native [Alfredo Gonzalez](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GSqyAUgOGnwU4HjicoBcVt7HLbLZ0TOSizCBlkY5Kn39nt9wX-f76P63ylEENa_9POtj59nkHCpZXQSpwdhfiasXH2Jp1RDVs19KPW42hMs9nlQqOWA3nQDgdyRl6UolEv4AdDCzbB_sQkSFSq7xE75XHQDtDdWKGRWqBkF2ouXd248pMOH1_5waVb8t5Eu9V6P0T_T8AkYDrPs6vHRjnFkLjLZRUwbZTcLedPAROnWgIfAqY1pzdFfrcUfWGX24VS_WqKdfczxBgOPQiU604h_p7qn_SHhe8AAAD__0RSXLE) was killed in combat at the Battle of Hue City during the Vietnam War. His heroic actions earned him the Medal of Honor. A group of duck hunters from Louisiana was having a field day last month until the game wardens showed up. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdIuWtXGgcHENXa69Ejn2AlYMRLYTkrc_kb_-m2k-6dPM_LuOVxti2Oa_dmVT3tM-ElILSIBq9DbEz6gqb27o-6Zi01xkp3XX9X21mBYRnbWNVCxb71pNN4049Z32zqHFKphThoSqaaRUqm4mddGelL9xo3rUQiH7UPZUl4ULv22e4md_cardvlbRLKU8spB_BA2ChuM46vtR3icUNJxuQQPSGVLQ8BXAbFeGwybPWwbHW0k2wg-awubBP90dludWOGV47DlzzmHfoCyJGUpYOUPk2Ub4zocY1lAEDVUy_nGEGEPWF6FwXm2I357l1-Nehv4HAAD__3MBcQ8) in today's _Around Texas_ section! Do you love Texas? So do our 260,000 readers. Advertise in _The Texas Flyover_ and connect your business with passionate locals. [Learn more](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tu7CAQgOGngc7WMMzhUlCcxt2mTWnhMKyR8NrCZC9vHyV10v_6pP_9Ml9iqeV2fYsbh_7M-4yA_wbAAWhOsdTXTDKFBZJXkoOy2hnjnPdyDZqJMkUNDsAumtC6zCaTceRtWqIs4RsDBFJKa6JRZbImIaWFFXkwgoBT6Xsb-8qdn_HM9bXfuY0f-yZrWHs_TqH_C5wETr80Aqcjtn7jNjxKX4fPU-AkW0jHo9RaTmMFwXWLpf6I_c_Fe8CvAAAA__972lNW). ## Cities Hit by Deportation Protests
Protests over President Trump’s immigration enforcement operations [erupted in multiple cities across Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL8GOiN7WRxcuHhNurz2SgR4k6zOYGRv4uTvT7n--tGMNF-X6TJz5P32f97Iy-uaJtAwKA1K4xRmju8J2-AXHZxpyZtTP1o7js61d2-tXp0JBOOAw0DQk8HVmUWvdgCzmJb9R6ZBozF9j9iZK55sAAwLGXTaNqgpsKTcyZ2EXnO5xnd6Uu7WtLXR30WO0vT_Gjg3cK61djvVUom-P0AD5yMnoSJFSX5sR1G8bXzLs3Da1ZEir0xFUX4cotb02CW_FWhAZ_o2-3BUjpGLPTWob9vM8Tcrf354evgJAAD__97NYOc) on Sunday. Participants were seen waving Mexican flags and displaying signs with messages like “Immigrants built this country” and “No one is illegal on stolen land.” Demonstrations [turned violent in Conroe](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQBp_GdEb2shhTuLiGLtdeiRa8BOsMjmxfSN7-lPR__UnfjObPbb5RiOG8_6aDXX1taQYFvVQgFc6eQnzP2Hi3KD_qhp0eOmuMtePY7M7bYVt4szywXmznlenVYlbbAwHBhk1wnzMFCrXuOsRWbzgYD-gX1jgqI1CxDzXltu5c-UVli-_05Nyu6Wii22t9FNH9EjAJmK7rav_u6d9nFDBRrmGNLGA6-SoCpphWigKmcBzhnqmGdMpHTpVLlZQzl1rkms6cWH5ZAiawvSTvUXm1yqEjkGgMSdKLlYPpeuvRGs3YZOcfV4gxFDMIVPeDQvxK1h-rPR38DwAA__-FbW2W), where several people were arrested for allegedly assaulting a police officer. Some roads were shut down in [nearby Houston](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdEa2cQwULtLQ5d4yJTLYwNn4B9knIXn7Fem3-6TRN9LM_TbeDHiI6z8TnMb3kkbBxIUyQZkcrQH_GWVl9cRszyunedt0SnVd31ebZtyp9sKkvDTdpEQvlq7jcuoEZ4wpNVegzzImmOS8aaSs-SJbZYW0k-OyZ4pI5ixgyjVuDt3blMV_0svlek6h8npD3AtprkQMRAzHcdShxDMjYnCRPgsRw548IMwnrqcag4tIxIBbehYTbaFpoSdjimBioT8JIo0GIcUDrKN7TugKFmpWA7Eg3bMrYF1EivkZdloohABr_ip0zmZ-2HREIgaT6fXKP4_7_73K2u4HeA9FtUSyNRjw3xn4568vLX4DAAD__9qcfmM), where protesters chanted “Si, se puede.” [Dallas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8Gd1gwnoBdULzGXV67pTU2Q4JEjGXYkPz9Kttvd4urc3S-rsuVYor77T892NVXyAsouEgFUuHiKab3gp13q_KT7thpO4zGjOM0dXcXvDUKJw52RGvtpmklDtsF7ECazNBF94EpUKj1MCD2OqA1HtCvrHFSRqBiH2s--3rnyi8qIb3zk89-y48uuXutRxHDPwGzgLm11of8wp1b-RwEzJ8pYPaUEhV55BQ3lj63vea2y-PMlUuV5Xv39JaBVwnd6fzRYkqxGCtQ3R4U06-u_tn_dPATAAD__0NvXos), Arlington, Pflugerville, Lufkin, and [McAllen](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu4yAYhJ_GdFjcbOKCYht32XZLi8CPjYTBgj9x8vYrR6c95Vz0aTT_7svdxhTz-tfuYPAdyiKYGCgTlKnF25g-iyLePJifOAHDtbyN4-02TWQzWksnBRNaOj0-wuAFHwY5Oe19sI4xEs0FY4IpzqVUqudB6dEL5R_A1cTGTjHwEUvtcQOEt20hfcoLau_KTpLZEI_WyT-dmDsxn-fZv2xK8HGQsdp0tToxZzhbJ-ZUnE30R2zP7Cv4RkugRy0IDaE2GmJKFDegDSsAfuPdXcxMY6bteRyl4teNa7UZaY3rhheRVOOPM6YU26g7xdbdxu8Cgr8e9zLifwAAAP__B5dznA) also saw protests, some of which were organized by pro-immigrant advocacy groups. ## Four Dads Stop School Shooter
A group of parents jumped into action to [restrain an 83-year-old suspect](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL0OmzAURp_GbDfyH2APHrqwpWtHdMEXcGVsZLtJePsq3bt90icdHZ1fz_mJIYa0_8STXPtseZZc9sAlcD17DPGedefdwr0VHTkxKjMMxljbHU5pLTZv_EbSjMbalUiQMj3KdTVoxy64L4xLroVQSuuH2PQ4eKn9QkJbPjDNyYeWy6Md1OiDdYt3flF5rPnsojtauypTP5icmJxwWYX6PkxOV66NyclTSqEClXdIsBRMPsLvAkbBemDZyQPue8EXtu-sFf_EBp7QxxvehFdOcGFFTwnhpDOXgBGOCvXIuYW0w5VjWAkq3kxOoje96e3I5NQV5693iDHUYWSa7yeG-M-6_Tfjy8m_AQAA___x6HZO) who shot a band competition participant at Pasedena Memorial High School on Saturday. The suspect, identified as Dennis Erwin Brandl Jr. of Spring, claimed he [was being chased and feared for his life](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdIvsxb-BwsXfuMu1V6IFL8GKwQg7IXn7E9dfM9Vo5tP3fRtuFGLY7l-0si3vOQ0o8R9IBKkHTyF-Bl15O0rfq4qtapvOmK7r-2qxZkRDSJ40625WSk7z3GrTeZ76URFVwV5jEqVWqmm0rtWsW-NR-5GV7qURWrIPJR11Wbjwm_IcP-nFRz2ltYp2KWXPovkv0Al053nWUwzTA5f0zCVtV0ug2_jMAl1ME0WB7voU6CRe0Qh0nXzAmDYPmQvM6YCugQ_TASl6yM-881QgbLBTJs8bwcprOgJFWDLkJaUStrtAVx3W72eIMWTTCi3vK4X4S1r-VPey-BMAAP__fDxwdQ). Police said Brandl did not know his victim, a percussion technical consultant for Angleton ISD, who was shot in the shoulder and is expected to make a full recovery. A group of four dads that includes several military veterans and a police officer are [credited with restraining Brandl](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHPpCAUAH8NdhiEJ0JBcY3dXnulecJTyaEYYdfdf3_Z6796kslk_jymB8YUj_U37uTqe8mTFLLnQnIBU8CYPhM0wc0i2K4h1w3KaG2Mtc3mAI0AbRTZWZuwgMJZaR0CetF7It9E95UJKaDrlAJouwUGHSSEmTqwQjMQFGLNV1s3qvTGsqRPftHV-rw3yW21noWpX0yOTI73fbd_t_z8QiZHvGr0iZgcD7oLk2PKHhOT44kFAx3Id9rzFTHxsuVc47Hyja7MA4bCS80nX5_HjgeTozQ9B2V67XvBLWjDQXjkOJDlhGDRiN7rsDSXC-cdU4pFDwzEumNM_2Prj_deTv4LAAD__xvccGY) until law enforcement arrived. Brandl was arrested and is being held on an $80,000 bond. The One In Five Foundation For Kids, a nonprofit dedicated to preventing violence in schools, announced it will honor the fathers with its National Award for Heroism. “What these individuals did that day—they are heroes,” said founder Daniel Chapin.
## The Most, Least Visited State Parks
Texas state parks saw more than 9.1 million visitors in 2024, a 1.9% decrease from the previous year. clean_body: A morning newsletter focused entirely on news from the state of Texas. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it. | | | | | | Tuesday, February 4, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1968, Edinburg native was killed in combat at the Battle of Hue City during the Vietnam War. His heroic actions earned him the Medal of Honor. A group of duck hunters from Louisiana was having a field day last month until the game wardens showed up. Check out in today's Around Texas section! Do you love Texas? So do our 260,000 readers. Advertise in The Texas Flyover and connect your business with passionate locals. . Today's sponsor is , offering an investment opportunity in the energy sector. Abilene 🌥️ 79/58° | Amarillo ☁️ 68/41° | Austin 🌩️ 79/66° | Brownsville 🌩️ 81/69° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 79/67° | DFW 🌥️ 77/63° | El Paso ⛅ 80/44° | Houston ☁️ 77/68° | Laredo ⛅ 86/65° | Lubbock ☁️ 79/45° | Midland ☁️ 81/51° | San Antonio 🌥️ 80/67° | Tyler 🌩️ 77/65° | Waco 🌩️ 77/64° | Cities Hit by Deportation Protests Protests over President Trump’s immigration enforcement operations on Sunday. Participants were seen waving Mexican flags and displaying signs with messages like “Immigrants built this country” and “No one is illegal on stolen land.” Demonstrations , where several people were arrested for allegedly assaulting a police officer. Some roads were shut down in , where protesters chanted “Si, se puede.” , Arlington, Pflugerville, Lufkin, and also saw protests, some of which were organized by pro-immigrant advocacy groups. According to a , 87% of Texans support deportations for illegal immigrants convicted of a felony, while 64% believe there should be a way for them to stay in the country legally if certain requirements are met. “We believe that we have human rights, that we are people, and our people are being deported,” . Meanwhile, a Pflugerville man said he was demonstrating “because people are protesting the rule of law because they don't want criminals deported out of the country.” Four Dads Stop School Shooter A group of parents jumped into action to who shot a band competition participant at Pasedena Memorial High School on Saturday. The suspect, identified as Dennis Erwin Brandl Jr. of Spring, claimed he . Police said Brandl did not know his victim, a percussion technical consultant for Angleton ISD, who was shot in the shoulder and is expected to make a full recovery. A group of four dads that includes several military veterans and a police officer are until law enforcement arrived. Brandl was arrested and is being held on an $80,000 bond. The One In Five Foundation For Kids, a nonprofit dedicated to preventing violence in schools, announced it will honor the fathers with its National Award for Heroism. “What these individuals did that day—they are heroes,” said founder Daniel Chapin. The Most, Least Visited State Parks Texas state parks saw more than 9.1 million visitors in 2024, a 1.9% decrease from the previous year. An Austin news outlet compiled lists highlighting the 10 and visited state parks last year, providing historical attendance figures dating back to 2007. The most visited state park was in Cooke and Denton counties, welcoming 687,544 guests last year, a 23.0% decrease from 2023. The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department describes the park as a “natural playground” where visitors can escape the bustle of the nearby DFW Metroplex. The least visited state park was near Rocksprings in Edwards County. Only 590 people visited the site via a guided tour to watch an estimated 3 million Mexican free-tailed bats emerge from the sinkhole at dusk for their nightly feeding. to see the list of the most visited state parks. The list of the least visited state parks can be . | Flying together with our sponsor Time’s Running Out to Be Early on this Tech Investment With such a tech-friendly new administration, 2025 is shaping up to be a year of innovations. One of those could be wireless power—power that acts like a Wi-Fi signal—from . It has the potential to for retailers and manufacturers. That’s why Energous is already working with a Fortune 10 multinational retailer and part of the AWS Partner Network. Their patented solution provides 2X the power and better visibility than the competition. Though Energous is public, they’re giving investors 1 unregistered convertible preferred share (convertible into 2 Nasdaq: WATT common shares) 3 warrants to purchase additional shares at a fixed price Their patented technology literally transmits power to devices through the air, eliminating the need for cables and batteries and providing a that track and deliver data in real-time. It’s such a powerful innovation, that it earned “IoT Innovation of the Year” honors. And they have a $650 market opportunity ahead. Don’t wait— | ➤ Georgetown: A Forbes Middle School bus driver refused to release students for about an hour last Wednesday afternoon when he claimed to smell marijuana and called the police to investigate. "All the kids were crying, parents were blocking the streets because they're trying to get to their kids ,” said a parent. () ➤ San Antonio: The city is shuttering its Migrant Resource Center after months of declining use. The center opened in July 2022 with funding from the federal government. () ➤ Lewisville ISD canceled classes at 21 schools on Monday after a water main break forced city officials to issue a boil water notice. () ➤ Bosque County: Game wardens apprehended a group of hunters from Louisiana last month for being in possession of three times the daily limit of six ducks per licensed hunter. The group of four—one of whom didn’t have a license—had 54 ducks in their possession. () ➤ Sullivan City: Authorities arrested Councilman Ruben Villalon, 52, on narcotics charges Friday. Villalon’s bail has been set at $200,000. () ➤ Taylor: The city dedicated a monument Saturday honoring hundreds of black residents who were buried in unmarked graves when the Taylor City Cemetery was segregated. "I think people being seen and being recognized goes a long way in this life and the next life and the afterlife ,” said Councilman Gerald Anderson. () ➤ Dallas: Disappointed Mavericks fans built a makeshift tribute to Luka Doncic on Sunday after the star player was traded to the Los Angeles Lakers over the weekend. Crews were seen throwing items in the trash Monday morning. name: USO Birthday Alert
subject: Limited-time Birthday GIVEAWAY Offer:
body:
Claim your free hat before midnight!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[CLAIM YOUR HAT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[**YOU 'RE INVITED**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[**Join our official
birthday celebration and
we'll send you a free hat!**](https://links.e.uso.)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
| [**BIRTHDAY GOAL:** $100,000
**DEADLINE:** MIDNIGHT TONIGHT ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
We've got three important reasons you should join our birthday celebration with a gift:
1. **Honoring 84 years of supporting those who serve** : We know you care about our service members and their families who make countless sacrifices for our country -- will you help the USO continue supporting them in 2025 and beyond?
2. **Limited-time GIVEAWAY offer** : When you donate $20 or more toward our $100,000 birthday goal by midnight tonight, we'll send you a free USO hat to show your military pride.
3. **Unwavering commitment** : Our heroes show their unwavering commitment to defending our country every day, often deploying at a moment's notice and enduring long stretches away from loved ones. It's up to us to show them _our_ unwavering commitment to supporting them.

**[So please, can we count on you to rush a birthday donation now?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
When service demands sacrifice, our heroes in uniform are there for us. Giving up holidays and precious moments with their families, deploying to dangerous disaster and conflict zones and doing whatever it takes to protect us.
Thanks to caring supporters like YOU, the USO has been right there with them for the last 84 years, providing comfort and camaraderie, a place to relax and keep in touch with loved ones and essential supplies. **We -- and they -- need you to keep this vital work going.**
**[Don't miss this chance to celebrate the USO's birthday and claim your exclusive USO hat: Donate $29 or more by midnight tonight to support our service members. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[CLAIM YOUR USO HAT!](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $29 ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $58 ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $116 ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
From all of us here at the USO, thank you for joining our birthday celebration and standing with those who serve. Here's to the next 84 years!
--Team USO

name: History Facts
subject: Churchill owned hundreds of these
body:
Winston Churchill had a larger-than-life personality, which was reflected in his unique fashion choices, including, on occasion, a velvet romper. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dnxr3ucewmt51i83cvp9atabefm99zit2hr5uz9d3j0tgx7dr4908b0ys3mkdevvk13ml6g4frjfpfkbfjda8pa22zvtvlo5ymkoq6r6pkgxs83l49do8h3g060dvhj6meqa0e2j6ohwhtk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Winston Churchill acquired hundreds of hats of every kind during his lifetime.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W inston Churchill had a larger-than-life personality, which was reflected in his unique fashion choices, including, on occasion, a [velvet romper](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=53p517cis0lwwzcgbttr78ms90vut1j5db1xtxz7n49ykgslmhkol6j7hgd83m60ydc01xpc6xrq2ymxbj16ratftc6mg5vffmdtmjtu2iacfpk480akwsbgym4dbnuxvc6hie7amoyb9l72mi5otp5stqwj5wzrwzvn0zopk1h20r7xag068rym45aqveuifvs3z8vc1010tu4racgbkkvm3vu1e2eh0fi31unxdcua3o9q7cr1lawqtnt1c88h14uil1g2y28kk4hz4ehzibgnzsgi3s6t65b7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Churchill was also known for his expansive hat collection, which numbered in the hundreds and wasn’t limited to just one style. In addition to the typical formal and casual hats of the time, the statesman boasted military, equestrian, and even trade headgear. As his son Randolph [once said](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “My father never met a hat he didn’t like.”
---
Hats became part of Churchill’s public image early on. After 1910, when a photographer snapped a [photo](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of him in a too-small hat, political cartoons usually depicted the politician with little hats atop an outsized head. Rather than take offense, Churchill actively encouraged the caricature. A 1939 [profile of Churchill](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in _Life_ magazine featured 20 portraits of him throughout his life in some of his favorite hats, from a “schoolboy bowler” in his early 20s to an engineer’s cap in his early 60s.
Churchill’s many official government and academic posts came with even more hats to add to his collection, which he often continued wearing long after his tenure — including a formal bicorn hat with gold filigree for his position as Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports, a high military rank that comes with a castle. Later in his life, Churchill was [most closely associated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) with Homburg hats, which he made famous during World War II.
In one popular anecdote, a house where Churchill was staying with a group of guests for his brother’s wedding caught fire, and soon after, Churchill was spotted wearing a brass firefighter’s helmet with his dressing gown, bossing the fire brigade around. Truly, he could find a hat for any occasion.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr5r1l&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Churchill was hit by a car in New York City.
Churchill was visiting the United States on a lecture circuit in 1931 when, during a stop in New York City, he set out to pay a visit to an old friend. He didn’t have the exact address, so he was lost and running late when he thought he saw his friend’s building across a busy road. (He was actually about half a mile from his destination.) In England, cars drive on the left side of the street (compared with the right in the United States), so Churchill looked in the wrong direction before crossing the street, and was hit by a fast-moving car. Churchill was rushed to a hospital, where he wrote a long article detailing the incident. He sold it to the _Daily Mail_ for $2,500 and, newly flush with cash, made a full recovery in the Bahamas. Churchill harbored no hard feelings toward the driver, and even gave him an inscribed copy of his book _My Early Life_ , which had been published the year before.

subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9hggp6rcgg0j8p89n3r3tlfaplokeshq3m74bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdie8p34chh2bs)

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjknebf8m1l8io7fmnt52t0ov0o52db4rt7ipfjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdie8p34chh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: I’ll be blunt
body:
Peter, Have you been following what’s going on in Washington? No more federal funding for states that indoctrinate their st
|
---
| Peter, Have you been following what’s going on in Washington? No more federal funding for states that indoctrinate their students in CRT and radical gender ideology. Cartels declared as terrorist organizations. Almost a thousand deportations of criminals daily. Energy production unleashed. That’s common sense in action. New Jersey is in desperate need of it – and WE are both the megaphone and the force that is going to make it happen. How? By activating one common sense New Jerseyan at a time. I’ll be blunt. We need your financial support to power our efforts. We’re working on outreach projects across the state, but they cost money. The other side has it and we need the dollars to go toe-to-toe. These don’t need to be mega-donor dollars. EVERY contribution helps us reach another New Jerseyan, get someone registered to vote, or run a critical ad a little while longer. So please, do what you can — and do it TODAY. We’re starting now and we have no time to waste.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: It’s Not Over—President Trump’s Nominees Need Your Help
body:
We’re still fighting for his nominees and your voice matters. The fight isn’t over until everyone he nominates at every level is confirmed.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** This week, the Senate is continuing the confirmation process and will bring Russ Vought (Director, Office of Management and Budget), Pam Bondi (Attorney General), Christopher Wright (Secretary of Energy) and many others out of committee and to the floor for an official vote. Additionally, Kash Patel's Judiciary Committee vote is scheduled for Thursday at 10:15 am ET.
Today, RFK Jr. was passed favorably out of the Finance Committee this morning, and Tulsi Gabbard was passed favorably out of the Intel Committee just a little while ago.However, Democrats are fighting confirmation tooth and nail for many of Presidents Trump's nominees, and are delaying things as long as possible. But Republicans control the Senate, and there are actions Leader Thune can take to force Democrats to work faster.
**Remember, the longer it takes to get President Trump 's team in place, the less time he has before the next election to get the policies he wants implemented.** The left is counting on this, so that they can say he hasn't delivered on his promises, even though they're the ones hoping for long delays. President Trump deserves to have his nominees confirmed quickly, just like the Senate does for other presidents.
**ACTION:** To make contacting your own senators easy, we have the [**Confirm Trump 's Nominees**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a988f5cf/1edb9794a9886976) petition where, with one click, you can send a message telling your elected officials that it's time to get on board with the president's agenda. You can also be connected right away for a phone call--which is the most effective way to reach your senators. Please make sure you call, even if you have called before.
_Note: If the voicemail boxes are full or you can 't get through, please look up the local office phone numbers in your state and call one of those offices._ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTACT MY SENATORS ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a988f5cf/1edb9794a9886978)
---
| **** **ACTION:** I also ask that you **[repost my X post](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a988f5cf/1edb9794a988697a "https://x.com/jennybethm/status/1886539177275339111?s=46&t=_-MbUN12QoN4uPLaHD_FqA")** calling on Majority Leader John Thune to use every tool he has in his toolbox to quickly get all of President Trump's nominees confirmed.
**ACTION:** Finally, if you'd like to contact the GOP Chairmen of Intel and Judiciary, you can use our [**Align Act campaign**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a988f5cf/1edb9794a988697c) to do that. We have a call script and a pre-written X post that you can use to urge them to make sure the nominees pass favorably and quickly out of their committees.
I know it's a lot to keep up with, but your participation is _vital_ in this process and we cannot do this without your hard work and dedication.
Together we can secure our country for future generations! **__** **** ************
---
| **** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a988f5cf/1edb9794a988697e)
---
|
---
|
---

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Fighting for Lower Taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Making New Hampshire More Affordable
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
Derek,
**Last week I introduced legislation to lower your taxes and preserve our New Hampshire Advantage.** While Democrats want to raise taxes and fees at every turn, Republicans are fighting to protect your hard-earned money.

That’s why I’m asking you to sign our **[Lower Taxes Petition](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)** today. Granite Staters deserve a government that works for them—not one that takes more out of their wallets to fund bloated programs and wasteful spending.
**Sign the petition now and join the fight to keep New Hampshire a low-tax state!** [🔗 Sign the Petition Now](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
With Democrats throughout New Hamsphire always looking for new ways to tax and spend, we need to stand united. [By signing this petition, you are sending a clear message](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.): **New Hampshire must remain a low-tax state where families and businesses can thrive.**
Together, we will reject Democrat tax hikes and keep more money where it belongs—in your pocket.
[Thank you for standing with us in the fight for lower taxes and a stronger economy.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

| TFVC will be celebrating its tenth birthday by bringing you a killer line-up of **Freedom Fight Rally speakers**! Join us on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol on February 18 to hear from Blaze TV’s Sara Gonzales (an OG TFVC volunteer!), filmmaker Mikki Willis and Congressman Chip Roy. We will also have plenty of **TFVC Champion lawmakers** , including freshman Representative Shelly Luther who will share her story of being jailed during the dark era of lockdowns in our state. Plus, Dr. Seema Nanda, a Houston area physician who has been in the trenches of the medical liberty fight with TFVC for several years. **We can’t wait to see you in two weeks! ** **BY POPULAR DEMAND...** we are opening [shirt sales](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NDExMTc5OTI0MTYxOTEwLFwiclwiOjE0NTQxMTI0MDYxMjU5NTA0N30iLCJzIjoiNmFhZTI4ZGQ3OTM1ZjY1NyJ9) up for ONE MORE DAY ONLY. **Order today!**

clean_body: | | 10 Years Fighting Tyranny | | | | | TFVC will be celebrating its tenth birthday by bringing you a killer line-up of Freedom Fight Rally speakers! Join us on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol on February 18 to hear from Blaze TV’s Sara Gonzales (an OG TFVC volunteer!), filmmaker Mikki Willis and Congressman Chip Roy. We will also have plenty of TFVC Champion lawmakers , including freshman Representative Shelly Luther who will share her story of being jailed during the dark era of lockdowns in our state. Plus, Dr. Seema Nanda, a Houston area physician who has been in the trenches of the medical liberty fight with TFVC for several years. We can’t wait to see you in two weeks! body:
Thank you for your support.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101515471/526205451/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_250203thanks_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDJlOTYyMS1mY2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=28-VHoekP8oJUXGJl2C03R1PS5u-2LSgo1caZLUbv_E=) Hi Peter,

**I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your support for my campaign.** We are just a couple of weeks into the new Trump administration – and we’ve already seen absolute chaos, confusion, and destruction from Trump and the Republican party.

From his freeze on federal funding, which would have devastating impacts on everything from student loans and school meal programs to housing services and more, to pardoning violent insurrectionists, working to replace skilled civil servants with MAGA loyalists, and more, Trump is working overtime to dismantle progress that we have made.

We are not going to lie down and take it. With you by my side, we will continue to fight tooth and nail to protect our rights and move our nation forward. It will be a long four years, but together, we will endure.

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: Team NRSC
subject: Do you love America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We believe that America’s best days are ahead. Do you?

Friend -- it's February.

It's a month of extra love and gratitude. This year, we're so grateful for a Republican Senate majority to help confirm President Trump's excellent nominees.

subject: Your response could be the difference I need.

body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7mq4hpg0bbnhve2j25fg7f0u8k600u101eq4btg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieco74c9h2bs "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

### "When you don't focus on safety, and you focus on social justice or the environment bad things happen!!"
Feb 4
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156452679&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDUyNjc5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODY3ODM4MywiZXhwIjoxNzQxMjcwMzgzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5N1svcrRmpv90keIvjZWWoA_wXlnBFrCtvBvaEV8zFk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

Trump Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy **[told off Jake Tapper on CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/e2072241-8a27-4384-9654-578b31e443b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for minimizing the safety concerns over DEI hiring practices in the aviation industry.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e2072241-8a27-4384-9654-578b31e443b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/db2ad808-71c8-474f-a856-6a1023cd6e99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Is there any evidence that backs up President Trump's claims that DEI hiring practices are responsible in any way for this tragedy at Reagan National?" Tapper asked Duffy.
"I do know that in the last administration, they were focussed on, not safety, but changing the name from 'cockpit' to 'flight deck,'" Duffy answered. "They focussed on things that don't matter in regards to safety!"
"Our mission from the start is safety, and they've lost that mission! When you don't focus on safety, and you focus on social justice or the environment bad things happen!!" Duffy continued.
Watch him go off on Tapper right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e2072241-8a27-4384-9654-578b31e443b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By American Alternative Assets](https://substack.com/redirect/57a701f6-5338-4b34-9356-760b5f8110f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# BREAKING: For the first time in American history, U.S. interest payments now exceed our entire defense budget.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57a701f6-5338-4b34-9356-760b5f8110f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The numbers are staggering:
* $36 trillion in national debt
* Every 1% rate increase = $90 billion in new costs
* Gold surging past $2,750 as central banks buy at fastest pace in history
* Over 1,082 metric tons of gold purchased by central banks in 2022 alone

As Trump prepares to retake office, a showdown with the Fed could determine the fate of your retirement savings. Smart money isn't waiting - central banks are racing to accumulate gold before 2025.
**[Get our FREE guide, "Fed vs Trump:](https://substack.com/redirect/57a701f6-5338-4b34-9356-760b5f8110f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The Coming Battle for America's Financial Future" to learn:
✓ Why central banks are stockpiling gold at record rates
✓ How gold rose from $35 to $850 during the last debt crisis
✓ Why experts predict gold could hit $9,000 as this crisis unfolds
✓ How to protect your savings before it's too late
[Get Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/57a701f6-5338-4b34-9356-760b5f8110f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Stephen Miller HUMILIATES Jake Tapper for claiming illegals are needed for agriculture**
Trump Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller **[humiliated Jake Tapper on CNN last week](https://substack.com/redirect/36768ba1-a41e-4f62-a615-3359a7539663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for suggesting that illegal immigrants are needed in America to provide cheap agricultural labor.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36768ba1-a41e-4f62-a615-3359a7539663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/36768ba1-a41e-4f62-a615-3359a7539663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The Department of Agriculture says that 42% of crop workers were undocumented immigrants," Tapper cited. "In many cases these migrants do jobs Americans do not want to do."
Tapper asked how Trump would make sure that deporting illegal migrants would not be reflected in raising grocery prices.
"Well i'm sure it's not your position Jake, that we should supply America's food with exploitation illegal alien labor?" Miller asked sarcastically.
Miller continued to explain that most illegal aliens were not doing farm work but are in fact "collecting welfare" residing in American cities.
"You're changing the subject," Tapper snapped.
**[Watch the tense interview here:](https://substack.com/redirect/36768ba1-a41e-4f62-a615-3359a7539663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36768ba1-a41e-4f62-a615-3359a7539663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Watch him go off on Tapper right here: BREAKING: For the first time in American history, U.S. interest payments now exceed our entire defense budget. | | ---|---|--- The numbers are staggering: $36 trillion in national debt Every 1% rate increase = $90 billion in new costs Gold surging past $2,750 as central banks buy at fastest pace in history Over 1,082 metric tons of gold purchased by central banks in 2022 alone As Trump prepares to retake office, a showdown with the Fed could determine the fate of your retirement savings. Smart money isn't waiting - central banks are racing to accumulate gold before 2025. The Coming Battle for America's Financial Future" to learn: ✓ Why central banks are stockpiling gold at record rates ✓ How gold rose from $35 to $850 during the last debt crisis ✓ Why experts predict gold could hit $9,000 as this crisis unfolds ✓ How to protect your savings before it's too late Stephen Miller HUMILIATES Jake Tapper for claiming illegals are needed for agriculture Trump Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller for suggesting that illegal immigrants are needed in America to provide cheap agricultural labor. "The Department of Agriculture says that 42% of crop workers were undocumented immigrants," Tapper cited. "In many cases these migrants do jobs Americans do not want to do." Tapper asked how Trump would make sure that deporting illegal migrants would not be reflected in raising grocery prices. "Well i'm sure it's not your position Jake, that we should supply America's food with exploitation illegal alien labor?" Miller asked sarcastically. Miller continued to explain that most illegal aliens were not doing farm work but are in fact "collecting welfare" residing in American cities. "You're changing the subject," Tapper snapped. * | | POLL What is your first concern when flying on an airplane? | ? ? ? ? ? PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Online threats to kids are real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I’m proud to be leading the charge in the Senate. Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9Tb2NpYWwtTWVkaWEtQmFuLUZvci1LaWRzXzIwMjUwMjA0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U29jaWFsLU1lZGlhLUJhbi1Gb3ItS2lkcyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD0yNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/Wz7STdtyO3GKqGbiJxShew)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As every parent knows, we can't help but worry about all of the dangers out there in world every time our kids leave the house. It is our duty to protect and guide them.

But in today's day and age, the fact is they need not step one foot out the door...

**The online threats to kids are real and the horror stories are endless.** From sick predators targeting kids to cyberbullying to videos promoting self-harm and risky behavior, I cannot think of one good reason why young children should have any access to social media.

I'm proud to be leading the charge to get the **Kids Off Social Media Act** passed by Congress and signed into law by President Trump.

This legislation would set the social media minimum age to 13, and it would make it illegal for Big Tech to use algorithms to feed anyone under 17 addictive content.

I'd like to know what you think: _Do you believe we need to protect kids from social media_?
---
[ **LET ME KNOW >>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9Tb2NpYWwtTWVkaWEtQmFuLUZvci1LaWRzXzIwMjUwMjA0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U29jaWFsLU1lZGlhLUJhbi1Gb3ItS2lkcyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD0yNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/I_FPcK_rvNGzYE_7VXXJvA)
---
This is not a partisan issue. I'm standing alongside Republican and Democrat cosponsors to get this done, and I'm confident we can move swiftly.

**The Kids Off Social Media Act isn 't political - it's common sense!**

So many families across America, our family, friends, neighbors, colleagues, and others, have suffered due to Big Tech's failure to take responsibility for its products. This legislation will empower families in crisis and empower teachers to get control of their classrooms.

**We must protect America 's children. It's vital that we get out the word on this effort.**

**[**Please show your support today by making a special contribution >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9Tb2NpYWwtTWVkaWEtQmFuLUZvci1LaWRzXzIwMjUwMjA0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U29jaWFsLU1lZGlhLUJhbi1Gb3ItS2lkcyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD0yNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/1HfYD0_YU3-LTY7VBtslPw)** Thank you so much for being a valued member of Team Cruz.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
