name: Chairman Eric Underwood
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🇺🇸Newsletters from Patriot State Chairs | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b47c1ae29bc/n41kepo7ku-12729354?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a9ce9a9288&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

__

_"A false witness who pours out lies, a person who sows discord in a family."
"A person who stirs up conflict in the community"
**Proverbs 6:19**_
One of the things I love about my church is the Lead Pastor, I believe, has the ability to connect scripture to development to salvation. Which really seems like a "simple" three step process....
1. Read Scripture
2. Develop one's Faith
3. Belief in Salvation

But our HUMAN tendencies and the enemy seem to derail us as often as we let them. This past week, the sermon spoken was in context from **James 5:12** but transitioned into **Proverbs 6:16-19** and a bullet point list of what the Lord hates. The interesting reference is that it says SIX things, but then adds a SEVENTH as detestable. As if the SEVENTH is of MOST importance.

Do you know people who stir up conflict in the community? People who just want to sow discord in a family?

WHY?

I listened intently to the sermon and these are the notes that are so profound.

_**Critical Mind vs Critical Spirit**_

A "critical spirit" refers to a **negative attitude** where someone habitually focuses on finding flaws, _criticizing others_ , and _dwelling_ on the **negative aspects of situations** , often with a _tendency to complain_ and tear down rather than build up; essentially, it describes a mindset that is overly critical and fault-finding, __**often to the point of being destructive**__.

A “critical mind” is the ability to think and reason objectively, question assumptions, and make informed decisions. **It involves analyzing information, identifying problems, and coming up with solutions**.
* Questioning: Asking questions about information and ideas
* Analyzing: Examining information, arguments, and theories in detail
* Evaluating: Making judgments based on evidence, reasoning, and assumptions
* Problem-solving: Defining problems, generating solutions, and assessing the results
* Considering alternatives: Weighing pros and cons, and thinking about other possible interpretations
* Avoiding bias: Being aware of your own assumptions and biases, and applying consistent standards when evaluating sources

_"Remember, it is sin to know what you ought to do and then not do it."_
* * *

I have been so blessed to connect with many State Chairs from across America. These bold leaders are driving forth a new Republican Party built on grassroots and principle driven leadership and creating the stability to build a strong inclusive party.

Here are two recent messages from leaders I respect very much. The America First movement is alive and growing and we must continue our steadfast approach to common-sense governing. We must be leaders who honor the constitution and defend the platform. We must seek out Constitutional and Platform Republicans to be BOLD, purposeful, humble servants of the people. | | Confrontational Politics by Dorothy Moon, IDGOP Chairwoman
---
| The campaign against Proposition 1 in Idaho last year was remarkable. Republicans and independents united like never before to defeat a cynical attempt to rewrite our state's election system. It was a true demonstration of the "big tent" vision that Ronald Reagan championed so long ago. Republicans who might disagree on a dozen different issues came together to fight ranked-choice voting, and the people of Idaho responded by rejecting Prop 1 with nearly 70% of the vote. I’ve been optimistic that this newfound unity would carry through into the 2025 legislative session. Of course, Republicans will never agree on every issue, but we have a tremendous opportunity for respectful dialogue and meaningful debate that can lead to positive outcomes for the people of Idaho. Unfortunately, some organizations aren’t interested in unity — nor are they concerned with the well-being of Idahoans. You may have seen text messages and social media ads recently using confrontational politics to attack good Republican legislators as “traitors” simply because they didn’t support a particular out-of-state group’s pet projects. While it’s important for citizens to hold elected officials accountable, this is not the way to do it. Imagine you’re a brand-new legislator. You spent more than a year campaigning, knocking on doors, and sharing your vision with voters. Maybe you defeated a longtime incumbent, or maybe you won an open seat. You arrive in Boise full of hope and optimism, ready to serve your constituents — only to find yourself targeted by an out-of-state organization running ads that call you a “traitor” to the people of Idaho, before you’ve hardly taken a single vote. Folks, I’ve been there. I defeated an incumbent to earn my seat in the House of Representatives. I remember those early days — stepping into my office for the first time, taking my seat on the House floor, and feeling the weight of responsibility for the voters of my district. It was an unforgettable experience. Over the years, I’ve developed thick skin. I’ve been hit with some of the worst attacks imaginable — but that’s okay. I know I take flak because I’m over the target. Still, watching these new legislators arrive at the Capitol only to be immediately bombarded with such outrageous attacks made me angry. They had barely taken their seats before activists and lobbyists from over a thousand miles away calling them traitors. It’s disgraceful. The people of Idaho elected their legislators to get things done, not to be used as pawns in a political circus designed to generate clicks and fundraising for outside groups. I urge all Idaho Republicans to stand together in unity — for their voters and for the future of our great state.
---

The Thing About Being the Chairman
by Mike Brown
**_“As the Powerful Republican Party Chairman...”_**
I’ve heard this phrase so many times—on the news, in conversations with Kansans, during interviews, and across social media and newsletters—that I’ve lost count. Whether in Topeka, Mar-a-Lago, or Washington, D.C., and it never fails to make me laugh.
Being Chairman is truly an honor. It’s also incredibly challenging and, yes, a full-time job. Somewhere along the way, I must have missed the “powerful” part, but I did manage to find the “servant leadership” handbook—and let me tell you, it’s a real page-turner.
I’m fortunate to have an experienced Executive Director, Dakotah Parshall, working alongside me. He’s smart, tactical, politically astute, and always has my back. People like him are rare in politics, and I’m grateful for our partnership. Together, we’ve been a highly effective team, and Dakotah will always remain my friend and ally.
The Reality of Serving as Chairman
Here’s the part that often gets overlooked: this is a full-time job with exactly zero salary and zero reimbursement for travel expenses. Every flight, hotel, meal, and trip? Paid for personally by the Chairman.
This is something the KSGOP State Committee must reconsider. Right now, the position is essentially reserved for someone who is either independently wealthy or willing to cut corners—meaning they’ll miss key events that require travel. And in politics, one truth is undeniable: if you’re not at the table, you’re on the table.
The Good, The Bad, and The Absurd
Despite the challenges, there are wonderful moments in this role. Nearly every day, I receive messages of gratitude, encouragement, and prayer from people I know and many I don’t. Some arrive as handwritten prayers, others as long notes (in remarkably neat cursive, I might add) from Kansans and fellow patriots across America. Those messages make me smile and remind me why I do this.
Of course, with leadership comes criticism. Some of it is fair—I’m not perfect, nor have I ever claimed to be. Then there are those who treat politics like a game of “gotcha”, twisting every decision into some worst-case scenario to spin as “fact.” But here’s the deal: lies don’t magically become truth through spin. Lies are still lies. And while politics is rough, defamation crosses the line. Thankfully, the courts exist to deal with that kind of foolishness.
Would I Do It Again? Absolutely.
Recently, I was asked if, knowing the challenges and sacrifices, I would serve again. My answer was simple: I would do anything to save or help America and Kansas. So yes, absolutely, I’d do it all over again. Winning with President Trump, expanding our supermajorities in the Kansas State Senate and House of Representatives, and our massive local election victories in 2023 made every sacrifice worth it—100%.
As for whether I’ll run for KSGOP Chairman again in 2025? My answer has remained the same since early November: Yes—unless I’m asked to serve my country in another capacity.
I love the KSGOP, Kansas, and America. I’ve poured my heart and soul into this Patriot Conservative movement, and I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built together. Over the past two years, we’ve proven—time and again—that we know how to run the KSGOP, raise money effectively, and, most importantly, win. Our track record speaks for itself.
What’s Next?
Looking ahead, our top priorities for 2025 and 2026 are clear: taking back the Governor’s mansion and removing Sharice Davids from KS-CD3.
That leads to an obvious and very important question: Do you believe [fill in the blank] can defend our House and Senate supermajorities, win the Governor’s seat, and defeat Sharice Davids?
The reality is that very few Kansas Republicans have the broad experience, the work ethic, the fundraising ability and the proven ability to accomplish these ambitious goals. If you are a member of the KSGOP State Committee, choose the next Chairman with great discernment.
A proven track record is the best predictor of future success—or failure. Do your own research. Don’t blindly trust what someone else tells you. Make calls. Send emails. Talk to the people who truly know the candidates. That’s how you ensure the right leader for the KSGOP.
Final Thought
For now, I remain focused on the work ahead—because there’s plenty of it. Tearing each other down won’t help. Let’s unite where we can and respect our differences where we can’t.That’s called leadership.
And in Servant Leadership resides the real power as the State Party Chairman.
Choose carefully.
See you in Goodland!

clean_body: 🇺🇸Newsletters from Patriot State Chairs | | | | | | | Good Morning Republicans, "A false witness who pours out lies, a person who sows discord in a family." "A person who stirs up conflict in the community" Proverbs 6:19 One of the things I love about my church is the Lead Pastor, I believe, has the ability to connect scripture to development to salvation. Which really seems like a "simple" three step process.... 1. Read Scripture 2. Develop one's Faith 3. Belief in Salvation But our HUMAN tendencies and the enemy seem to derail us as often as we let them. This past week, the sermon spoken was in context from James 5:12 but transitioned into Proverbs 6:16-19 and a bullet point list of what the Lord hates. The interesting reference is that it says SIX things, but then adds a SEVENTH as detestable. As if the SEVENTH is of MOST importance. Do you know people who stir up conflict in the community? People who just want to sow discord in a family? WHY? I listened intently to the sermon and these are the notes that are so profound. Critical Mind vs Critical Spirit A "critical spirit" refers to a negative attitude where someone habitually focuses on finding flaws, criticizing others , and dwelling on the negative aspects of situations , often with a tendency to complain and tear down rather than build up; essentially, it describes a mindset that is overly critical and fault-finding, often to the point of being destructive. A “critical mind” is the ability to think and reason objectively, question assumptions, and make informed decisions. It involves analyzing information, identifying problems, and coming up with solutions. Questioning: Asking questions about information and ideas Analyzing: Examining information, arguments, and theories in detail Evaluating: Making judgments based on evidence, reasoning, and assumptions Problem-solving: Defining problems, generating solutions, and assessing the results Considering alternatives: Weighing pros and cons, and thinking about other possible interpretations Avoiding bias: Being aware of your own assumptions and biases, and applying consistent standards when evaluating sources "Remember, it is sin to know what you ought to do and then not do it." I have been so blessed to connect with many State Chairs from across America. These bold leaders are driving forth a new Republican Party built on grassroots and principle driven leadership and creating the stability to build a strong inclusive party. Here are two recent messages from leaders I respect very much. The America First movement is alive and growing and we must continue our steadfast approach to common-sense governing. We must be leaders who honor the constitution and defend the platform. We must seek out Constitutional and Platform Republicans to be BOLD, purposeful, humble servants of the people. | | Confrontational Politics by Dorothy Moon, IDGOP Chairwoman | The campaign against Proposition 1 in Idaho last year was remarkable. Republicans and independents united like never before to defeat a cynical attempt to rewrite our state's election system. It was a true demonstration of the "big tent" vision that Ronald Reagan championed so long ago. Republicans who might disagree on a dozen different issues came together to fight ranked-choice voting, and the people of Idaho responded by rejecting Prop 1 with nearly 70% of the vote. I’ve been optimistic that this newfound unity would carry through into the 2025 legislative session. Of course, Republicans will never agree on every issue, but we have a tremendous opportunity for respectful dialogue and meaningful debate that can lead to positive outcomes for the people of Idaho. Unfortunately, some organizations aren’t interested in unity — nor are they concerned with the well-being of Idahoans. You may have seen text messages and social media ads recently using confrontational politics to attack good Republican legislators as “traitors” simply because they didn’t support a particular out-of-state group’s pet projects. While it’s important for citizens to hold elected officials accountable, this is not the way to do it. Imagine you’re a brand-new legislator. You spent more than a year campaigning, knocking on doors, and sharing your vision with voters. Maybe you defeated a longtime incumbent, or maybe you won an open seat. You arrive in Boise full of hope and optimism, ready to serve your constituents — only to find yourself targeted by an out-of-state organization running ads that call you a “traitor” to the people of Idaho, before you’ve hardly taken a single vote. Folks, I’ve been there. I defeated an incumbent to earn my seat in the House of Representatives. I remember those early days — stepping into my office for the first time, taking my seat on the House floor, and feeling the weight of responsibility for the voters of my district. It was an unforgettable experience. Over the years, I’ve developed thick skin. I’ve been hit with some of the worst attacks imaginable — but that’s okay. I know I take flak because I’m over the target. Still, watching these new legislators arrive at the Capitol only to be immediately bombarded with such outrageous attacks made me angry. They had barely taken their seats before activists and lobbyists from over a thousand miles away calling them traitors. It’s disgraceful. The people of Idaho elected their legislators to get things done, not to be used as pawns in a political circus designed to generate clicks and fundraising for outside groups. I urge all Idaho Republicans to stand together in unity — for their voters and for the future of our great state. The Thing About Being the Chairman by Mike Brown “As the Powerful Republican Party Chairman...” I’ve heard this phrase so many times—on the news, in conversations with Kansans, during interviews, and across social media and newsletters—that I’ve lost count. Whether in Topeka, Mar-a-Lago, or Washington, D.C., and it never fails to make me laugh. Being Chairman is truly an honor. It’s also incredibly challenging and, yes, a full-time job. Somewhere along the way, I must have missed the “powerful” part, but I did manage to find the “servant leadership” handbook—and let me tell you, it’s a real page-turner. I’m fortunate to have an experienced Executive Director, Dakotah Parshall, working alongside me. He’s smart, tactical, politically astute, and always has my back. People like him are rare in politics, and I’m grateful for our partnership. Together, we’ve been a highly effective team, and Dakotah will always remain my friend and ally. The Reality of Serving as Chairman Here’s the part that often gets overlooked: this is a full-time job with exactly zero salary and zero reimbursement for travel expenses. Every flight, hotel, meal, and trip? Paid for personally by the Chairman. This is something the KSGOP State Committee must reconsider. Right now, the position is essentially reserved for someone who is either independently wealthy or willing to cut corners—meaning they’ll miss key events that require travel. And in politics, one truth is undeniable: if you’re not at the table, you’re on the table. The Good, The Bad, and The Absurd Despite the challenges, there are wonderful moments in this role. Nearly every day, I receive messages of gratitude, encouragement, and prayer from people I know and many I don’t. Some arrive as handwritten prayers, others as long notes (in remarkably neat cursive, I might add) from Kansans and fellow patriots across America. Those messages make me smile and remind me why I do this. Of course, with leadership comes criticism. Some of it is fair—I’m not perfect, nor have I ever claimed to be. Then there are those who treat politics like a game of “gotcha”, twisting every decision into some worst-case scenario to spin as “fact.” But here’s the deal: lies don’t magically become truth through spin. Lies are still lies. And while politics is rough, defamation crosses the line. Thankfully, the courts exist to deal with that kind of foolishness. Would I Do It Again? Absolutely. Recently, I was asked if, knowing the challenges and sacrifices, I would serve again. My answer was simple: I would do anything to save or help America and Kansas. So yes, absolutely, I’d do it all over again. Winning with President Trump, expanding our supermajorities in the Kansas State Senate and House of Representatives, and our massive local election victories in 2023 made every sacrifice worth it—100%. As for whether I’ll run for KSGOP Chairman again in 2025? My answer has remained the same since early November: Yes—unless I’m asked to serve my country in another capacity. I love the KSGOP, Kansas, and America. I’ve poured my heart and soul into this Patriot Conservative movement, and I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built together. Over the past two years, we’ve proven—time and again—that we know how to run the KSGOP, raise money effectively, and, most importantly, win. Our track record speaks for itself. What’s Next? Looking ahead, our top priorities for 2025 and 2026 are clear: taking back the Governor’s mansion and removing Sharice Davids from KS-CD3. That leads to an obvious and very important question: Do you believe [fill in the blank] can defend our House and Senate supermajorities, win the Governor’s seat, and defeat Sharice Davids? The reality is that very few Kansas Republicans have the broad experience, the work ethic, the fundraising ability and the proven ability to accomplish these ambitious goals. If you are a member of the KSGOP State Committee, choose the next Chairman with great discernment. A proven track record is the best predictor of future success—or failure. Do your own research. Don’t blindly trust what someone else tells you. Make calls. Send emails. Talk to the people who truly know the candidates. That’s how you ensure the right leader for the KSGOP. Final Thought For now, I remain focused on the work ahead—because there’s plenty of it. Tearing each other down won’t help. Let’s unite where we can and respect our differences where we can’t.That’s called leadership. And in Servant Leadership resides the real power as the State Party Chairman. Choose carefully. See you in Goodland! The truth shall set us free. Blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood | "Donate" | | | | Weather Update - Lincoln | | Weather Update - Grand Island | | Weather Update - Scottsbluff | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2025 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._

body:
Everything you need to know about fair maps in North Carolina
|

The winner is... **North Carolina! **
A few weeks ago, hundreds of you responded to our poll asking which state you wanted to see featured in our next deep dive.
**By a solid margin, North Carolina was the top choice.** Pennsylvania, Ohio, and Texas rounded out the top selections — we’ll provide updates about redistricting developments in those key states soon.
**For today, our deep dive on North Carolina will cover:**
1. The ongoing attempt to steal a state supreme court seat
2. The fairness of current electoral maps
3. Upcoming redistricting milestones and elections

_**The ongoing fight for the North Carolina Supreme Court**_
By now, you probably know about the outrageous attempts to overturn the results of last November’s state supreme court election by challenging 60,000 ballots after the Democratic candidate, Justice Allison Riggs, was declared the winner.
Last week, the North Carolina Supreme Court issued a ruling that sent the legal battle back to a lower court for a decision, while still maintaining a temporary stay they had previously issued, continuing to postpone certification of the election.
As _Slate_ recently described the actions of the GOP-controlled court: **“The North Carolina Supreme Court Is Coming Dangerously Close to Stealing an Election.”**
Every day that this sham continues, the fate of tens of thousands of votes hangs in the balance as extremists baselessly try to disenfranchise voters across the state.
And make no mistake, this is all part of a long-term effort by map manipulators in the state legislature to tighten their grip on power across North Carolina. The state supreme court candidate who is trying to overturn the election has explicitly cited redistricting as a reason for the GOP to maintain control of the court.
Which brings us to...
_**The fairness of North Carolina’s current electoral maps**_
This section could be one word: **Unfair.**
But we’ll elaborate with a short history lesson.
In 2022, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, won a case in front of the North Carolina Supreme Court that struck down the legislature's gerrymandered maps. It was a really big deal!
But then, just weeks later, Republicans took back the majority on the court and agreed to reconsider the _ruling_. By April 2023, the court had overturned the landmark decision, saying that the judicial branch could not weigh in on partisan gerrymandering.
Given carte blanche by the new court ruling, the legislature quickly went right back to gerrymandering and rammed through a new, highly partisan congressional map that went from a 50-50 partisan split to Republicans claiming 71% of the seats in 2024. In the state legislature, Democrats running for both the state senate as well as assembly won the popular vote, but the extreme gerrymander gave Republicans a supermajority in the state senate and just one vote shy of a supermajority in the state assembly.
The story of North Carolina’s maps is a stark lesson in the ways courts and legislatures can work in concert to create artificial political advantages — [**and the importance of funding the fight for our democracy at the state level across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101518872/526214650/508201740?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_DeepNC_email_20250204-AOTL-Tier1-DeepNC_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250204-AOTL-Tier1-DeepNC_&utm_campaign=DeepNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2NjU2MzU0LTAwZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JYqHg0MMjTWcU7eaUYY0mklsuj2a5e-DrHitazZPt7M=)
_**Upcoming redistricting milestones and elections**_
Historically, the North Carolina General Assembly draws new congressional maps after each U.S. Census. But the recent legal battles described above led to new maps being drawn for the 2024 elections, which resulted in gains for the GOP in the state legislature and three new congressional seats that helped give Republicans control of Congress.
It has been a long and winding road for the fair maps movement in North Carolina over the past few years — with a heightened importance on the current battle for the state supreme court, as future court decisions could continue to shape the state’s maps.
As Attorney General Eric Holder said after the court’s 2022 ruling that reversed our movement’s win for fair maps, **“Make no mistake, this moment is the result of a concerted effort by too many in the Republican Party to bend — even break — the rules of our democracy in order to unfairly gain and then hold onto power.” **
Every day, battles are being fought that could determine whether North Carolinians truly have fair representation in their state and federal government. And every day, we’re working to support these fights by mobilizing grassroots activists in North Carolina and across the nation to fight for fair maps.
**We won’t stand by while the very foundations of our democracy are threatened — and neither can you.[Please rush a donation to power our work today. Every dollar counts in ensuring we have the resources to safeguard our democracy nationwide — and that democracy is worth fighting for.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101518873/526214651/508201740?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_DeepNC_email_20250204-AOTL-Tier1-DeepNC_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250204-AOTL-Tier1-DeepNC_&utm_campaign=DeepNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2NjU2MzU0LTAwZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JYqHg0MMjTWcU7eaUYY0mklsuj2a5e-DrHitazZPt7M=)**
Thanks for being part of the fight for democracy in North Carolina and across the country.
All On The Line

clean_body: We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again. | | | Friend, We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again. It’s time to let RINO senators like Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, Lisa Murkowski, and Susan Collins know that WE MEAN BUSINESS... They need to get on board, or their political careers are over. I am all-in on President Trump’s America First agenda, and I know you are, too. That’s why I’m committed to marshaling all of Turning Point PAC’s resources to mount well-funded primary challenges against any senator who refuses to honor the will of the American people. Today, let’s put them all on notice... Confirm ALL of President Trump’s Cabinet picks OR face certain primary challenges in their next re-election campaign. Our tremendous success on November 5th proves that the Turning Point model works. Making America Great Again depends on mobilizing an army of patriots to knock on doors, make phone calls, and chase down every conservative ballot. We’ve done it before, and we WILL do it again, with a special focus on ousting senators who seek to make a name for themselves by blocking President Trump at every turn. It’s up to you and me to make it clear that We, The People, are tired of the games, the cronyism, and the corporate capture of government agencies. We are tired of our elected officials operating on behalf of lobbyists instead of their constituents. We demand that Congress confirms not just Tulsi, RFK, and Kash Patel but that ALL of President Trump’s picks get confirmed ASAP. Thank you, Friend, for standing with me in support of President Trump. For Freedom and America First, Charlie Kirk Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. name: Joni Ernst [iPhone]
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcvpoaahhcaii05g6l7a1a90fqodc2smoicrvcc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

---
| |

name: Team NRSC
subject: America is BACK – Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The majority of Americans believe we're on the right track — add your voice today!

Friend,

For the first time in YEARS, a majority of Americans believe our country is heading in the right direction. **[52%](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq14oj3q03dihhiadcetr0c7chd62nv24h3ppku8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)** say America is on the right track -- an incredible shift from just weeks ago when nearly **[70%](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z280blj2c6opllqb3lov912chbd118li05rn23po_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)** thought we were in decline.

What changed? **[Strong Republican leadership.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbukvoupshourrnnl8dv440t0patmhcub9qeipc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)**

**[✅ President Trump is already delivering results, with a 52% approval rating--his best numbers in years.
✅ 87% of Republicans are optimistic about America's future.
✅ Even independent voters are shifting away from the doom and gloom of the Left.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf6c7u33iiqsa8npm094v98e9qkrobecgohjnr4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)**

_This is just the beginning_. With conservative policies restoring order, rebuilding our economy, and securing our border, the American people are waking up to the fact that Republicans get things done while Democrats spiral into chaos.

But we need to keep this momentum going. **[We want to know _your_ opinion:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd4js0lshcrlslqednlg74eqvotik0h9lfbcofsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)** **[_Do you think our country is on the right track under President Trump 's leadership?_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl7s4o9jtfli7eg04g9iincibetplm1ajodchrq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)**

******************************************************[YES- AMERICA IS BACK](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjvt2lja91dv9ot3oigvjjdl3jmapjp18lccsjno_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO- NOT YET](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeek4bpnc9qabsda9ogscanhmv80ujh8k6o0va50_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)******************************************************

The fight isn't over. We need every patriot to stand with us and make sure this Republican resurgence becomes a **[landslide victory in 2026.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zealj4hggqt963d94ahtpqam98uveeiq2k5to8c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)**

Thank you,

Team NRSC

******************************************************[TAKE THE POLL>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z29am350ljtjgg1imbivatnt6p9mo1gr688r44n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdieeob2cth2bs)******************************************************

name: The Democrats
subject: Did you see this?
body:
---
Did you see this, Derek? Last week, Iowa Democrat Mike Zimmer won an earthquake special election in Iowa’s Senate District 35 — **a district Trump won by 21 points in November:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250204_2698_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2698_22930333_tQPhpL&akid=2698%2E22930333%2EtQPhpL) Americans are making their message clear: Trump is putting billionaires over working people, and voters across the country are ready to reject him and his MAGA allies at the ballot box. The massive 24-point swing toward Democrats in Iowa’s Senate District 35 shows that Democrats can and will compete in every part of the country. And that’s never been more important than it is right now; we _need_ Democrats in office who will check Trump and his allies’ power in as many cities, districts, and states as possible. That means we’ll need to replicate wins like Mike Zimmer’s all over the country, at all levels of government — but it’s not going to be easy. Take a look at this map: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250204_2698_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2698_22930333_tQPhpL&akid=2698%2E22930333%2EtQPhpL) These are the Senate races happening in 2026. Democrats will be defending some hard-won seats in states like Georgia while trying to flip seats in many states that Trump won. We’ve got our work cut out for us, which is why it’s so important we start building the resources we’ll need _now_ — not just to win expensive statewide races, but to win local and district-wide races all over the map. [**If electing Democrats at all levels of government is worth $3 to you, we’re asking you to make that contribution today. For us to win more races going forward, we’re going to need to build long-term infrastructure to support Democrats nationwide. Your contribution today helps us do just that:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250204_2698_fr&refcode2=2698_22930333_tQPhpL&akid=2698%2E22930333%2EtQPhpL) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250204_2698_fr&refcode2=2698_22930333_tQPhpL&akid=2698%2E22930333%2EtQPhpL)**

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: The Fight for Our Federal Workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Like you, I am deeply concerned by the Trump Administration’s growing attacks on our federal workforce and functioning government. As the daughter of two civil servants, I hear you and I stand with you. I believe deeply that our government is strong when our civil service is strong and focused on delivering services to our constituents. In my years in elected office, I have received tens of thousands of phone calls and messages from constituents—yet I never once received a call asking for fewer government services from my community. I will continue to fight so that civil serva nts can continue the critical work they do—free from attacks from this Administration.
I also know that during this time of uncertainty, you are looking to your representatives for answers, which is why I’m taking action. I have cosponsored the Saving the Civil Service Act to protect some of our most important workers from the whims of this administration and ensure they are serving the Constitution before any one man. And there will be more to come this week.
I will always fight to protect our federal workforce from politicization and manipulation. Will you stand with me and fight for our civil servants? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6796c14ac7ed44b2a08b768b315aa075&_e=m45UISged2EhmtKux8v333jxN43mLnZpB4KEueUfFkPByet0NinBFnJpjVin2_EuMAni9P68cmmIWYnx2nBR4tQdb3h_MnlYuE4a4jgML8zPOEBBV5WfwzR-3ObS52ny6gJhAd431BNvNJnV5xt2i-tZWt3XPDXdIKe6qygIo95JJVIILhwoMNMBwwYJSqy61nB9WfnKTi9WW63IybrmaZ-QEZH92eD40cr_GG_CKKF48FmbUvQRGzGDMmqHQAJ2zTBYcV56V5Uv-8dum5iSZBN3gPRgWThGRI-w5QN-yk74LcX_vp_dcG-fqS8rtynbAtt12aZ2wKDPG9ki8SbqfvlZZALoGu4EVUTLCwcuhuj4DYqoOoSm6_MU51WK7sCQ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6796c14ac7ed44b2a08b768b315aa075&_e=m45UISged2EhmtKux8v333jxN43mLnZpB4KEueUfFkPByet0NinBFnJpjVin2_EuMAni9P68cmmIWYnx2nBR4tQdb3h_MnlYuE4a4jgML8zPOEBBV5WfwzR-3ObS52ny6gJhAd431BNvNJnV5xt2i-tZWt3XPDXdIKe6qygIo95JJVIILhwoMNMBwwYJSqy61nB9WfnKTi9WW63IybrmaZ-QEZH92eD40cr_GG_CKKGyyMFQ5sHU6sPiymCGTdZXJ4v7YDOZE143rnJN4qnLrV70Dw_CXZEb2hWYVci7_xaQ7-cF5nanvS0uG8ZJ7voPD6LwdvUorshMpmHUjWtBlQtOTx0kYL9qI1or_mZtTD7HSdH_B77bOSCiTkr4ad1_)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6796c14ac7ed44b2a08b768b315aa075&_e=m45UISged2EhmtKux8v333jxN43mLnZpB4KEueUfFkPByet0NinBFnJpjVin2_EuMAni9P68cmmIWYnx2nBR4tQdb3h_MnlYuE4a4jgML8zPOEBBV5WfwzR-3ObS52ny6gJhAd431BNvNJnV5xt2i-tZWt3XPDXdIKe6qygIo95JJVIILhwoMNMBwwYJSqy61nB9WfnKTi9WW63IybrmaZ-QEZH92eD40cr_GG_CKKG0xXsR2x33Kqd3WaI2loIDBSl0GkgtJDLbOHUcCwRy0W99fCzEy7EzaChXYa_5OiEZrSoPicUzPSM1R6tXaaJQnY5ynC2wK1bVR_ke4VVFupcqp7Wrzq1legHDHvv7kZNbYasyQdEX7qcwXgYaqsOF) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6796c14ac7ed44b2a08b768b315aa075&_e=m45UISged2EhmtKux8v333jxN43mLnZpB4KEueUfFkPByet0NinBFnJpjVin2_EuMAni9P68cmmIWYnx2nBR4tQdb3h_MnlYuE4a4jgML8zPOEBBV5WfwzR-3ObS52ny6gJhAd431BNvNJnV5xt2i-tZWt3XPDXdIKe6qygIo95JJVIILhwoMNMBwwYJSqy61nB9WfnKTi9WW63IybrmaZ-QEZH92eD40cr_GG_CKKH-B2iCL-LFutXpx-LvWwltu0ldW41f00mgH2JBIWX4W5eY1YpJlGotGyKjH4gabVZi34sHQhF7-6K702ScVfpKIdIOyl4nYoxLBgfU3cH-kZeppggh9hYugWGmFzPhZ_Nn6ZXJw1gig4NKwJ_JxPl7)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6796c14ac7ed44b2a08b768b315aa075&_e=m45UISged2EhmtKux8v333jxN43mLnZpB4KEueUfFkPByet0NinBFnJpjVin2_EuMAni9P68cmmIWYnx2nBR4tQdb3h_MnlYuE4a4jgML8zPOEBBV5WfwzR-3ObS52ny6gJhAd431BNvNJnV5xt2i-tZWt3XPDXdIKe6qygIo95JJVIILhwoMNMBwwYJSqy61nB9WfnKTi9WW63IybrmaZ-QEZH92eD40cr_GG_CKKFxq0nP3Op8DLbwlp-EJub6EI2kSAizVkel-70y7wUJfhMrR13V_X-mSCU9DJEaqEQEp-dos2IHGx0s9tnHegt24-Kj75eLoEQYDvLL2207WfMPjruxiAumKxSLj_kQ0B7BxdVI3I-L3ht-jB6vLujf)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

clean_body: Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Hunter Nation Mobilizes 250,000 Conservative Hunters in Louisiana, Urge GOP Sen. Bill Cassidy to Advance RFK Jr.’s Nomination (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/hunter-nation-mobilizes-250000-conservative-hunters-in-louisiana-urge-gop-sen-bill-cassidy-to-advance-rfk-jr-s-nomination.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=bbef51b8e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/hunter-nation-mobilizes-250000-conservative-hunters-in-louisiana-urge-gop-sen-bill-cassidy-to-advance-rfk-jr-s-nomination.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=bbef51b8e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Robert F. Kennedy Jr., at right, speaks with Sen. Bill Cassidy, a Louisiana Republican, after testifying in his Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor and Pensions confirmation hearing on January 30, 2025 in Washington, DC. (North America/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

The powerful grassroots group Hunter Nation (https://hunternation.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=bbef51b8e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) – the leading conservative hunting advocacy organization in the country, is activating its members in Louisiana and deploying over 250,000 text messages in a last minute blitz to urge their Second Amendment supporters to call Sen. Bill Cassidy, R-La, and press him to advance Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s nomination to be the next Secretary of Health and Human Services.

The Senate Finance Committee is expected to vote on Tuesday in Washington, and Cassidy’s vote could determine whether or not RFK Jr.’s nomination goes to the Senate floor for a full vote or dies in committee.

name: The Flyover
subject: Tariffs Delayed, a McDonald's Nightclub, and Parent Stops a Shooting
body:
The Trump administration on Monday [delayed planned tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPtCAQgOFfAx1mGETZguJr7PZrrzSsM6xcUImybvz3l73-6jd5kvfrPt5Dyml9_g8L-xq3EQGtAlTQjhRSvsZWko_MyEay171xnUNrezl7YAbsALTT2k3mwc4QPnrS2kbSCDL5jwYIrbaIRjcMt0guajAQydyMaIEp1W1vvre01pljvraT92baFpn9XGs5hPkncBA4hLLy-_gkgUNOJwsc6v5aiio7H4l4nS71KhQqH4rCpbSVu6fyTjmno-tFC88lpPyL179mT48_AQAA__9kKVYa) on Canada and Mexico for at least a month while continuing negotiations, while tariffs on China will be implemented today.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuhDAQBb8Gd4fWaxvbhdt0lzYlctg1t5HBEZCL-PuIKG3apzcjzdt9vGepss6veeF0lDYioLsB3sCOlKWeo1WUCjOyUZy0N2EI6JxXjxQ8TeRtNhBxipydNeztkOO7DbpoUJIuGyBY7RCN7hlioVA0GChkouksMMnRtv6jyXo8uNSzPXnrp7aomvavlfK5l7ZRm_dr7PDl76K2RJ_fUqvsg-8szEuW-ssd_3U8E_4EAAD__0NwStM) | |
# Tuesday, February 4, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1789, [George Washington](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGnwR0WDDjYBcVt3OW2W1qTMMSzIsYCNpbffpXVtlt_0jn6P67LFTnx9viPT_It5gUUDFKBVHYJyOlcbBd8JAIyHXntzHgZYRhct_pJ4w3tqBW60Tk0Gm8R785e0KKeaOzYv9cUKKsHAKN7UlMMY9TKqBjMZIRVFLjl0n9m3tpKMZ35RaW_52eX_NraXoX5J2AWMB_H0a9cWy7n2wXMbeUqA56SN_krAubIpTb5JavcC1UOtDVJie6NQld82A9OievFCaseT-T0c9b-in95-A4AAP__3QVdOA), the commander of the Continental Army during the Revolutionary War, was unanimously elected the first president of the United States by all 69 presidential electors. ## Canada, Mexico Make Deals to Delay Tariffs
The Trump administration on Monday [delayed planned tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPtCAQgOFfAx1mGETZguJr7PZrrzSsM6xcUImybvz3l73-6jd5kvfrPt5Dyml9_g8L-xq3EQGtAlTQjhRSvsZWko_MyEay171xnUNrezl7YAbsALTT2k3mwc4QPnrS2kbSCDL5jwYIrbaIRjcMt0guajAQydyMaIEp1W1vvre01pljvraT92baFpn9XGs5hPkncBA4hLLy-_gkgUNOJwsc6v5aiio7H4l4nS71KhQqH4rCpbSVu6fyTjmno-tFC88lpPyL179mT48_AQAA__9kKVYa) on Canada and Mexico for at least a month while continuing negotiations, while tariffs on China will be implemented today. The White House first announced a delay on the proposed 25% tariff on Mexico after President Claudia Sheinbaum [agreed to send](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OpDAQBOCnMZmRaZsfBw4uIZtLL0TGbg998g8Cz7Dz9is236SSkj6V6t9jeViKlJ9_bUJTQ1lAQM8FcKEWbyl-FtV4ExABZYOmG-U0TND3Y7MZgXLsByV00F6vvldBezesrlfrpDvUDZlbEyBU1wPIrkWhg59CJ6QIXmrJlEBPtRzt_0K5bhjip7zxaF1JTTRbrfvJ5B8GM4P5uq7W5dXdJYP5phnMAu6QDOZ6vNLOqz0ohJMn_CJXuLPZesvdRtnyc0PKq30lfuC5l-zPdqspNofx-0Ux0jmMTIlnshR_JtTfLnkb-A4AAP__HaVizQ) 10,000 soldiers to the border to help prevent drug trafficking. Meanwhile, Trump and Prime Minister Justin Trudeau had two conversations Monday, agreeing to pause tariffs following the agreement with Mexico. [Canada will enhance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8GOkfjAWxSULzGXV67pTUJQzwrbCJMEuXvV95-m9tc6RzpfF3mC0mW7f6fVg4tlRkBXQfYgZ0jSf7MVseQmJGN5tCPxg8enRv1Es7WXCN5D945Y9DT1dt-GMGjjekKrCUcNECwvUM0_YnhnKJPPRhI0ZyNssBRWqmn7yJbWzjlT3lxPd3KqnNYWnvsyvxTOCmc2sKL5Hx8CqelrLzxe1c4UVxlk71ValI2hZPr0QIOXavP9XFsZHp2N9ooUteoSkpd5EwfhZOuIT7ekrPsw6gs3FeSX4duf_V4BfwJAAD__wfzYds) northern border security and also address fentanyl trafficking, implementing a $1.3 billion border plan. The Dow made [a significant comeback](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOtCAUBeCngQ5zueAIBcXf2M3fbmkYuYzs4GCU1fj2GzfZcpvTnOQ7OR_34e5TTu_nfz-Tq7EMCNgKQAF6CD7lc9A8uEiEpDg52SlzM9i2HZ-cjQq1tRjV7UEaHlaGToJGE6Q20Rue3KUBgpYtopINgY3BRAkKYlBWMQ0UUi1r81nSu04U81l2WpuxzDy7qdZlY-ofw55hfxxHM74f41Uy7C-aYQ_4G1st40vMfn1RFbUEf4qcdhJfS_CVtmaqc-arC8uRck7brWManrNP-Wet_vV-d_gdAAD__394Wg4) on Monday, recovering steep losses from earlier in the day after news that the tariffs would be temporarily paused.
## U.S. Foreign Aid Agency Locked down
President Donald Trump is ready to [close the U.S. Agency for International Development](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2YzMnQnO4KELW7p2RCY-w7XGjrATlH9f0b3bJ33Se9L7uk03x5HT8uk2sjXkCRT0UoFUevKO43vSjbeBCAgbst2A5mKg74dmtYhXH_qA3mk9aEKaTYBhRjMPnoxWDduTpkDprgfAriV1Dd6ETqEKHq8otCLPNe_td-ZUVwrxnV-0t_e8NdGutT6KwA8Bo4DxOI72PpdERzl_AeM5BYzbs_zI4t5FOr9x4lJ3VzknyUXmJF-0LyRzkGV91sppkc_i2AsYm936x8ExcrkMQqtlcxz_3PW_Fi8LvwEAAP__v-hivw), a primary source of funding for political and humanitarian programs worldwide, according to Elon Musk. _"He agreed we would shut it down,"_ Musk said. USAID, a President Kennedy-era initiative to counter Soviet influence, has faced criticism from Republicans since 1991 for being wasteful and promoting a liberal agenda. In 2023, it spent about $40 billion on various programs worldwide, some of [which have drawn controversy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOnDAMB_CnCVtOxoGDGzJ0Yfu6dkQucSBtIDQxd-LtK9i_xbJs6yfr_-tr_KIQwzb_pJWt-DQiYKsBNTSjoxDPsamc9czIpmJbd6Z_9ti2XbXYnlwN_bNm6mgC6uDp2dfE02_XQvOaqmAvDRCaukU09YPh5V3vazDgnXkZ1QC7ICk__qSwycI-nunN-TGltYp2EdmLMj8UDgqH7dxTkWulcLhghQPgVYzC4Sh640-5OwpOFyHvORctKTot6RqcOh2ik9cfKkvYZkmbXpjcv4OyXLfkhbNej_JX34jkY901zZn5NqaYCusgCocqW7d_QoyhPDvVwLxSiPff8l2Ob4v_AwAA___YLXbL). Dozens of senior USAID officials have been put on leave, thousands of contractors laid off, and employees were told Monday not to enter its Washington headquarters. And USAID’s website and its account on the X platform have been taken down.

Some Democratic Party legislators sought Monday to enter the agency’s headquarters in protest. They were [blocked by officers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u6zAMQOGnkTYHNCn_DRru4i137WgoIRWzla3AUhPk7Yt073yAbzgf5-UcNOl--x828TXmBQG7BrABt3DQ9FqcZR9FUMiKbwca-xG7brCrj46xp2GMBNMF3AXYCRNGmniEkSer_q0Bgms7RGpPAlPkMbZAEJkmMg6Etebj9Jl1r6vE9MoPOU7XvNnk11rvxdA_g7PBua6yakrvZnBe8ya7PIvBOfCmu5Z6hKp5Nzh3LVLfU8Oy5esRamkuKV-_hBvZ6_FqvktQNjjbw_P9qSlp6Qfj4LYF_fVt_evFw-NPAAAA___bTGDj) from even broaching the lobby, and Secretary of State Marco Rubio said he was the acting administrator of the agency.
## List: The Cost of Car Insurance by State
Car insurance [rates rose 15%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gw2IkpKF7jLq_d0pqYIZkVhghIvP77VdJvfa-Ojs7XZbkgR063_7iRayEvoGCUCqQaFo8cj2XovAtEQKYjp89mOk0wjufu7uzVUtDTSgYRFRB66-10ChpC0Npix-5NU6AGPQIY3ZOywU9BK6OCN9aIQZHnlkv_nTm1O4V45BeVfs1bF929tUcV5p-AWcC873sf8s_1WTlRre-PgJnWnPJ2CJhXLJJTfRZMK8mCjaqsGQt5CQoG6Qu_qFRZ22d64CG3XFtXnH_sHCPX01kM6rYhx49A-yvIy8FvAAAA__89gGUU) in 2024, with Americans now paying an average of $2,313 annually for full coverage, while five states see rates surpassing $3,000, according to a data analysis. According to the report by Insurify, insurance rates will [go up another 5% ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u7CAQxfGngW6tYcZfFBS3cbe3TWkRM6wnwsbCZCO_fbTbpz1H-kn_j_t895Jkf_z3G7sa84yA3Q3wBu0cvKRrbnVwkRmZNDsz0NiP2HWDXp0NYGykHpY4MJCNHBENefq0ZBZiLe6lAUJrOkQyDYONYYwGCGIgS6oFDlJzab6y7HXlmK785NIsedPJrbUep6J_CieFk-znd5F4vU6F0-LL7T35fWGFU-Ejl6pw0sWF40dSkrMfVAuPzUt6i_WvwqfD3wAAAP__ANRSdw)in 2025, after jumping 42% since 2022. The most expensive states for car insurance are Maryland at $4,060 (up 53% since 2023), New York at $3,804 (up 14%), South Carolina at $3,393 (up 29%), Florida at $3,166 (up 9%), and Delaware at $3,078 (up 8%). The cheapest car insurance can be found in New Hampshire, Maine, North Dakota, North Carolina, and Ohio, where coverage ranges from $997 to $1,455. The White House first announced a delay on the proposed 25% tariff on Mexico after President Claudia Sheinbaum 10,000 soldiers to the border to help prevent drug trafficking. Meanwhile, Trump and Prime Minister Justin Trudeau had two conversations Monday, agreeing to pause tariffs following the agreement with Mexico. northern border security and also address fentanyl trafficking, implementing a $1.3 billion border plan. The Dow made on Monday, recovering steep losses from earlier in the day after news that the tariffs would be temporarily paused. U.S. Foreign Aid Agency Locked down President Donald Trump is ready to , a primary source of funding for political and humanitarian programs worldwide, according to Elon Musk. "He agreed we would shut it down," Musk said. USAID, a President Kennedy-era initiative to counter Soviet influence, has faced criticism from Republicans since 1991 for being wasteful and promoting a liberal agenda. In 2023, it spent about $40 billion on various programs worldwide, some of . Dozens of senior USAID officials have been put on leave, thousands of contractors laid off, and employees were told Monday not to enter its Washington headquarters. And USAID’s website and its account on the X platform have been taken down. Some Democratic Party legislators sought Monday to enter the agency’s headquarters in protest. They were from even broaching the lobby, and Secretary of State Marco Rubio said he was the acting administrator of the agency. According to the report by Insurify, insurance rates will 2025, after jumping 42% since 2022. The most expensive states for car insurance are Maryland at $4,060 (up 53% since 2023), New York at $3,804 (up 14%), South Carolina at $3,393 (up 29%), Florida at $3,166 (up 9%), and Delaware at $3,078 (up 8%). body:
Complete the DOGE survey today

|

| | | **Waste

Fraud

Inefficiency**

Peter, our House Majority was elected on the back of our beliefs in creating a small government that works for the people of this great country.

Cutting wasteful government spending and slimming down our bloated federal government is no small task, _but it 's what we were elected to do._

I need your help today, Peter. **[Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rdrwKPGl621ipjqAutdS8Qe2d0r2ohfpTqJBRoXCP1vMuHm9HagsX2BXaQJxGIIapAU9pta12cM4C6oWd_su7-CBwvt8nxLhWpg4ful4tQO9UvbAKOebGM0UmWdGCeMjreP1AakXKGKTLBzLKaHYzZHjTw5pZEhrzOaApdmnq2XBNoQUdkd1jbnXzLNcDaVURkOlDLz1Lv9d19Mj7gD2PSsXKK6pv_VMEBjZToUKuFfOV8SMavk5yIX8QyajnKsTQqui3wRX8pS__VFWH3PbjV3Y-qlX5MbNioJJ9XWWhUJQ4sL4ezRhnmopk79ukEG7ikt_wNChamGqgtNLCAGMYyHDxzaF7dJ1pQfekuddvViSNn8DnKISTrVVroOmllLydnRo4ZLHe5FAZh1Pbi0PV8_LtEbaRRDK60AgmYmJDjJ9k9ZcLjNqp2jxiySLI_iOg0qTDyou9sk4cXpx7UWJSLjIOl6nExDJLcKK8Mg03aEDvJseni-Lu8gpXCrMmgSmM9APKSvWV7LWWBT7Wucwg7J_CyVT97Nw4tNLi-Gma9pOJJxZ38M/IdddPOJ-5rfM7hRoZ6KY0OYH8zAF96Jr/5 "Will you take the House GOP Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\) Survey and let me know what you want to see reformed?")**

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Meaningful Ways Moms Can Celebrate Valentine's Day

We love chocolate and flowers as much as the next mom, but this Valentine's Day we want to focus on making a difference. On the
blog this week, we're sharing creative ways to celebrate Valentine's Day that will make a lasting difference in our children's
lives.

Beyond the pink, red, and conversation hearts, we want our children to know what love is and how to live as an example for others.
>From getting involved in our local schools to starting conversation around the dinner table, here are some creative ways moms can
celebrate this year!

The Biden Administration is out; the Trump Team 2.0 is in! Award-winning investigative journalist and Fox News contributor Sara
Carter joins the Moms for America Podcast for this timely episode. We discuss the outgoing administration, the inauguration
events, and the flurry of executive orders that have been all over the news. It has been a busy first few days in office
for President Trump in his second term. We analyze what it means and what moms need to know. Like, share and subscribe.

clean_body: We're sharing impactful ideas for Valentine's and on the podcast this week, Sara Carter joins to discuss the inauguration and the executive orders making the news. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] February 4, 2025 • Newsletter [] [] Meaningful Ways Moms Can Celebrate Valentine's Day We love chocolate and flowers as much as the next mom, but this Valentine's Day we want to focus on making a difference. On the blog this week, we're sharing creative ways to celebrate Valentine's Day that will make a lasting difference in our children's lives. Beyond the pink, red, and conversation hearts, we want our children to know what love is and how to live as an example for others. From getting involved in our local schools to starting conversation around the dinner table, here are some creative ways moms can celebrate this year! Read the Blog [] Inauguration and Trump 2.0 with journalist Sara Carter Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] The Biden Administration is out; the Trump Team 2.0 is in! Award-winning investigative journalist and Fox News contributor Sara Carter joins the Moms for America Podcast for this timely episode. We discuss the outgoing administration, the inauguration events, and the flurry of executive orders that have been all over the news. It has been a busy first few days in office for President Trump in his second term. We analyze what it means and what moms need to know. Like, share and subscribe. name: Medhini Kumar, Evergreen
subject: State action, LNG, energy bills, and more: What we're writing about
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
ICYMI, check out our most recent explainers
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297846/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

Between a record-breaking climate disaster that has left Southern California reeling and the onslaught of threats to our democratic system of government triggered by the start of President Trump’s second term, so much has happened in just the first month of the new year.

**Despite the challenges, we’re encouraged by the many unique opportunities for climate progress, federally and locally.**

As the writing/editing digital lead at Evergreen, my job is to break down these opportunities and challenges for you—our audience. And two-thirds of you who responded to our recent survey said you’re looking to us for content that explains these stakes and opportunities for further climate action.

In January alone, we published five blogs tackling issues like state-level climate action, low-cost solutions for energy grid problems and what Trump’s federal funding memo means for clean energy, climate, and communities.

**Here’s what we’ve been writing about:** |
---
|
* [From Energy Bills to Climate to Housing: How Trump’s Trillion Dollar Funding Cut Impacts Everyday Americans](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297847/87SdQ4wZ)
* [The Most Important Actions States Can Take in 2025 to Protect Climate Progress](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297848/87SdQ4wZ)
* [Meet the Organization Raising Energy Bills Up to 30 Percent in 13 States](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297849/87SdQ4wZ)
* [DOE Studies Conclude LNG Exports Harm Consumers, Climate, and Communities](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297850/87SdQ4wZ)
* [An Inside Look at 2 School Districts Owning Their Clean Energy Future](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3297851/87SdQ4wZ)

|
---
| Have any thoughts, questions, or feedback on these articles? **Feel free to reply to this message or reach out to us at any time at**[**hello@evergreenaction.com**](mailto:hello@evergreenaction.com?subject=Feedback for Evergreen Action)**.** |
---
| Thanks for reading, |
---
| | |
---
### Medhini Kumar
Digital Lead - Writer/Editor
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

clean_body: Our Fight for America's Future Starts Now = Peter I’m back in the fight! I recently announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate—because Mississippians deserve leadership that listens, understands, and fights for everyday people. This time, we’re taking on Cindy Hyde-Smith, and I need you with me from the start. View my announcemet video In 2024, we built a movement powered by thousands of grassroots supporters like you. We didn’t back down then, and we won’t back down now. The challenges we face—affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs, and voting rights—are too important to sit this one out. And already, the first few weeks of Donald Trump’s second term have shown us what’s at risk. Extremist policies that threaten our democracy, attack our freedoms, and put corporate interests over working families are already taking shape. We can’t afford to let Washington be controlled by those who put power over people. Building a winning campaign takes resources, and every single dollar makes a difference. = Can you rush a donation today to help us hit the ground running? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = The road ahead won’t be easy, but together, we can bring real change to Mississippi and America. Let’s get to work. With gratitude, Ty Pinkins * The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta. Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2026. = = Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Juanita, United We Dream Action
subject: We need to have each other’s back, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction
body:
Here’s how we’re fighting back: | | | Peter, as the Trump Administration directs ICE to carry out arrests in schools, restaurants, and even places of worship, **United We Dream Action is fighting back.** Our team put together Know Your Rights resources for immigrant communities across the nation to make sure people have the information and resources they need to protect themselves. We need to have each other’s back, Peter. For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: **Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more.** **[As we work to share information about immigrant rights with as many people as possible, we’re counting on your support to help us spread the word. clean_body: Here’s how we’re fighting back: | | | Peter, as the Trump Administration directs ICE to carry out arrests in schools, restaurants, and even places of worship, United We Dream Action is fighting back. Our team put together Know Your Rights resources for immigrant communities across the nation to make sure people have the information and resources they need to protect themselves. We need to have each other’s back, Peter. For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda will affect more than 22 million people — our friends, families, neighbors, and coworkers. Our team is doing all we can to arm immigrant communities with the resources and tools they need to build a better future in this country. As politicians and judges let us down, we’re counting on the support of this community. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Thank you, Juanita, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | | Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction.org; Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Last month, we said SEE YA to the failed Biden Administration and officially sent Sleepy Joe PACKING. It was a tough four years (to put it lightly) for our country under Joe Biden’s watch, and if you’re like us, you’re not sorry to see him go! Now, President Donald Trump has returned to the Oval Office and is already working hard to restore the Golden Age of America. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=48cfd169971353e2dc0e29304342e6ffc0c368145dd8d2d775cf13c4cc7cfef8b9fc0b23e27337c65945eb2b8606011c966221ef2b9242ebcd4111834b6f846c To celebrate this new era for our country, we released a limited quantity of our BRAND-NEW I Survived the Biden Admin t-shirt! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=48cfd169971353e2dc0e29304342e6ffc0c368145dd8d2d775cf13c4cc7cfef8b9fc0b23e27337c65945eb2b8606011c966221ef2b9242ebcd4111834b6f846c CLAIM YOUR I SURVIVED SHIRT https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=48cfd169971353e2dc0e29304342e6ffc0c368145dd8d2d775cf13c4cc7cfef8b9fc0b23e27337c65945eb2b8606011c966221ef2b9242ebcd4111834b6f846c Repping this NEW shirt is the perfect way to show you’re a true patriot who SURVIVED four years of Biden’s destructive reign and you’re ready for America’s COMEBACK with Donald Trump in charge. But you can’t wait to order. These are selling FAST! And once we sell out, we won’t be ordering more! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=48cfd169971353e2dc0e29304342e6ffc0c368145dd8d2d775cf13c4cc7cfef8b9fc0b23e27337c65945eb2b8606011c966221ef2b9242ebcd4111834b6f846c Please complete your order now to be the FIRST to receive our new t-shirt! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=48cfd169971353e2dc0e29304342e6ffc0c368145dd8d2d775cf13c4cc7cfef8b9fc0b23e27337c65945eb2b8606011c966221ef2b9242ebcd4111834b6f846c CLAIM YOUR I SURVIVED SHIRT Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. # [How Do We Stop the South African Billionaire?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156452170&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDUyMTcwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2ODUwODQsImV4cCI6MTc0MTI3NzA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KyCTj86mtBylx7vBVhFB_xBnFzumh4VrOtKOdqqU9fE)
### Take 30 seconds, demand the Treasury Department comply with the Privacy Act of 1974, and help spread the word--here's how
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Feb 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156452170&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDUyMTcwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODY4NTA4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzQxMjc3MDg0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A57ay4MIa7vTJsSzosISL2IAZ0dyKlOGPPf5HQDty1o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156452170&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDUyMTcwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2ODUwODQsImV4cCI6MTc0MTI3NzA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KyCTj86mtBylx7vBVhFB_xBnFzumh4VrOtKOdqqU9fE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
