| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156452170&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDUyMTcwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2ODUwODQsImV4cCI6MTc0MTI3NzA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KyCTj86mtBylx7vBVhFB_xBnFzumh4VrOtKOdqqU9fE)

After "_How do we stop Trump_?" the second most common question I've received this week is "_How do we stop Musk?_ " As you may know, Trump's Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent granted Elon Musk full access to sensitive Treasury data, after which Musk's cronies blocked out government officials from their own systems. This is blatant corruption. It is a coup. And while we continue to wait for Democratic leadership to act, what can we as ordinary citizens and residents of this nation do? Enter the Privacy Act of 1974 and a thoughtful piece published by my colleague and fellow lawyer [Elizabeth Booker Houston](https://open.substack.com/users/148732932-elizabeth-booker-houston?utm_source=mentions). **Let 's Address This**.
**Earnest Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join 109,000+ fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WV-Fkdxt-VKZ4F9aCVQS15RbKSbWkfiAPqsRfPk9iuI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156452170)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92379786-f117-4cdf-9bdd-e330849afcc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The definitely not unstable billionaire illegally accessing our private data. [Photo Credit: Jim Watson / AFP via Getty]
## Clear Privacy Violations
The situation is certainly dire. Musk, a private billionaire with no official government position, now has direct access to:
* Federal grant and loan distributions
* Social Security and Medicare benefits records
* Government contractor payments, including those that compete directly with Musk's companies

As do his cronies. WIRED reports the mortifying fact [that](https://substack.com/redirect/8400ef1c-7b0a-45f3-943a-72ce747470e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A 25-year-old engineer named Marko Elez, who previously worked for two [Elon Musk companies](https://substack.com/redirect/ce7c9f54-456f-45ea-a0c0-89380ff57063?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has direct access to Treasury Department systems responsible for nearly all payments made by the [US government](https://substack.com/redirect/a3720a17-2b73-48a7-b4f9-30547d2480de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), three sources tell WIRED. Two of those sources say that Elez's privileges include the ability not just to read but to write code on two of the most sensitive systems in the US government: The Payment Automation Manager (PAM) and Secure Payment System (SPS) at the Bureau of the Fiscal Service (BFS). Housed on a top-secret mainframe, these systems control, on a granular level, government payments that in their totality amount to more than a fifth of the US economy.
And, finally, given Musk's extensive foreign ties to foreign nations, including hostile nations, for all we know our data is being shared/sold/exploited globally. This level of blatant privacy violation is unprecedented in our nation's history. What _is_ precedented, however, is illegal governmental use of our private data. Enter the Privacy Act of 1974. My esteemed colleague and fellow attorney [Elizabeth Booker Houston](https://open.substack.com/users/148732932-elizabeth-booker-houston?utm_source=mentions) [writes](https://substack.com/redirect/bf53122f-574d-468e-b490-c79f0483b082?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The spirit of this law is rooted in presidential drama and corruption. It was passed as a direct result of the [Watergate Scandal](https://substack.com/redirect/081d5715-52f1-4c48-8341-616267f774d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) which uncovered the federal government's scheme of illegally investigating and maintaining records about individuals. So in an effort to provide transparency to the public and an assurance that the government would not misuse records about us all, the Privacy Act of 1974 was born.
She likewise posted an excellent step every American should take--and its costs nothing but 30 seconds of your time. To help protect our privacy and demand accountability of Musk, use this template to email the U.S. Treasury Department asap.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WV-Fkdxt-VKZ4F9aCVQS15RbKSbWkfiAPqsRfPk9iuI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156452170)
## Act to Demand Privacy Protection
Email to **[privacy@treasury.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/879f0b15-afe6-48a4-a734-fd632ee303e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **with the following Subject Line __ and full email. Sign your name and contact information at the bottom, and finally, forward this to everyone you know to do the same. Simply copy/paste the below into an email and hit send.

Subject Line: Civil Liberties Complaint

Hello,

I am making a civil liberties complaint under the Privacy Act of 1974, 5 U.S.C. § 552a. It has been brought to my attention that Elon Musk and his associates, under the guise of a directive of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) (an IT office in the White House), have acquired access to Treasury Department Records in Systems of Records as defined in the Act. As an individual covered by the Act, I believe that there may be records about me in these Treasury Department systems, and I am concerned for the following reasons:

1. Elon Musk is not an elected official.

2. Even if Musk were an elected official, the System of Records Notices (SORNs) governing the Treasury Department Privacy Act systems do not allow for disclosure to Musk and his associates per the Routine Uses.

3. Disclosure of personally identifiable information (PII) and sensitive personally identifiable information (SPII) to Musk and his associates would be an unauthorized disclosure and therefore breach of information.

The Treasury Department must (1) quickly investigate what Privacy Act records that Musk and his associates have unlawfully accessed, (2) reveal to the public what unauthorized disclosures were made, (3) stop further access, (4) force any files acquired by Musk and his associates to be returned and/or permanently destroyed, and (5) seek criminal penalties against Musk and his associates for violations of the Act.

Sincerely,

[INSERT NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION]
And likewise, know that we are not alone in raising our voices and demanding accountability. Newsweek [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/c01ed5cb-e6ef-4032-a623-d70817509517?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that several unions and advocacy organizations have already filed suit to stop Musk from further accessing our private information:
> Two unions and one advocacy group have filed a lawsuit to prevent billionaire [Elon Musk](https://substack.com/redirect/eaf6b05b-c3d3-4cff-bf70-5ec8682c3e2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)'s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) [from accessing the highly sensitive U.S. Treasury payment system](https://substack.com/redirect/cb796ace-bceb-4dc8-9449-0956c42f8767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [The lawsuit, filed in federal court in Washington, ](https://substack.com/redirect/ee79ced1-ac41-4a4b-a365-18185b5971ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)argues that Musk's team is using the system in violation of multiple privacy laws, including 1974's Privacy Act, and other regulations that dictate who is authorized to access the network.
These Unions and orgs are The Alliance for Retired Americans, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE), and the Service Employees International Union (SEIU). And while the aforementioned lawsuit names Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the Department of the Treasury, and the Bureau of the Fiscal Service as defendants in this civil suit, the Privacy Act of 1974 allows for the [assessment of criminal penalties](https://substack.com/redirect/d4237338-a826-4f91-ad56-9fef8765a1ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against individuals who illegally access our privacy data and knowingly disseminate that data.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..WV-Fkdxt-VKZ4F9aCVQS15RbKSbWkfiAPqsRfPk9iuI?&gift=true)
## Conclusion
No one act is a magic wand to stop the onslaught of fascism, but collective action is critical to mounting a meaningful response. With more than 100,000 subscribers to _Let 's Address This_, I am hopeful we have at least tens of thousands of emails sent to the U.S. Treasury Department, demanding application of the Privacy Act of 1974. And once you've emailed in your personal capacity, share this on social media with your network, with your family circle, and with your network of influence. And likewise subscribe below to support this advocacy. It is critical we continue to raise our voices to the government to redress our grievances, as the First Amendment allows and protects. Let us do so while we still can.
**Before you go! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WV-Fkdxt-VKZ4F9aCVQS15RbKSbWkfiAPqsRfPk9iuI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156452170)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb59b1c1-1d24-4424-b9d0-f8032796d6bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Newsweek that several unions and advocacy organizations have already filed suit to stop Musk from further accessing our private information: Two unions and one advocacy group have filed a lawsuit to prevent billionaire Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) . that Musk's team is using the system in violation of multiple privacy laws, including 1974's Privacy Act, and other regulations that dictate who is authorized to access the network. These Unions and orgs are The Alliance for Retired Americans, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE), and the Service Employees International Union (SEIU). And while the aforementioned lawsuit names Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the Department of the Treasury, and the Bureau of the Fiscal Service as defendants in this civil suit, the Privacy Act of 1974 allows for the against individuals who illegally access our privacy data and knowingly disseminate that data. Conclusion No one act is a magic wand to stop the onslaught of fascism, but collective action is critical to mounting a meaningful response. With more than 100,000 subscribers to Let 's Address This, I am hopeful we have at least tens of thousands of emails sent to the U.S. Treasury Department, demanding application of the Privacy Act of 1974. And once you've emailed in your personal capacity, share this on social media with your network, with your family circle, and with your network of influence. And likewise subscribe below to support this advocacy. It is critical we continue to raise our voices to the government to redress our grievances, as the First Amendment allows and protects. Let us do so while we still can. Before you go! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Voter Action Project
subject: This constitutional crisis is growing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
This crisis is expanding, folks, not receding. We guess you could call what's happened at USAID, Treasury, and OPM a "successful beta test" in the eyes of the illegal DOGE operation.
Elon Musk's team of private citizens continued their assault on agencies, now turning their attention to the Department of Education [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5125069-department-of-education-trump-musk-doge/] . The acolytes at DOGE are reportedly probing data from the department while it puts dozens of employees on administrative leave, looking to gut the agency even though it would take an act of Congress to shut it down.
Many members of Congress posted videos yesterday, saying their phone lines were jammed. Our message is getting through to them and we need to keep it up!
We're asking again: Call your member of Congress via the switchboard at (202) 224-3121 or find their direct number for the House [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative#:~:text=If%20you%20know%20who%20your,the%20U.S.%20House%20switchboard%20operator.] or Senate [https://www.senate.gov/senators/index.htm] . Call their state or district offices if you don't get an answer in DC. Ask them if they support the President taking these actions and if Congress has given up checks and balances and their constitutional authority.
We know -- none of this directly impacts voting rights. However, the implications of these sweeping and illegal actions seem like the tip of the iceberg -- which is why we're not letting this go or turning away just because it's not our main mission. Our democracy is forged by all of us , so we must fight on these other issues before DOGE turns it's focus onto our fundamental rights, like voting.
Sincerely,
The Voter Action Project Team
Interested in supporting our work defending our fundamental right to vote? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020425_1&amount=15]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020425_1&amount=25]
If you've been watching events unfold this weekend, folks, then you know what we're talking about. If not, here's an overview:
Elon Musk's team of private citizens gained access to the Treasury Department's classified payment system [https://apnews.com/article/donald-trump-elon-musk-doge-treasury-5e26cc80fcb766981cea56afd57ae759] . Musk's "DOGE" team -- filled with non-federal employees and not a department created by Congress or presidential commission created legally -- is now reportedly "turning off" payments Congress approved, line by line. Reportedly the "engineers" accessing these systems are former Musk company interns [https://www.wired.com/story/elon-musk-government-young-engineers/] .
Federal workers blockade the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) [https://dcmediagroup.us/2025/02/02/federal-workers-block-doors-of-admin-building-over-elon-musk-data-breach/] . These workers spent the weekend protesting outside OPM after Musk's team accessed potentially classified data there as well. They reportedly blocked more "data miners" from "DOGE" from getting in the building and taking more information on hard drives.
Now Musk and Trump are trying to illegally shut down USAID [https://apnews.com/article/trump-musk-usaid-c0c7799be0b2fa7cad4c806565985fe2] , the U.S. Agency for International Development. USAID was created by Congress in 1961 as a way for the United States to aid allies around the world. USAID employees were reportedly told to not come to work and USAID's grants around the world have apparently been turned off. Presidents can only be granted "reorganization authority" to close or consolidate agencies by act of Congress , which was last granted to Ronald Reagan decades ago.
None of these things directly impact voting rights. But we're terrified by the implications of these sweeping and illegal actions -- likely just the tip of the iceberg -- so we're putting aside our plans for today to ask you to act. We all need to demand that Congress do their jobs , find out what's going on, walk down to these departments and knock on the door and demand answers.
Please: Call your member of Congress via the switchboard at (202) 224-3121 or find their direct number for the House [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative#:~:text=If%20you%20know%20who%20your,the%20U.S.%20House%20switchboard%20operator.] or Senate [https://www.senate.gov/senators/index.htm] . Call their state offices if you don't get an answer in DC. Ask them if they support the President taking these actions and if Congress has given up separations of powers. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020425_1&amount=25]
No one else can hold them accountable, so we must do the hard work of our democracy before too much harm is done.
Sincerely,
The Voter Action Project Team

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020425_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020425_1&amount=25]

Johnny O on CNN: Trump's Action Dangerous and Illegal
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/Screenshot%202025-02-04%20091205.png]
I continue to speak out against the Trump Administration’s dangerous assault on our democratic norms, the rule of law and the will of the American people.
This morning, I appeared on CNN to discuss the President’s unlawful actions [https://youtu.be/23vMv7WdSNw?si=Zj9u3lHinilGPYcU] that are putting our dedicated federal workers and the vital government services they provide at risk. His unilateral decision to shutter our country’s primary humanitarian agency puts actual lives at risk.
There’s proof that speaking out can make a difference. Twice now, Democrats have stood up for the American people and President Trump backed down – first on his illegal funding freeze, then on his reckless taxes-disguised-as-tariffs.
Will you contribute $10 to help me amplify our critical message and fight President Trump and his non-elected henchmen like Elon Musk? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
I hope I can count on your support as we continue to resist the President’s march toward absolute power.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

Team,

Donald Trump and his MAGA allies think they’ve already won.**

They think grassroots Democrats are too tired, too defeated, and too overwhelmed to fight back. They’re counting on us to stay silent while they dismantle our democracy piece by piece.**

They think there’s no chance that a Democratic Teacher like me can take down their hand-picked MAGA crony, Randy Fine, in this CRUCIAL special election that will set the tone for 2025 and beyond.

But I think they’re wrong. Why? Because I KNOW grassroots donors like you will step up to the plate and help us build the biggest campaign this district has EVER seen.****

# [So -- how are we supposed to live through a coup? ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=156465158&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDY1MTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2ODY0NjIsImV4cCI6MTc0MTI3ODQ2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7q0KORIL1aUHmBCvqWYVF2zvCmjYRMFtAsX5jz7nYvI)
### Let's start to visualize our post-MAGA country right now, while the mess in Washington is still unfolding
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Feb 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=156465158&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDY1MTU4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODY4NjQ2MiwiZXhwIjoxNzQxMjc4NDYyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vJyWyi3YFJRZKT7cmm4D-LzF73yebjRCRJnRH-7iLGU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=156465158&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NDY1MTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2ODY0NjIsImV4cCI6MTc0MTI3ODQ2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7q0KORIL1aUHmBCvqWYVF2zvCmjYRMFtAsX5jz7nYvI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF1bGFueTIxL3Avc28taG93LWFyZS13ZS1zdXBwb3NlZC10by1saXZlLXRocm91Z2g_.rEkAyv0Clw3zy6MI4uW1X6WRWUe-4KSa2ADXZS89KHM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/so-how-are-we-supposed-to-live-through?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

So how are we supposed to live through a coup?
We're only a few days into this all-out assault on our government systems. And I realize I personally need coping strategies.
It's been a challenge. I spend a lot more time just lying on my sofa reading news on my phone. That has it's limits in terms of mental health and even physical health.
I don't want to alarm anyone, but the country as we know it on November 5, 2024 when Kamala Harris was still our Democratic presidential nominee is gone - that country is no more.
I liken it to returning to your home after you've been robbed. There is a feeling of unease. Even if we put everything back to exactly the same way it was when Donald Trump took office, we would not be the same. The confidence in our systems would not be the same. We would - as Americans - fundamentally - not be the same.
As we did with Covid it is time for us to look at how we can build back better, and stronger, and with fairness and integrity for all.
Look - we got into this MAGA mania through certain people in our communities having deep rooted love for ultra rich people and deep rooted hatred for poor people - especially people of color. Add to that hatred for members of other communities such as people with disabilities, or people from the LGBT community. Or people who just had the misfortune of being born in a country other the United States of America and they were so desparate to get here they literally skipped over the steps that are written into our immigration laws. Many of those rules don't work for people, by the way. You know that right - for many people there is simply no way to get through our immigration system within a single lifetime because the immigration courts are so backed up.
But I digress.
The Reverand Dr. Martin Luther King urged us to remain awake through a great revolution.
I urge you not to tune out. We need you. We need you to make those phone calls to your elected officials.
Remain awake. I need you to stay informed. Engage in the solution and not the horror.
Protest if you can. Write letters to the editor.
Root out - who are the shameless MAGAs and who are the spineless Democrats who continue to approve these unqualified cabinet nominees and other aspects of the Trump agenda.
Right now, in these early days, take care of yourself. I'm saying that as much for myself as I am for you. Get sleep - more sleep than usual if you need to. Eat right. Exercise. Again - I'm saying that as much for myself as I am for you.
Start to visualize: what do we want our post-MAGA era in the United States to look like?
And what can we do in our communities to make that happen?
More justice. More respect for every person. Living wages. Nutritious food at affordable prices. Preservation of our air and water. A healthy supply of affordable housing. Healthcare for all that is affordable and available without long waits. Caps on prescription drugs.
We have a Special Election coming up in NY-21. I'll need your help. If you are a voter in NY-21 you probably know that our party leaders have not yet selected a nominee. If you can, and you feel so motivated, please contact your county chair person and put in a good word for me.
I am fundraising - if not for the Special Election, then for the 2026 midterm elections. You can [click here or in the footer ](https://substack.com/redirect/d2c244c9-2312-43ee-90f2-f8b7db11fe4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)if you got this in an email. There are other people who are fundraising in order to run for this seat. I seem to be the only one actually talking about platform and action steps, and on an up-to-the-minute basis.
It's a very serious time. We are living through a coup. But as Bill Clinton said, "There is nothing wrong with America that can't be fixed by what is right with America."
I believe that.
Think about your post-MAGA vision. Think about how to actualize that in your community.
We'll talk again soon.
Paula Collins

_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. If you can, and you feel so motivated, please contact your county chair person and put in a good word for me. I am fundraising - if not for the Special Election, then for the 2026 midterm elections. You can you got this in an email. There are other people who are fundraising in order to run for this seat. I seem to be the only one actually talking about platform and action steps, and on an up-to-the-minute basis. It's a very serious time. We are living through a coup. But as Bill Clinton said, "There is nothing wrong with America that can't be fixed by what is right with America." I believe that. Think about your post-MAGA vision. Think about how to actualize that in your community. We'll talk again soon. Paula Collins If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or click these words to: . ("Subscribe Now" is a great way to subscribe to my Substack!) | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Dan Carr
subject: Funding Students, Not Systems
body:
School Choice

| |
---|---|---
|
# Funding Students, Not Systems
### School Choice
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Feb 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
Are you ready to make a difference? Your vote counts! In this episode, we're diving into the fight for school choice and why your voice matters at the ballot box. Every child deserves the best education, and that starts with empowering parents to make the right decisions for their families. Funding students, not systems is the key to a brighter future, and no zip code should determine a child's success.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8e7b31fe-b17a-40ac-8b62-2b7051ea7822?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But change won't happen unless we show up and vote. Freedom is never more than one election away--will you stand up for education freedom and ensure your vote shapes the future? Tune in, get informed, and help break barriers to expand opportunities! #SchoolChoice #ParentalRights #EducationFreedom #YourVoteCounts #FundStudentsNotSystems #VoteForChange #FreedomFrontline #ProtectOurChildren #EmpowerParents #SaveOurSchools
Dan Carr
(C) 2025 Dan Carr
18237 Hwy 53, Gulfport, MS 39503
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..3Eq907AZtmtxwVhyPNeiiGjQLTJJ7zu-f7UTV5knkwE?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3952b30-fe20-4fe4-9691-5fac77fbf565?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..koiSoqEUZh-bL0f8mAPOLUfCip3G_Xyg1J0mkB3Ch6M?)

| We're going to the White House with President Trump to Protect Women's Sports.
---
| Yes, you read that right. I've been personally invited by the President to join him as he signs an Executive Order to permanently keep men out of girls' sports -- and its all thanks to you.
---
| I'll share as much as I can with you tomorrow.
Just last week, I had the privilege of joining Steve Bannon on War Room. I said it then, and I'll say it again--I'm almost tired of winning.
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fIROc5Xbfl8SqlnMEvYTVmO8FWRtjwzZ7B0zNEbJ8XhoVnNZwybRmjiy27-29Nz99kNP7lWXBmynKXBLRHQIglfRDHmqttFnErUm7inX03_HleGSpBq8tyq74DvkZP37_EZ-Z_EjawnhYr9DScEZejA6uP3cXdJ2y4M8alqwxroDc2ecB736A1PWBDezAiJ2IrpABvRg0Ug=&c=ANsFhH5I25TNTETf7txNOEil-QHi_oXR_JB1q3ilMGTSMMc7lqCZ_A==&ch=-LHA41vOrlrK3la7BFx6-8DDrIsULFldoMo9TLU50E2HymTZ-hO5PQ==)
---
Everything we've fought for is becoming reality.
The media gaslit us. The government lied to us. But we never gave up.
And now, we're taking another step forward--for our kids, for our future.
Thank you to everyone who made this possible.

---
| | [SUPPORT THE MANDATE](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fIROc5Xbfl8SqlnMEvYTVmO8FWRtjwzZ7B0zNEbJ8XhoVnNZwybRmjiy27-29Nz99kNP7lWXBmynKXBLRHQIglfRDHmqttFnErUm7inX03_HleGSpBq8tyq74DvkZP37_EZ-Z_EjawnhYr9DScEZejA6uP3cXdJ2y4M8alqwxroDc2ecB736A1PWBDezAiJ2IrpABvRg0Ug=&c=ANsFhH5I25TNTETf7txNOEil-QHi_oXR_JB1q3ilMGTSMMc7lqCZ_A==&ch=-LHA41vOrlrK3la7BFx6-8DDrIsULFldoMo9TLU50E2HymTZ-hO5PQ==)
---
| I'll be candid--we've been a bit quiet on the fundraising emails because we've been working overdrive to deliver on the mandate the American people gave us by electing Donald Trump.
It's been full-blown trench warfare against the deep state. They're pulling every trick in the book to stall President Trump's agenda--delaying confirmations, distorting the truth--but we will not relent.
Now, I need to keep APP fully funded and fighting. While we've been battling every day, we've got major initiatives ahead that need support--all while keeping the lights on.

---
| | SUPPORT THE MANDATE
---
| Can I count on you?
Tomorrow, I'll have a report for you--and for the rest of the world.

Sincerely,
---
| |
---
| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project
---
| | [Join APP's Big Family](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fIROc5Xbfl8SqlnMEvYTVmO8FWRtjwzZ7B0zNEbJ8XhoVnNZwybRmstL6pN6dfi1jGzgohYCbExih-gzy69ojPOcA1fXHsGde7wd20-r__Z6p6VGreL4KmXpn7wgjxHhvrQ147OMI__fFQiwkzrc1JAjGg6I51bSCVCqBbyWDrZzZ1AHZGmLuXhw7N8frgMcWUC8l4OZUrhhWJAkYQZENwg_7QZn0bRBOZaYPAtF9wY=&c=ANsFhH5I25TNTETf7txNOEil-QHi_oXR_JB1q3ilMGTSMMc7lqCZ_A==&ch=-LHA41vOrlrK3la7BFx6-8DDrIsULFldoMo9TLU50E2HymTZ-hO5PQ==)

name: Left Action
subject: BREAKING: RFK Jr nomination for HHS Secretary advances to full Senate vote. Tell the Senate to vote NO!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell the Senate to REJECT RFK Jr. for Secretary of Health and Human Services](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0fe5ee0-0651-4ccd-ac37-12b83426eadd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccdc817b-cad9-434f-a55f-271663821510/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Senate Finance Committee voted on party lines to advance RFK Jr's nomination to the Senate floor. Now the full Senate will vote on whether to put this anti-vaxxer conspiracy theorist in charge of our nation's healthcare. [**We need the Senate to REJECT this nomination**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b5a6e2d-66d2-43bb-b5ca-d0e9fbf5b10e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It can be done if just four Republicans find their spine and vote with Democrats to stop RFK Jr from wreaking havoc across the healthcare spectrum. Putting RFK Jr. in charge of Health and Human Services would give him a powerful position to drive down vaccination rates, and unleash new waves of measles, polio and who knows what else. We can't afford to put him in charge of our health care. [**Sign your name to demand the Senate REJECT RFK Jr for Secretary of Health and Human Services >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92e8a439-3364-441c-a090-0915cca74028/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b5e136a-d9da-41b3-87eb-108897ce1a9d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

name: Joni Ernst - iPhone
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/d4DbVGueJVJ-cQ5ay2e5fA~~/AARclBA~/OHmmlNEJRUeACYH9m8JUiQx3z25cmawmn-xuSAlK2YSlV7WhEhzdnA-ZGryQGzCz8gqNiZDv_AyWqZJDJNNjg5emCBfcory8_VZD05PugkDD-YVvW0-na29ZdvYOLyz8tyAyTWy5YlbpRNokyckaXhM8eGfE8P3twIvaDNVhsK8wxvdYeXVKE8sK4YPqkZevR5ssJqC0VP4pig775v03yCs2kVKQOX9tDCKcVbOx18kaBwDRqjeV-ewET6uPr8zWSwTnon7Vig8T-Ot1q_o_hdjQ4GjBG27TTprRlR55NioYfJZC5a4nbxVJ-xBaonYp8SBJ7pDfPIizqxzcYzhuObrVYesOMWRih3lO1BaUKqE~ "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

name: Wes Moore
subject: Building our economy
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101540192/526270013/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGYxYTY3YS0xN2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuO8gsOLOK5xT-AMk-BYBnVSj7te5hmzl32S9CmTT-A=&emci=97f1a67a-17e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=9df1a67a-17e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Going into the 2025 legislative session, we are up against a tough challenge. We’re facing the worst budget crisis Maryland has seen in decades while learning how to navigate the new Republican-controlled federal government. This year, I developed a legislative agenda that aims to create an economy that works for everyone. **I’ve introduced nine bills this year to introduce this critical mission.** These policies aim to create new jobs, build new pathways to employment for workers of all backgrounds, and ensure that more Marylanders can access work, wages, and wealth. Whether we do this by making Maryland’s public schools the best in the country or elevating apprenticeships — we will ensure that Marylanders are equipped to tackle any challenge that faces them. We still have a long way to go, and there’s always more work to do. Elevate, Wes

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: Fight MAGA attacks on federal workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | As Donald Trump tried to illegally freeze federal funding, Virginia’s Republican Governor said, “President Trump is doing what an executive should do at the beginning of a term.”
And as Elon Musk illegally attacks the thousands of federal civil servants that call my area of Northern Virginia home, Virginia Republicans are cheering.
**Our first chance to show Donald Trump and Elon Musk that we’ll fight back is to win 2025’s Virginia House of Delegates election - and I’m running for Delegate in a red-to-blue, toss-up seat that Donald Trump lost.**
We’re _FIRED UP_ to defend and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates - and the 22nd District is one of the best pickup opportunities in any state legislature _nationwide_.
**[Show that we won’t back down as Trump and Musk attack. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3d-KWm5rOXMU9obrmb7z5EG0Nsmkm77EXnqlHCQW7oZQTJ_KYrQlsIxfmDq__lHogbX9labcNJks2MaESnV_qokY-z4agr121-zhU_Yp8Mzzqb8-a6Nf2l3UmtPtsdbvtq2PA5enFzRktfbDO8frNJYkcwmSCle5r2Finr1dnxRsExcO-BViFSePjMcbRHGQ-b7nHtoG07WhahSkp_GZY4M6cBEGUCoQcE6XKs1A6A8FoRuIQ4J2YhKAjJK7b2dl8Rmkpk9QsvYfZsO6vNZ_o2s5USKy6x3PCripDOpUjIVsnMK8n8PK2mqLzdlCyeyKRFwVvPBdMdGWVSsAZcsM1cFlkILAfaEO4kFk_f2qN5BNW5HviQVhvTFIT2g6yakti/4dq/gGOVOaycQtyDI55YYQ1QRg/h5/h001.qUY9D9vAfUzwqPIDhYvVNoKm1g8ZXXUm2OCpMY2uEHU) [Other Amount](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqXiFLTfE84qVLAXs2FOKPu_Yj-nnaEU-jS6n8IKNaAVKCvI4Hnh7OKPA9nM3tZSrVf9ZHI_Fg6qYXsiQSpCGB3I-zwkbgvz87CH21A7ZjIglLjFBySfVZXqEdGa9twB8vFx-OHAdRzUzZ2W6sgFHnntdYEE2QJfaC9pWeR5PVLZ-V3_7yNzrYZPOQ_L33E7vf-GqxxsEjEHtai3IdfHYN-wx409Tt4SkUHxN-HkWYlCqqViZoUdBV9AubgoU2w-gHmX6hqHeQiyDln3XMEgiF-eHM6Gtec1PSkxv2DsH6Fjm8BT-gSoWNK1sEMdO2rzk9w/4dq/gGOVOaycQtyDI55YYQ1QRg/h6/h001._IffrZxexhxiZsm8zBjSnqFj4eOd-XhzYHrr8L1nuzg) This fight is personal: in my previous service as a Delegate, I carried the law allowing Virginia teachers, firefighters, and other civil servants to unionize and collectively bargain for the first time.
I delivered the Spanish response to Donald Trump's first State of the Union as the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia General Assembly.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqaDw67nRgWZBbP1mwHT2H1CWckpgvY_hxFGCbry0P7XTOBdwmMsBBk18TNj-b3qHvm_0ZkNjMBOoyahsBvIoWSkQs5RszJh0LDF1O55oEcmwwEnUEY2qc_tpzMbDqGIC6Aet-ESobfeUlwvbrEsNhsj7vRhzbu72n9ZcyVQn1ytD5WYMp_8AM13MrEx9ElauAsUHXpEIqeuqd7GsSxzQkb0J6YXTMzISctrF2OjRWZUDu_HW2aM0NY43qbLLj6gthgsrpxdzOiI5WToF-o9fHdkVK4TWZaMYM9VcunGWCj65Ge-_BZ0wgi5cWb2o_WejRw/4dq/gGOVOaycQtyDI55YYQ1QRg/h7/h001.NQ1lbOw5VhpM8HoViTsqaNvUezsd4TVY3uPRi2_-gOU)
Now, as Donald Trump returns and attacks workers, I’m running again for Delegate to fight back.
**Republicans nationwide will pour _millions_ into Virginia’s elections this year - but we know we can count on YOU to fight back.**
**[Defend our civil service and stand up to the Trump-Musk attacks. Deliver Republicans a key defeat in 2025 by donating to my campaign today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqfvhR8V0EMtNSXPCGy5xZcFU3aYkeLN8lzxgXAGmRRRIE7ekodZCg_cCajKbgEvZDRHoCybxw18-Ncs5N1-7VFUIeZ91OOPaWVMizy1155A0_meYvmmZMZ-Z5zR6zqTlnX4qBbEbDF2z2bzzcixyaoyC7m4WG4jqwhWU-8MocY2V4w_cKQrHkE9wWs1PbBHn43WMCpzZkfxGwnuIPlMC7jkMo4mvCMz-Ialh_00MXB5t1xnQrPsZyksjHPAX5UPFNc-5Qz6SDyvRh6NwzFtBvfDD-Uoxop8X-y80Z_jX4GqHZtyp3vsU2LVE3nB_LaeR9g/4dq/gGOVOaycQtyDI55YYQ1QRg/h8/h001.wQqUHYIjAYut2WTMP1N2iD9OzmAV-81W4qCUYMrrRvA)**

Elizabeth Guzman

Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A8QvOmC-FYZWd74fTGmSaa0ckN9AJlsQ0F1gMbFoNxF0gCtqock7VFQcpIZz2p3AOwVqCvVJgDpcZ0J0F2OH563RE_wF019eMflhSBZOijxIBvift-Trj45nRWFmwswrrexu30qxOnZXXC3ng60O9RrF-5AiI65SBw50tNcIFg0DwuiWBJJJgUSXzNIF5BEnT2z8gd1H7mvAwbcfQ-VerwsuqfdATVdTgIb256nLWPGbdE3Em9Yc4TiEGDR-NHGV4HVQAKV2P7FsF49II0_aXhr/4dq/gGOVOaycQtyDI55YYQ1QRg/h10/h001.tHjib9O5JH1w7cTVS6MQQfskU1kr2S3zOtm75R2ZKLc) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Our first chance to show Donald Trump and Elon Musk that we’ll fight back is to win 2025’s Virginia House of Delegates election - and I’m running for Delegate in a red-to-blue, toss-up seat that Donald Trump lost. We’re FIRED UP to defend and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates - and the 22nd District is one of the best pickup opportunities in any state legislature nationwide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This fight is personal: in my previous service as a Delegate, I carried the law allowing Virginia teachers, firefighters, and other civil servants to unionize and collectively bargain for the first time. I delivered the Spanish response to Donald Trump's first State of the Union as the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia General Assembly. Now, as Donald Trump returns and attacks workers, I’m running again for Delegate to fight back. Republicans nationwide will pour millions into Virginia’s elections this year - but we know we can count on YOU to fight back. ****Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. | | Dear Fellow American, Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation's children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **" Classic Children's Literature."** Perhaps you've had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I 'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**" Classic Children's Literature"**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/vEYWsaaSWZN9b5Vyy-pUkExXT_MuguxCQaEN2pPbG681OuOBQr2e2U4dP7mVf3bRyIx8dMzDfijhp83xgXXhKv18gWUFeOwBjCKx7JJqyt_Yly4REMMoZg3ELDaXOj-cjsA88EyZ-1syTpmrPHPwDKx0TdAx89p5MqgFdylGu_VlfbZOwT_svNuWwNQRsYJ7FO3ffe9rAT4Oxxm7PVoudjvXmhKbce2ZyXx99DPIcC8I5qhYgQuocpZoFb92Sb4fsskgjDHrxiPlahTUVqMGiZAY1Smpmms7QgAImmeEXkbDV2Bs9f9T2VRRN4zsO6IK8KIp0hzC6fz9A4pLBqQnS-ruPkdshGhOJgPUd6zWXESG2Esmqp3hyho8QRhzk9Szyom6n3u806nmXSTLWd9wDTz-X0MKH9-7z7h5Y7svDVNhjsR5J911VgiFo0kT2CMTazMgKUwcf9cyNTvnT3Tv5dHDJzJAPzbfFNae3V3iEoaZM2i_8DjhATEiqABj/zMti4Rm2SvVnj8ID0-7110qcEKIrf509/5) explores some of the greatest works of children's literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.

| [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/6Do93eFFFDPJU6JEmaV0oDSx2C-W6gl5NQcb21MfTPYeDpqYIH7_RlY-qFFdKyMvtJH4b-8Igf5huAmKHEzeoFaT4V60AweRaszkALsQvnsc0C25IildqqDY0Gum_rEKxuZCVqHklZs1OMjAZmtqO6sA8LmlaF-wawr2kuZxmgL2MSpae4bGdZVbA12Sm2xIOCGHgSkTdvI_xYuzjJtJIt5JHUHWP5oAmr7T3AUTSeJTYUOZJHxy_GjD7x1ugwE-z7D_pTKxksxcnOd7SWpGaBZ3PKeLj_L329v-cQ9D6VRGMw5aieLmbCanSkYs7p0xGu0bHSEmg0oExevq0-ihhm6GkZK9WGfwUwW6aBfnV9RS_tbAPLlJGeMc5xU8wi-lScYhClYqO2WdRCGe4Tf7Ks4xHMCwRsXuHI5JgybRa7EZj8qlf2rEon6DCAj72CXddx0M5CybKCN6_BnH3KlAElnRSKXm5pwBp-GNL0G6DjrDY3PggO8x8fM1QsaD/OaPDFvjCpY9AC5LApH_TQ1VtFwKWoUml/5)

| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/GPKP5w-m14WxQ40EuFo-EUGpMLBTCRGHOy3iTgiQqdTafOYDm31BJVRQJRJUKFluCXHZXKN_HGqEnkMOp6JVtJ-Jfri6ibib1Gg3XMroY4rO2IRqVoBOInUduEmSt0uBF1U7Gyb-LO3U63nBiUg2WtUnXNPKtC8aKRGXBJhMwMJiENA4W9mQRGMumKc3AUkH35ciUmxzZfO3JbPqzkFBApY55oUO3tQHrD77ex_iYGpqVCyyOmlLkY2G_ZBTyQraLU_EZwvl4NDFXzu6_SdIMpWuK845WXQTYrU7CqtqWh3tJYlB6TnxB25RzGUVfA6jsDCqR_ghOQPepOYlkY-s2XhU3nTGAqRnc4XT4gchdX0V553jos5gpfOBjrLSt206LuGdA57sTtyAKLTCtYfX0po50qOBhpCRW7AHffbpMpRf5vUQ6cYdgDjHE5-3kK-WsYZXaE8tIuwdfLv2g1ugvyereQ_xlsld1FuJX8994lzpqcJmyYTNMKRSVDTP/Jtxm2VSSSk0qiuHFtomNQ6dwPQ89ruF1/5) And when you do, you'll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. clean_body: We’re running out of time to stop this | | | | | | | RIGHT NOW: President Trump 's second administration is being sabotaged right under our noses. The same far-left lunatics that we fought so hard against last year are currently carrying out their last-ditch effort to stop President Trump once and for all. AS WE SPEAK, they are even going so far as to DE-CERTIFY President Trump's landmark political victory and install Kamala Harris as PRESIDENT! If they're successful with this UNFAIR AND ANTI-DEMOCRATIC PLOT, the voice of every single MAGA voter will be completely null and void. Everything we fought for will all have been for nothing. We don't know about you, but House Republicans aren't willing to let this happen. body:
We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again.

|

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=869761b55d3240a19c5b8b67b93e5da2&_e=onGNdO3SmzVjF0NNZSNXyBsemiiZz8oQBjzE8pkw6gtz6Nv-cAO3nH3c1e9f0X_T-Id5eKpjPMrMMYHuo6Ai0_KZUohDhFiwsMgURAPDUMb6efkSW-_KRh-EeATWvMjoZHB6-s6oPW5Actv0GzgZH1Aolwrvzx2MdWVjc6MKfnR9CMi5pDGCgm2MRq_JsZx_oOFxCz1SEaro7FrYXEPv_e6yiqaumtwbD25WDmx11AmjEfCw-QpW8HyP_jBK3_IaMqYkZvKlMW0FlRmwaAX_5w%3D%3D)
Friend,

We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again.

It's time to let RINO senators like Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, Lisa Murkowski, and Susan Collins know that WE MEAN BUSINESS...

**They need to get on board, or their political careers are over.**

I am all-in on President Trump's America First agenda, and I know you are, too.

That's why I'm committed to marshaling all of Turning Point PAC's resources to mount well-funded primary challenges against any senator who refuses to honor the will of the American people.

Today, let's put them all on notice...

**Confirm ALL of President Trump 's Cabinet picks OR face certain primary challenges in their next re-election campaign.**

[Let the RINOs know you are 100% committed to Making America Great Again by donating $10, $35, $100, or even $500 today toward these primary challenges. Click to donate now! >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=869761b55d3240a19c5b8b67b93e5da2&_e=onGNdO3SmzVjF0NNZSNXyBsemiiZz8oQBjzE8pkw6gtz6Nv-cAO3nH3c1e9f0X_T-Id5eKpjPMrMMYHuo6Ai0_KZUohDhFiwsMgURAPDUMb6efkSW-_KRh-EeATWvMjoqqwEc5T_3Ugfi9hZYXA2R_SVQyvJACAKoMDve6T6X1NaleQ1fwJZrgCECO-j97aOcOaOIVpjLxfHieGlBH4wQkcJ7FIhFsjBztYz1-xgEBW_wE-oRwH5gdk_34T3G23209FyT2FlnhnNlarF8NVcUQ%3D%3D)

Our tremendous success on November 5th proves that the Turning Point model works.

Making America Great Again depends on mobilizing an army of patriots to knock on doors, make phone calls, and chase down every conservative ballot.

We've done it before, and we WILL do it again, with a special focus on ousting senators who seek to make a name for themselves by blocking President Trump at every turn.

It's up to you and me to make it clear that We, The People, are tired of the games, the cronyism, and the corporate capture of government agencies. We are tired of our elected officials operating on behalf of lobbyists instead of their constituents.

**We demand that Congress confirms not just Tulsi, RFK, and Kash Patel but that ALL of President Trump 's picks get confirmed ASAP.**

[Your gift of $100, $50,$35, or even just $10 will help me and my team hold RINO Senators accountable. As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. clean_body: We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again. | | | Friend, We did not come this far just to let America Last senators stand in the way of Making America Great Again. It's time to let RINO senators like Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, Lisa Murkowski, and Susan Collins know that WE MEAN BUSINESS... They need to get on board, or their political careers are over. I am all-in on President Trump's America First agenda, and I know you are, too. That's why I'm committed to marshaling all of Turning Point PAC's resources to mount well-funded primary challenges against any senator who refuses to honor the will of the American people. Today, let's put them all on notice... Confirm ALL of President Trump 's Cabinet picks OR face certain primary challenges in their next re-election campaign. Our tremendous success on November 5th proves that the Turning Point model works. Making America Great Again depends on mobilizing an army of patriots to knock on doors, make phone calls, and chase down every conservative ballot. We've done it before, and we WILL do it again, with a special focus on ousting senators who seek to make a name for themselves by blocking President Trump at every turn. It's up to you and me to make it clear that We, The People, are tired of the games, the cronyism, and the corporate capture of government agencies. We are tired of our elected officials operating on behalf of lobbyists instead of their constituents. We demand that Congress confirms not just Tulsi, RFK, and Kash Patel but that ALL of President Trump 's picks get confirmed ASAP. Thank you, Friend, for standing with me in support of President Trump. Folks — Donald Trump’s federal funding threat is real, and it's urgent. If a federal judge allows him to impose this, Arizona's working families and essential programs like education, SNAP, and Head Start are on the chopping block.

Make no mistake, this is an all-out assault on Arizonans who rely on these safety nets. **That’s why our elected Democrats are fighting back. **

AG Kris Mayes is taking legal action to stave off this disaster. Senators Mark Kelly and Ruben Gallego are sounding the alarms in Congress. Our team is fighting nonstop to ensure these dangerous cuts don't devastate our communities. But to win this fight, we need you. **[Can you chip in today? If a federal judge allows him to impose this, Arizona's working families and essential programs like education, SNAP, and Head Start are on the chopping block. name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: Our candidates are setting the record straight
body:
We've endorsed Democratic pro-choice candidates who will never shy away from holding their opponents accountable. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101544925/526281515/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE205_20250204_RFKOppo_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055660&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWIwZThmNi0xY2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yWlqEpBQnPZA5kfVFrhrVyrnZxLZGD3MyzQcd68tqao=) Peter,
Republicans are trying to hide their dangerous anti-choice agenda, but the Trump administration's plan to ban abortion access was on full display during Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s confirmation hearing for secretary of Health and Human Services. And it was EMILYs List women who asked the tough questions and exposed just how extreme this administration truly is. [**Will you help Democratic pro-choice women take power back from anti-choice Republicans?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101544928/526281517/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE205_20250204_RFKOppo_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055660&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWIwZThmNi0xY2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yWlqEpBQnPZA5kfVFrhrVyrnZxLZGD3MyzQcd68tqao=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101544931/526281519/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE205_20250204_RFKOppo_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055660&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWIwZThmNi0xY2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yWlqEpBQnPZA5kfVFrhrVyrnZxLZGD3MyzQcd68tqao=)
---
When asked about protecting access to the abortion medication mifepristone, RFK Jr. didn't just dodge the question — he echoed the rhetoric of extreme anti-choice groups and hinted that he may order the FDA to withdraw its approval for the safe and effective drug. He also refused to give a real answer about how he would handle The Emergency Medical Treatment and Labor Act (EMTALA) — a federal law requiring doctors to provide abortion care in medical emergencies.

RFK Jr. made it clear that, regardless of his prior stances on abortion, he's now more than willing to enact Trump's dangerous anti-choice agenda. **But the EMILYs List women on the two U.S. Senate committees didn't let him get away with his bogus non-answers. Here's what they said: **

"It is hard for me to respect people who won't give a straight answer to what they think on this issue in particular ... What is clear to me is that you [RFK Jr.] and President Trump are dangerous to women's access to mifepristone."— **Sen. Tina Smith (MN)**

"You [RFK Jr.] did not seem to know anything about EMTALA, even though I raised it with you during our meeting last week...Your lack of understanding really, again, was very concerning." —** Sen. Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE)**

"If President Trump orders you [RFK Jr.] to take action to make it harder for women to get direly-needed health care, you will follow his orders." — **Sen. Maggie Hassan (NH)**

We're laser-focused on supporting the women who will call them out and set the record straight. We've endorsed Democratic pro-choice candidates who will never shy away from holding their opponents accountable.

Trump to sign executive order to keep biological men out of women's sports

President Donald Trump is expected to sign an executive order to keep biological men out of women’s sports, OutKick confirmed on Tuesday.

The executive order will come on National Girls and Women in Sports Day on Wednesday, which celebrates female athletes across women’s sports and those who are committed to providing equal access to sports for all females.

Trump's Dept of Education reverses Biden's Title IX rewrite: 'Common sense returns!'

On Friday, President Donald Trump’s Department of Education told K-12 schools and higher learning institutions that Title IX protections will be recognized on the basis of biological sex, undoing former President Joe Biden's 2024 rewrite.

"The Biden Administration’s failed attempt to rewrite Title IX was an unlawful abuse of regulatory power and an egregious slight to women and girls," Craig Trainor, acting assistant secretary for Civil Rights under the Trump administration, said in a statement.

name: New Dems
subject: We’re waiting on your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
RE: Adding your name to Save Social Security

| | Hi team,

We reached a few weeks ago after news broke that **Trump’s mass deportation plan could drain more than $20 billion a year from Social Security.**

**We know** that Social Security is a lifeline for millions of Americans.

**We know** that Social Security cuts will result in vulnerable Americans having to choose between life-saving medications and paying their bills.

body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/BH5CBFciGE-b4C-TW5xaxU0R__BEVO_8i6LSfUs9kEU7PFKzV8stc0uKLIqx60P_y7P2IWXWpD6GeMVexwgFTeX7fTQC4RXtuVthRVuay8FOZgE0KWH4PN6BssU2SCpNHfYMJ8ePCD0NcluKZybpx_optOS-O-u4aSNyoYIUJWnbw6fIqO1ktyURA_gk-mMZHh6bIdTA8Nx08N-uRA5oUzKu8Y8kj40npAsZGBBAOkp-n96_uS0CLTvG4B2HJlmb8eBuF28Gn8Lhvlm2PSHVOZErnO6kVt6UORo8JugspvkljF81cK513QMB0Qho7mLBq8O7kwNoWvvjB78HpLM27AxagqyxiAgkv0Tq_tWNQzq7b_KHsc0NQXCt2LNKXIWTjnNSR-xo2uQwIsrajni09TdicHxZawbIHCYhOZNjP0vWRdj2oypo8DZWykLxpjF5Q6xsWidepOlNkgBQ-SGNCMkzxikBhQAQCGRfrIF5Ej8xTi8n1leMfSWKxuoRZtqU/kJdplwShS8hiRwOElF4AHe622P_bq06_/5 "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. * * *
Look, we’re deeply concerned about the possibility of RFK Jr. as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
* He claimed vaccines can cause autism.

* He says that wireless technology can cause cancer and so much more!

body:

body:
Here’s what we do next.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101545613/526283532/1328794144?refcode=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMjRlNDExLTFlZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ODx8VslZ_DZ1Slp8pHglxdugu8qA4u8XG81au9FjvuI=&emci=c537a553-92d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)
---
The final piece of Trump’s Big Oil takeover is in place. Last night, the Senate confirmed Chris Wright (_a fracking CEO_) to head the Department of Energy. With this vote, Trump has the go-ahead to _“drill, baby, drill.”_ **[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help elect climate champions who will fight back against Trump’s anti-climate agenda?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101545614/526283534/2105508926?refcode=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMjRlNDExLTFlZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ODx8VslZ_DZ1Slp8pHglxdugu8qA4u8XG81au9FjvuI=)** Chris Wright’s confirmation marks the third Big Oil lackey for Trump’s fossil fuel dream team: 🚨 **Lee Zeldin (EPA Administrator)** — who has spent his career dismantling environmental protections — will weaponize the EPA to serve polluters. 🚨 **Doug Burgum (Interior Secretary)** — whose deep ties to Big Oil guarantee reckless drilling on public lands — will oversee our natural resources. 🚨 **Chris Wright (Energy Secretary)** — a fracking CEO — will now prioritize oil and gas expansion over clean energy. With these three in power, Trump will dismantle climate policies, defund clean energy programs, and block the urgent action we need. It’s everything Big Oil wants — and exactly what Trump promised them. But if they think we’ll sit on the sidelines and let this happen, _they’re wrong._ We’re working around the clock to elect bold climate champions and build an unshakable firewall to resist Trump’s fossil fuel agenda. From local city councils to state legislatures and Congress, we’re fighting to ensure that no matter what Trump does, our planet has defenders at every level of government. **This fight requires resources, and we can’t do it without you.[Can we count on your support today? Even just $10 makes a huge difference in the fight against the Trump administration.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101545619/526283542/2105508926?amount=10&refcode=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMjRlNDExLTFlZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ODx8VslZ_DZ1Slp8pHglxdugu8qA4u8XG81au9FjvuI=)** | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101545626/526283556/2105508926?amount=10&refcode=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.0124e411-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMjRlNDExLTFlZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ODx8VslZ_DZ1Slp8pHglxdugu8qA4u8XG81au9FjvuI=)

clean_body: Here’s what we do next. | The final piece of Trump’s Big Oil takeover is in place. Last night, the Senate confirmed Chris Wright (a fracking CEO) to head the Department of Energy. With this vote, Trump has the go-ahead to “drill, baby, drill.” = Chris Wright’s confirmation marks the third Big Oil lackey for Trump’s fossil fuel dream team: 🚨 Lee Zeldin (EPA Administrator) — who has spent his career dismantling environmental protections — will weaponize the EPA to serve polluters. 🚨 Doug Burgum (Interior Secretary) — whose deep ties to Big Oil guarantee reckless drilling on public lands — will oversee our natural resources. 🚨 Chris Wright (Energy Secretary) — a fracking CEO — will now prioritize oil and gas expansion over clean energy. With these three in power, Trump will dismantle climate policies, defund clean energy programs, and block the urgent action we need. It’s everything Big Oil wants — and exactly what Trump promised them. But if they think we’ll sit on the sidelines and let this happen, they’re wrong. We’re working around the clock to elect bold climate champions and build an unshakable firewall to resist Trump’s fossil fuel agenda. From local city councils to state legislatures and Congress, we’re fighting to ensure that no matter what Trump does, our planet has defenders at every level of government. This fight requires resources, and we can’t do it without you.= | = = Onward, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: Don’t Miss This Key Latino Panel at RootsCamp!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### RootsCamp Presents:
# 2024 Latino Vote: Lessons and Challenges
---
|
---
| **Dear friends,** We’re excited to invite you to [**RootsCamp**](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=a465aea7a2&e=b8f90417f9) , where changemakers, organizers, and advocates come together to strategize, learn, and grow. As part of this year’s incredible lineup, we don’t want you to miss one of the most important discussions of the event:
### **2024 Latino Vote: Lessons and Challenges**
**When:** February 7th | **Time:** 1:30 PM – 2:45 PM
**Where:** The Maritime Conference Center, Baltimore, MD Join an insightful discussion with **Pili Tobar (Partner, Conexión), Kristian Ramos (Advisor, Valiente Action Fund), and myself, Chuck Rocha (President & Founder, Solidarity Strategies)** as we break down the lessons learned in 2024 and challenges ahead for the Latino vote. This is a must-attend panel for anyone invested in mobilizing and empowering Latino communities for the upcoming elections. Don’t miss out—**[register now](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=0271a5b151&e=b8f90417f9)** and be part of the movement shaping the future! Looking forward to seeing you there! Best,
Chuck Rocha

name: COURIER
subject: Rachel Maddow: Trump is dismantling independent media before our eyes
body:
By weaponizing government power and legal attacks, Trump is following the authoritarian playbook of Putin and Hungary’s Viktor Orbán—a strategy designed to attack fact-based journalism, prop up right-wing propaganda, and silence accountability.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101546447/526285857/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxMGZmOTEtMWZlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ECBUUqMhLI3fN7PA-lkHTNPUlz9SXYscGaNkefiR1vM=&emci=c61606a7-1ee3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=5710ff91-1fe3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Last night, Rachel Maddow opened her show with a blunt warning:
**Donald Trump is using the power of government to dismantle independent media before our eyes.**
By weaponizing government power and legal attacks, Trump is following the authoritarian playbook of Putin and Hungary’s Viktor Orbán—a strategy designed to attack fact-based journalism, prop up right-wing propaganda, and silence accountability.
[**If you support COURIER’s efforts to build a progressive media alternative to the far-right, chip in $25 or more to support independent journalism today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101546449/526285858/-1581427288?refcode=20250204-em-maddow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxMGZmOTEtMWZlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ECBUUqMhLI3fN7PA-lkHTNPUlz9SXYscGaNkefiR1vM=)
**In her monologue, Maddow detailed a series of alarming attacks on independent media—all in just the past few days:**
* A Trump-aligned county executive in Long Island—who recently formed his own local militia—stripped legally required public notices from Newsday (the local paper of record) and handed them to a right-wing tabloid that isn’t even based in the community.
* Trump’s FCC is investigating how NPR and PBS disclose their sponsors—not just to harass them, but to choke off their most important source of funding.
* The Pete Hegseth-led Defense Department revoked office space from NBC, The New York Times, and other major outlets, limiting their ability to report on the military.

**Maddow warns this isn’t just hostility toward the press—it’s a coordinated strategy to weaken, defund, and dismantle independent journalism so that right-wing propaganda is all that’s left.**
Peter, that’s why your support for COURIER is so important right now.
**While Trump attacks real journalism, we’re expanding—reaching millions of Americans with fact-based reporting in the communities and online spaces that decide our elections.**
[**If you believe in independent journalism, in holding power accountable, in making sure facts and truth survive this dark moment— please chip in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101546451/526285860/-1581427288?refcode=20250204-em-maddow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxMGZmOTEtMWZlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ECBUUqMhLI3fN7PA-lkHTNPUlz9SXYscGaNkefiR1vM=)
**[Chip in $25 now➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101546453/526285862/-1581427288?refcode=20250204-em-maddow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxMGZmOTEtMWZlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ECBUUqMhLI3fN7PA-lkHTNPUlz9SXYscGaNkefiR1vM=)**
Thank you,
The COURIER Team

name: Republican Senate Leadership
subject: Do your part in the Golden Age of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
the days ahead are critical

A little more than a month from now, President Trump will give his FIRST joint address to Congress as the 47th President!

subject: President Trump’s FIRST joint address is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
let’s make these first 100 days count

See the news, friend?

A little more than a month from now, President Trump will give his _FIRST_ joint address to Congress!

The Golden Age of America is here, and this is an early milestone.

Well ahead of then, Senate Republicans want to hear from Patriots all over the country, and that means YOU, friend!

**[Will you take this First 100 Days Survey and let conservatives in the Senate know how you think things are going and what they should focus on?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/vUTcMmHzfOCBuisa5XIqm04qnkKgRoB9KICA2CzANSFhX0Si1Nzz64OEftAlpk-GZxE28UkS-2Eka-mjX-ZoB945Sck2v3sCmOKVB9oZ75kudi5w4s_k5iICzhmsbSQy2dxJYp8U5BiQiLWzDxWQSkUaq0AnkKW-ruxxZc3pweClmS4ok45xiCpsMS9kMQFzd8SnwmctcnSHOr72HYi9NAVNmX_oWQ9JpnStOyPZA6zi1GSjjkQPLbqf2gx6twCe5wQ5odnjtcj9Bfq72YHhSEx3Y02p4suQZfBO-jS99umytMJDJJ-l7yWBWqNrd76-HeVK96m9pbzXQtGj41-5x6JpQp83ROCMnLR_Yph0ZoqkYkDak5Mf3ftyIs-Ak0g-iS1ANr57nB4BOQo-TACkPa733sFi-VSWFadGuwozNZR4LQd50usGe7zEMTODnewAJTGOF7Nyi2klUrTlA3EF0Rw_yq8PIraLeHsYeK67GbUiNvjZdPHnY9xmBJVGpmm6ROO0qr9wOLAGjRTgug/WybqoPdjK7HG-eG9MigIHRYRYMIovuG4/5)**

name: Joni Ernst - iPhone
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7rDwgGFdUJx0crdRlCYlwjDrm5PBFsa-y7-PfEqqa7YdzXvvm3m_7-7uaaE8__AJbUmu7K6eDkveK4_0eGDBHNCBgJ4L4EI52USrBzC3rkHbGXnTg1GdaN6s7iNIbfwk-hgmL5QEYdQ0CVAxyF41ZC8fAUJ1Rt26oTW694MIMoCPg39IpkTB7ZgWCj4n_74Wqn_ajLVZ7Fut287kC4ORwbhjOAq2H5QLxjasicH4vmbiX-gMxrjOyLdClwXhfqnkWC5VoTwz-VrLgQz0UZMLPm2e5szk6z9A6X6-8F93aLtO6kG72mkhNPS8B81A46erFJ9e_8pYc8Vcr-CTl8T_f4KB_jzy-W3eFBu3D1oW2rVhSszJ03Id2tRnezot_A0AAP__A0KSLA "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Chesco's Groundhog Day loop
body:
Beth Ann Rosica | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Beth Ann Rosica:_ Groundhog Day arrives early in Chester County_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e8d6fb7581&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "Groundhog Day arrived early in Chester County this year — two full days ahead of the typical February 2 date. Shortly after 4 p.m. on January 30, 2025, Jeanne Franklin, the county health director, launched a ridiculous defense of her indefensible decision to ban the volunteers at St. Agnes Church from distributing hot meals to those in need.

I thought I was stuck in the Bill Murray classic movie, [_Groundhog Day_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c384085c2b&e=b7b3eddce2), while sitting in the audience for the monthly Department of Health meeting.

I don’t make a habit of attending these meetings, but I do show up when our health director makes asinine decisions that do far more harm than good. Take for example, Ms. Franklin’s position on school closures and masking during Covid. She single-handedly kept schools closed far longer than necessary, forcibly masked children, and imposed draconian quarantine policies..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c065dc620c&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Beth Ann Rosica:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dc6dc84e5b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Beth Ann Rosica holds a Ph.D. in Education and has dedicated her career to advocating on behalf of at-risk children and families. She became politically active during the extended school closures, speaking out about the detrimental effects on children. Beth Ann led the local grassroots movement to open schools and eliminate mandatory masks while assisting school board candidates across the state and country with their campaigns. She has a consulting business and covers education issues for _Broad + Liberty_. Beth Ann resides in West Chester, PA with her husband and two teenage sons.

Read more from Beth Ann [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0502dc4aa4&e=b7b3eddce2) at _Broad + Liberty_.
---
|
---
| | We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb20d6bd20&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Read more columns on [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f1b9f46ac&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=821ee28716&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

Read more from Beth Ann at Broad + Liberty. | | | We at are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government. Read more columns on — updated daily and as news breaks. | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.broadandliberty.com | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._ You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site – and local stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. Our mailing address is:** Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . |

let’s make these first 100 days count

See the news, friend?

A little more than a month from now, President Trump will give his _FIRST_ joint address to Congress!

The Golden Age of America is here, and this is an early milestone.

name: Stop RFK Jr. via Our Revolution
subject: The Senate's first vote on RFK Jr.
