subject: This pains me to write
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 I would rather be doing anything other than writing this email to you right now. What I’m about to tell you pains me to write, but I can’t put this off any longer. It’s all over. This could be the end. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our critical fundraising goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 I could really use your support right here and now. HERE’S WHY: 1. Ever since their MAJOR DEFEAT, the Democrats are more fired up than ever before to defeat our Republican agenda, destroy our conservative values, and stand against our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. 2. In order to try and defeat us, they’re pulling out all the stops. They’re making the calls to all the national Democrats and liberal fat cats. They’re fundraising and strategizing for how to TAKE DOWN our America First agenda once and for all. 3. Meanwhile, I’m way behind pace to reach my make-or-break fundraising goal before our MAJOR deadline. We can’t afford to start the month out on this note! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I know you’ve already done so much for this campaign, but if you can find it in your heart to pitch in ONCE MORE before our midnight deadline, it would mean the world to me and go a long way in my fight to protect our America First priorities! I’m really hoping I can count on your help, Peter. No gift is too small right now. Anything you can give helps me inch closer to our make-or-break goal. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 So please, help me get back on track. And if you can’t give right now. Trust me, I understand. All I ask is for your continued prayers and support. Thank you! - Marsha Blackburn https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a50baa28364a0d4434ea457e6fc30219f4819b8d2207c941d2e5df347e96c980aeb1efdc9ed0eb6279f817cad383ba5b77f1d0ef6ff25f0e36e4ed6b4f39d003 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our critical fundraising goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now. HERE’S WHY: 1. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A longer note about mass deportations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8284%2E5257348%2EY8N-dJ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

California is home to more than 10 million immigrants. They are our
neighbors, our coworkers, and our friends. They are also the backbone of
our economy. And yes, some are undocumented.

Which is why Trump’s mass deportation agenda isn’t just cruel — it’s an
economic disaster in the making.

I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: ripping millions of people out
of the workforce doesn’t just devastate families, it cripples entire
industries.

Right now, farms in California’s Central Valley are having trouble
harvesting their crops because workers are too afraid to show up for their
jobs. Citrus farming has ground to a halt at some farms. Restaurants,
construction sites, and small businesses across the state are seeing the
same thing — an immediate, severe labor shortage. And families are afraid
to go about their lives.

And it won’t stop there. Losing a critical part of our workforce will send
shockwaves through the economy:

* Food prices will skyrocket. With fewer workers to harvest and
transport crops, grocery store shelves will empty, and families will
pay more for basics like fruits, vegetables, and dairy.
* Businesses will suffer. The hospitality, construction, and service
industries rely heavily on immigrant workers. Trump’s mass
deportations will force closures and layoffs.
* Billions will be lost. The American Immigration Council estimates that
conducting mass deportations would cost the federal government
approximately $967.9 billion over a decade — harming American
families, workers, and small businesses.

I questioned Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Agriculture about these
devastating consequences.

How can our farms survive if half of the workforce is deported? She had no
plan to address the damage this would cause to our food supply, to
California’s economy, or to the millions of families — many with children
who are U.S. citizens — who will be torn apart.

Losing a majority of our workforce will not just slow down production. It
will raise costs for families nationwide. We’ll see empty grocery store
shelves. And beyond the economic implications, we’ll see families torn
apart. It’s heartbreaking,
Derek.

Trump and his allies claim these mass deportations are about “removing
criminals” and “securing our borders.” But let's be clear: this is a
political stunt designed to vilify immigrants.

And here’s the biggest irony: if we actually provided a real pathway to
citizenship, our economy would gain billions. Studies show that creating a
pathway to citizenship for undocumented workers would increase GDP by $1.7
trillion over the next decade and create over 438,000 new jobs. Immigrants
already contribute $79.7 billion in federal taxes and $41 billion in state
and local taxes every year — even while being shut out of basic benefits.

This is about power. They want working people — immigrants and
non-immigrants alike — fighting each other instead of fighting for fair
wages, better jobs, and an economy that works for all of us.

Mass deportations will destroy lives, drive up prices, and send billions
in economic losses straight down the drain. We need real immigration
reform that protects workers, keeps families together, and strengthens our
economy — not another manufactured crisis.

I’m going to fight like hell to make sure California — and our country —
both remain a place where people can work hard, build a life, and not live
in fear. And I won’t stop calling this what it is: a cynical, cruel, and
self-destructive attack on essential workers and their families.

Thank you for reading,

Adam

The Trump administration has begun targeting immigrant communities across the country, causing widespread panic and fear.
Our community is made up of many immigrant care workers and families, and **we strongly condemn these deplorable actions.**
In case you missed it, we sent an email in January about resources that everyone, regardless of immigration status, should have. **[**_Please share this resource widely to help protect and support communities facing threats of deportation >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101558395/526324730/467336193?ms=020425_fwdresources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhlNWUwMC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF8MKI5xQpj_5uog1UQy5L7_J3BJvKr7meNT2-Bqh14=&emci=c1989e5c-7ae2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=768e5e00-3be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=864787) **

From: Care in Action
Date: January 22, 2025
Subject: Take action NOW to protect our communities
Hi Peter,
In the face of mounting threats to immigrant communities from the Trump administration — including many care workers and families — our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance, has put together a bilingual immigrant rights resource webpage.
**[**_Please read and share this webpage with your network, so we can ensure as many people as possible have the information and resources they need to protect themselves and their families from deportation >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101558399/526324733/467336193?ms=020425_fwdresources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhlNWUwMC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF8MKI5xQpj_5uog1UQy5L7_J3BJvKr7meNT2-Bqh14=&emci=c1989e5c-7ae2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=768e5e00-3be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=864787) **
_The webpage is available in both English and Spanish:_
**********__[Share this resource (English)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101558401/526324749/467336193?ms=020425_fwdresources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhlNWUwMC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF8MKI5xQpj_5uog1UQy5L7_J3BJvKr7meNT2-Bqh14=&emci=c1989e5c-7ae2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=768e5e00-3be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=864787)__**********

Immigrant care workers are not alone. Amongst the fear and uncertainty of the moment, our new webpage is filled with important immigrant rights information, including:
* A run-down of legal rights, regardless of immigration status
* [**_Local legal service provider listing_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101558404/526324765/-1660809177?ms=020425_fwdresources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhlNWUwMC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF8MKI5xQpj_5uog1UQy5L7_J3BJvKr7meNT2-Bqh14=&emci=c1989e5c-7ae2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=768e5e00-3be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=864787)
* Creating a family emergency plan
* Care workers’ rights on the job

clean_body: This is urgent — share these resources today. Hi Peter, The Trump administration has begun targeting immigrant communities across the country, causing widespread panic and fear. Our community is made up of many immigrant care workers and families, and we strongly condemn these deplorable actions. In case you missed it, we sent an email in January about resources that everyone, regardless of immigration status, should have. The webpage is available in both English and Spanish: ************** ************ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Care in Action Date: January 22, 2025 Subject: Take action NOW to protect our communities Hi Peter, In the face of mounting threats to immigrant communities from the Trump administration — including many care workers and families — our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance, has put together a bilingual immigrant rights resource webpage. The webpage is available in both English and Spanish: ************ ************ Immigrant care workers are not alone. Amongst the fear and uncertainty of the moment, our new webpage is filled with important immigrant rights information, including: A run-down of legal rights, regardless of immigration status Creating a family emergency plan Care workers’ rights on the job The Trump administration’s immediate actions threaten millions of care workers and immigrants in our communities. Together we are stronger, and it will take all of us to support our communities. You can start by sharing resources and staying informed. ************ ************** In solidarity, Care in Action

subject: Stand with Kim for science on World Cancer Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558598/526325240/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThlNWUwMC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AM2go4YZ3K92MKXIXpGHx9hnoEP7XwfsmbpGrxSCTvo=&emci=c270ff09-0ce3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=7a8e5e00-3be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=15820338)

Peter –

Today, on World Cancer Day, we honor those we've lost and celebrate the incredible progress we’ve made in the fight against this devastating disease.

As a doctor, Kim has seen _firsthand_ how vital scientific advancements are in helping families recover and reclaim their lives. Thanks to groundbreaking research, early detection, and improved treatments, more families are celebrating survivorship than ever before.

But Peter, right now, **our progress is at risk.**

The Trump administration is attacking and undermining critical funding for cancer research and ignoring the scientific solutions that save lives. We cannot afford to let politics threaten the breakthroughs that offer hope to so many. Now more than ever, we must stand up for science.

We need leaders who understand that investing in research isn’t just about numbers – it’s about _real_ people's lives. It’s about ensuring that every family has access to the life-saving treatments they need and deserve. Congress is back in full swing and we’re facing every challenge head-on. We’re fighting to make sure that critical services like Medicare, SNAP, and Head Start programs remain funded for working families, **but we want to hear from you.** **[Will you take our February Priorities Survey? ## The Sky is falling
Washington is FREAKING OUT! Oh my goodness, Trump is about to start a trade war.
We have never used tariffs like this before.
Everyone is focused on the wrong thing. The are focused at the tactics --\- NOT THE RESULT.
Whether its tariffs being used to get Mexico and Canada to focus more on border security or Democrats and the media focused on USAID they are falling into the trap.
Business as usual has allowed millions of people to illegally enter the country and $36 Trillion dollars in debt to get racked up.
Trump is playing the long (and smarter) game. Let me explain. ...

name: Dr. Amy Acton
subject: why I’m running for Governor of Ohio →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558894/526326374/-491556796?refcode=250204_Serve_Acton_whyImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4Nzk5MC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYApbfj_U4HNxFGj9US-MuRDVnDGyolWS4BrvpxYK6A=)
---
Hi friends, I’m Dr. Amy Acton. I’m a Democrat running for Governor of Ohio, and I want to tell you a little bit about my story and why I’m in this race. I grew up in Youngstown under some pretty tough circumstances. I know what it’s like to worry about the cost of putting food on the table, where my brother and I would sleep at night, or how we would stay warm. At times I felt invisible – and I know that too many Ohioans feel the same way right now. Right now, Ohioans are struggling with the rising costs of groceries, childcare, healthcare, and other expenses. I feel the uneasiness and uncertainty that so many are experiencing in their daily lives. _We all deserve a little breathing room._ I’m running for Governor because I refuse to look away from Ohioans who are struggling, while self-serving politicians and special interests take our state in the wrong direction. Together, we can build the Ohio we dream of:
* An Ohio that empowers local communities to build their future
* An Ohio where your zip code doesn’t determine your success
* An Ohio with good-paying jobs, high quality schools, safe neighborhoods and thriving businesses where people can raise their families, and lead a happy and healthy life

But we have to put politics aside and work together to fix our state. I’m ready to get to work for Ohioans as Governor and I’m asking you to join me. [**We’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours. Will you please split a contribution between Serve America and my campaign before midnight? Your support will go a long way in this fight for our future →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558895/526326375/1804934404?refcode=250204_Serve_Acton_whyImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4Nzk5MC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYApbfj_U4HNxFGj9US-MuRDVnDGyolWS4BrvpxYK6A=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558897/526326376/-927293987?refcode=250204_Serve_Acton_whyImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4Nzk5MC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYApbfj_U4HNxFGj9US-MuRDVnDGyolWS4BrvpxYK6A=) Be well, Dr. Amy Acton [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558898/526326378/-927293987?refcode=250204_Serve_Acton_whyImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4Nzk5MC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYApbfj_U4HNxFGj9US-MuRDVnDGyolWS4BrvpxYK6A=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101558900/526326379/-927293987?refcode=250204_Serve_Acton_whyImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzA4Nzk5MC0zYmUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYApbfj_U4HNxFGj9US-MuRDVnDGyolWS4BrvpxYK6A=)

At times I felt invisible – and I know that too many Ohioans feel the same way right now. Right now, Ohioans are struggling with the rising costs of groceries, childcare, healthcare, and other expenses. I feel the uneasiness and uncertainty that so many are experiencing in their daily lives. We all deserve a little breathing room. I’m running for Governor because I refuse to look away from Ohioans who are struggling, while self-serving politicians and special interests take our state in the wrong direction. Together, we can build the Ohio we dream of: An Ohio that empowers local communities to build their future An Ohio where your zip code doesn’t determine your success * An Ohio with good-paying jobs, high quality schools, safe neighborhoods and thriving businesses where people can raise their families, and lead a happy and healthy life But we have to put politics aside and work together to fix our state. I’m ready to get to work for Ohioans as Governor and I’m asking you to join me. = = Be well, Dr. Amy Acton = = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Be part of the change for Women’s rights
body:
Join together
| Peter, Are you ready to take action against radical gender ideology? As you and I navigate this new political landscape, the importance of defending women’s rights has never been more critical.
With President Trump’s victory, you and I now have the chance to reclaim society from leftist values.
The Riley Gaines Center is rallying advocates and allies to join this movement in defense of women’s rights, and I want **_YOU_** to be part of it. Peter, with your support, I know that anything is possible. That includes setting things right and Making Women Female Again. As I travel the country and hear horror stories from concerned parents, one thing is clear. People want to know how they can help. Well, Peter, this is how: [Contribute now to our 2025 fundraising drive.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8934c69e5b440a0af70c2ce7b20d2e3&_e=Y7kYb937zwYd-AQ40x5Jjg5LLTPcitGes1h8oWuVn9asnLsXe-ybKg1BNMd32Kf8pofkXxNM9ToUmirO_sONduN9edXbO7MRlS6g05imirtISpHhfvVBB2uyJbk_xhDHe5DW2juDWqez5Vrbd2eoQoqWe6DAyi3bLWeyAahIDerrktRQPYIsVmevBs9pIBw3R4PLnemUzlZroYvIG66etwOZdi_fHehRtOzrCvc2FemjGFX6W4eO4KBJq8H4KZVpT1HhFpupsnqH4XUhrFtWvH0sJeId6THc1lwQTjX2hpntoP1HeFolVe6sHz7PenDSXQLuxH_DwJzsFbMMV9L0njy6_LcGEh_zso_YZZJsFqJS5IoTLp-cCOWEZbiA-8gYe4V9CbpYwd6_kYGiZB8HOw%3D%3D) Your critical support can empower the Riley Gaines Center’s Ambassadors to take decisive action and make a tangible difference in the lives of female athletes and students. My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I. **Don’t worry, we’re young and hungry and ready to fight.**
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Every contribution matters. Whether it’s $25, $50, or more, your donation directly funds our programs and initiatives designed to protect and uplift women.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8934c69e5b440a0af70c2ce7b20d2e3&_e=Y7kYb937zwYd-AQ40x5Jjg5LLTPcitGes1h8oWuVn9asnLsXe-ybKg1BNMd32Kf8pofkXxNM9ToUmirO_sONduN9edXbO7MRlS6g05imirtISpHhfvVBB2uyJbk_xhDHe5DW2juDWqez5Vrbd2eoQoqWe6DAyi3bLWeyAahIDerrktRQPYIsVmevBs9pIBw3R4PLnemUzlZroYvIG66etwOZdi_fHehRtOzrCvc2FemjGFX6W4eO4KBJq8H4KZVpi4PkJDXzx6xvuzZA8jZ7ANKuNC3DtpYvvEiDhTzYsYA19A7zI3EaLJ9nwxgnxFPJT3OTtowEKe_uqpgKgtNIagLmTYfEbpFXoAWtwLp1Okh3nTrqti1XODUqQbFKUOBLN24jlpBGtuj3_j26-aYSkQ%3D%3D) Together, you and I can make waves and advocate for policies that ensure fairness and equality. Let’s harness this momentum and continue the fight for women’s rights! Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Together, you and I can create a powerful front against the challenges posed by the left’s radical agenda. At the very least, your support will help make sure that the “Women” sign on the bathroom door means something again. [Please consider donating to support our efforts. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8934c69e5b440a0af70c2ce7b20d2e3&_e=Y7kYb937zwYd-AQ40x5Jjg5LLTPcitGes1h8oWuVn9asnLsXe-ybKg1BNMd32Kf8pofkXxNM9ToUmirO_sONduN9edXbO7MRlS6g05imirtISpHhfvVBB2uyJbk_xhDHe5DW2juDWqez5Vrbd2eoQoqWe6DAyi3bLWeyAahIDerrktRQPYIsVmevBs9pIBw3R4PLnemUzlZroYvIG66etwOZdi_fHehRtOzrCvc2FemjGFX6W4eO4KBJq8H4KZVpixsybxVgz40lhynMS4rmb0RuukwmoQWGuKvhswYSOX57kJ5uyLj8CMfssA2BfXqKW8JwZmDc1ULulinIJCTHNmI7I5IpIlyRRyQrrAads3gAuRiuMSOEfhsjZyPIzbFL3aqmExTuDp1pC3-oZbqwlQ%3D%3D) Every contribution helps us amplify our message and reach more people.

name: Chris Murdock
subject: Just 4 seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee [contact us](mailto:info@ourtenn
body:
We were this close...

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/BIWSNkwI6XaoyfLjxFs8kVKVZRY=197)
---
Hello Peter,
---
| | We were _this_ close.
Governor Lee’s Voucher Scam barely passed the Tennessee House last week.
Did you know that if we had won just 4 more seats in the last election we could have defeated this disastrous legislation?
Let’s make this crystal clear: the voucher bill is nothing but a corporate giveaway. It takes taxpayer money out of public schools, lines the pockets of private for-profit institutions, and throws our public schools, teachers, and students under the bus. **This is a **_**full-throttle attack**_** on the future of our children.**
Here’s the hard truth: we barely lost key districts that could have stopped this disaster.
Here’s just a couple:
* **District 97** : Republican John Gillespie won over Democrat Jesse Huseth by a measly 1077 votes. _Republican John Gillespie voted for the voucher bill._
* **District 18** : Republican Elaine Davis won against Democrat Bryan Goldberg by less than 3000 votes. _Republican Elaine Davis voted for the voucher bill._

Add it up. In these two seats alone a few thousand votes in November of 2024 would have made all the difference. And that’s just two of many winnable races.
But this isn’t just about numbers—it’s about people. It’s about teachers already stretched thin. It’s about students who deserve fully-funded classrooms. It’s about Tennessee families who need strong public schools.
But Tennessee Democrats are underfunded. We all know national resources go to other states. **These were districts we came close in but we simply didn’t have the money to push our candidates over the line. **That’s why we need you.
We won’t let this happen again. **2026 is our chance.**
**Will you help us flip four seats in 2026?** Your donation will go directly toward electing leaders who will _fight tooth and nail_ for our public schools.
---
| [Donate](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN25_EM_JUST4SEATS/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/11oqzEu01gH6ZC9Vhlw-5GFFUY4=197 "Donate")
---
We were _this_ close in 2024. Now our kids are counting on us to make it right.
Thank you for your fierce commitment to Tennessee’s future.
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---
| [Donate](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN25_EM_JUST4SEATS/2/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/G74XQaKHhvQtJBOBZwVzAbSCSqo=197 "Donate")
---
P.S. We lost the battle this time but this fight is far from over. Will you chip in today to help us flip four house seats?
---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight._
---
| [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fx.com%2FOurTennPac/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/82rYmFCTmrk5-muXHpmWX7o44NQ=197) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FOurTennesseeFuture/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/j3YhuZqp0XCRsX_x1bUFeQdsAVQ=197) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fourtennpac%2F/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/34qCQxjrIT_DSpeUA3a0iehrWmM=197) | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.ourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0194d2ca125e-a0d6e833-1899-4269-a3a7-4643cd76c571-000000/bXNFNIzmxey6qQQs0U3JvjSII8o=197)

* * *
Right after Trump acknowledged that tariffs will increase prices on consumers, he announced tariffs on pharmaceuticals and “all forms of medicine.” He has rescinded the Medicare drug price negotiations that Biden put into place, and now his tariffs will further increase the already high cost of our medications. **Almost all drugs or their ingredients originate in other nations. Our prescription drugs are about to become more expensive.** Trump says it will be worth the price that must be paid to make America great again. _Because he doesn’t care if that price includes our lives._ [**FIGHT BACK! Chip in to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will fight for affordable healthcare!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsiD1OAXNyIKnXSyWzAZl798V3clGmIMrmfD06mP09QWokWeQR9WTikBg_rfsRtcw3EiNrwgVMXtmGt1FOSEVA8DAh6FsesG14i5Ixx7O42NeO4mDJE1e2jzM-6AsC2cmC8mSiikUd7cxe8fRSYhWIBWIh2RbVSLs6R7pINOGoA9JxKhmnVIASB3T-9mRyQoI5p9rN2vb-uNwQ2wEm26Y1eWA87niOktDY2RaG_LiiuLUz__a_yy4gU_Xw9VdWOQK3rOLOpKF8YgtStnZ2O6opQtWS4GX-RZvj1T1yHz-8iJkyGMcSTKi_sm_CIUBiL_Liw/4dq/GoDjG2xbRLOwogBtONJcBw/h5/h001.X-wKXirgsoVH8YA9B-EhOWYv2yxKf-qeRmXCgJyZRTo) **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mBCNbsFWM_TfIWPXlDfIWGvV7Uc8xQM9Y-tqEsHKxKBhl7ZTuEYn0Yj_5fasTAngqFbBwrXWbiYSygzCyQwtOKqGVP8N64-YLEYQiQk7J2AiouOmZZ-8dJx7z8wfUMdZ4vQHiJUJtIJtHwXJ7WMvnDpmq0AAuERNCiZOTSrlk6FAWgvMZC75QdeJ5US8VusarnbdSrIkI8qW9vsQ9GSeOBICOuNwApLwJYUsye2SeZ00Jvws39MzixeQCdAqogil8kzBrrCcoyqT4NfbBuzyaerk_jIRgFUcQzYwuox705GWYVLorjbUIY7OiFq9rw7qP4/4dq/GoDjG2xbRLOwogBtONJcBw/h6/h001.R43GIVFgpn3_6R_E3yCIZgOA9XnerNnabPmW8pE4C6M)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: [SURVEY] John wants to know what you think ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
As the new reality in Washington sets in, John wants to hear what you think.
#
Hi Derek, Team Fetterman here.
Donald Trump has been back in office for just over two weeks now. As the new reality in Washington sets in, John wants to hear what you think. 🤔
**Which issues are top of mind for you right now? And what fights do you want to see Democrats prioritize in the Senate?**
[**Please take just two minutes (or less) to let us know what you think John’s priorities should be. Our team will review each + every response.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250204?source=em20250204-9863&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250204?source=em20250204-9863&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)**
John’s made it clear that, while he’ll work with Trump where he can to get wins for PA, he won’t shy away from fighting back when his administration tries to hurt workers or take away our rights.
His work has always been about making life better for working folks + families in all 67 PA counties, and that’s not changing — no matter who’s in the White House.
But in order to best represent working folks, John needs to hear from grassroots supporters like you. [**Will you share your thoughts via our short survey now? We really want to know what you think Dems should be focusing on right now.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250204?source=em20250204-9863&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)
Thanks so much for your input, Derek. We really will review each + every response! 🙏
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250204-9863-footer&t=1&refcode2=9863_434096_hdvKPW&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9863%2E434096%2EhdvKPW)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ee855c012dfd4bba90356cb28b1d4476&_e=-7BufrM3zmkg8mEAZhdRD0mOR4AlLfONyPKrmMOE2_qjdpPowPxtnY5KkU0pGN6E_L83IupsjLnvU3uZdwU7KfsXpztQ0XbXj9ADkiZcTw3r__6VXKzHe6qInJ5P-RsPA6WvI1erL6_XgA5yxzJSq0jQXCa2LvxUmuyfoSiRIEcultFiv7aKsdxbW78NehyokYHMmhcablw7RqMD-oKpRhDK2yfJecfwbdppMH4oDFbsJmTdfNuRhsCIQTOkmFKbRbuqD4oJvDCLPcnVlw_IgJzjmA9cIj2fLRig_Z5YNd_pCgvScJLzRWGC2_3u8MMOKTgelg5t-byaIsOgbUf0xpdjnQ6f3gOT7notbwHo_Vl5gE18NijUDFmY1JYsXbw6YV_tgjZe18uOJ4a6F-5g42f_Lxsd84oryAdqv-Ux2SC0Pa44K8nb4OqeoXW2kbDK)

Fellow American, I have an important update to share with you.

Now that Republicans control the Senate majority, I have become the Chairman of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigation.

**_[This means I will have the power to issue subpoenas, investigate special interests, expose the Deep State and its agents who work against the interests of the American people.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ee855c012dfd4bba90356cb28b1d4476&_e=-7BufrM3zmkg8mEAZhdRD0mOR4AlLfONyPKrmMOE2_qjdpPowPxtnY5KkU0pGN6E_L83IupsjLnvU3uZdwU7KfsXpztQ0XbXj9ADkiZcTw3r__6VXKzHe6qInJ5P-RsPA6WvI1erL6_XgA5yxzJSq0jQXCa2LvxUmuyfoSiRIEcultFiv7aKsdxbW78NehyokYHMmhcablw7RqMD-oKpRhDK2yfJecfwbdppMH4oDFbsJmTdfNuRhsCIQTOkmFKbRbuqD4oJvDCLPcnVlw_IgJzjmA9cIj2fLRig_Z5YNd9D9PG2H-V_k9t007taarBsNfBi8GwzTS3vwvV1kWBjBYbuU-x5OhCon4EUnPw9Uau_lfm1UujymoT2dTZNE8jEh0REmN69ZVdBfjqcQ0w1wuaeXYho72t8PHx8hPVArc6Otk1LeFX3_7guMq2wpjDL)_**

I ran for the Senate because I wanted to bring back transparency and build a government that is ruled by the American people, not by bureaucrats or corporations. As Chairman, _I intend to do just that._

clean_body: This is a unique opportunity to reform our government. Fellow American, I have an important update to share with you. Now that Republicans control the Senate majority, I have become the Chairman of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigation. I ran for the Senate because I wanted to bring back transparency and build a government that is ruled by the American people, not by bureaucrats or corporations. As Chairman, I intend to do just that. But here's the truth - We will face a lot of resistance in my mission to restore integrity, and I need you to stand by me. Your support will power my mission to restore integrity and transparency to the federal government. ********** ******** ******** ********** This mission is of utmost importance, and your backing is crucial. Thank you for your commitment, Chairman Ron Johnson Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc. %%subscriptioncenterurl%% PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903

name: Devon Moody, PAC director
subject: A Politivist: an activist and a politician
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
Hi Peter,
My name is Devon Moody, and I’m honored to serve as the Director of Politivist Action PAC — an organization inspired by the bold leadership and unwavering commitment of Cori Bush. Would you consider making a donation today to help Cori hit the ground running and build the strong foundation our organization needs? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
From standing on the frontlines in Ferguson to making history as the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, Cori has redefined what it means to lead with courage and conviction. Now, with the launch of Politivist Action PAC, she’s taking her vision for transformational change to the next level.
Cori calls herself a politivist — a term she coined to describe the powerful union of politician and activist. The activist listens, stands with the people, and moves boldly where others hesitate. The politician holds the pen, wields the power of the purse, and turns grassroots energy into transformative policy. Together, these roles create a leader who not only hears the needs of the people but also acts decisively to meet them. You can hear Cori speak more about what it means to be a politivist here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs] in her interview on the Late Show with Stephen Colbert.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
Politivist Action PAC is built on this principle: the fight for justice demands both activism and political action. Our mission is to elect and support bold, grassroots leaders who reject corporate influence and tirelessly fight for peace, justice, and human rights for all. We are here to confront extremism, defend democracy, and advance racial, economic, and social justice.
And look, Peter: this isn’t just about politics — it’s about building a movement that centers people over profit. A movement that combines the courage of activism with the power of policy-making. To put it bluntly, Trump has now officially entered office, and we have to do everything we can to reject his administration’s efforts to roll back all the progress we’ve made. But we can’t do this without your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
CHIP IN NOW TO HELP US CARRY CORI'S VISION FORWARD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
Together, we can empower leaders who will transform our communities and ensure our government reflects the needs of the people.
Thank you, and onward,
Devon Moody
Director, Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
If you want to support our efforts, consider chipping in today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1-politivistvideo?refcode=em_250204_Launch2_actrs&refcode2=x_020425_launch2_actrs&recurring=1]
PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
Politivist Action PAC
PO Box 33079
Washington, DC 20033
United States

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a3dea55da5a64fa78797e5634592ef80&_e=oaaPnu6LdauUJ12PuCBlUcut8XAeztY6dhP7nGvbB1TsS8jHM9QV_pSNwGjTBRGRt982jlWfxvHdJ_MvrkuEnTc88W-acReP9sbNnQ5PhnAt-0ZsTZHgL2TXyoT8pia8InNigFIKvZv_6nM2UczwIz4IxpL5hb0rVBLVATI0SY5sOYQGw4_OepAvfiwOJ8gCmPEYfDZ23GhDPLsLZubgPwjfunMcNIEIhDEIoxuSXWqXbVC_pZnRew8YeRnW6OK4nXqVe7Cccqv79IAOVc7R8CCImk1jg79K0epL6hbuvM9ainsnet5rTaaqGslvQEjSpR3YA8AZL5EQa7Y17Fy7ZRZX3Amv5419WSB8b3zi4jJXv60YGZeDZRvlGze5fj6REW_YewNTafKu-FpidNaOmQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a3dea55da5a64fa78797e5634592ef80&_e=oaaPnu6LdauUJ12PuCBlUcut8XAeztY6dhP7nGvbB1TsS8jHM9QV_pSNwGjTBRGRt982jlWfxvHdJ_MvrkuEnTc88W-acReP9sbNnQ5PhnAt-0ZsTZHgL2TXyoT8pia8InNigFIKvZv_6nM2UczwIz4IxpL5hb0rVBLVATI0SY5sOYQGw4_OepAvfiwOJ8gCmPEYfDZ23GhDPLsLZubgPwjfunMcNIEIhDEIoxuSXWqXbVC_pZnRew8YeRnW6OK4WmyhdDDBbdN1IMaOBNpktBNnQfHMop9D6l9NzaIVguPedif8gqtRFd47x9AmhhLrGvVhQNKSCrbnqnPw2cLj5TLiz2cyXMA778WEJeSjgFIPa8-jLTZOeuFGxDfL1uUdO1Ds5XJmbdcGNDq-QzuMUg%3D%3D) Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a3dea55da5a64fa78797e5634592ef80&_e=oaaPnu6LdauUJ12PuCBlUcut8XAeztY6dhP7nGvbB1TsS8jHM9QV_pSNwGjTBRGRt982jlWfxvHdJ_MvrkuEnTc88W-acReP9sbNnQ5PhnAt-0ZsTZHgL2TXyoT8pia8InNigFIKvZv_6nM2UczwIz4IxpL5hb0rVBLVATI0SY5sOYQGw4_OepAvfiwOJ8gCmPEYfDZ23GhDPLsLZubgPwjfunMcNIEIhDEIoxuSXWqXbVC_pZnRew8YeRnW6OK4Y4Kf0kX59Bq1SjtRDm1ErnuZBWzQptU_GGbPZyx6K9OzOay13yn8qracDVBPmygDabyITFMSO7KCI_kvrLfUyrjbQSpbTpvjfLOP3pLk8FyiWcRhBbtafWcCICWnfBmXbfmTutXCU9WUKKtmHbhvqw%3D%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=a3dea55da5a64fa78797e5634592ef80&_t=GoZ0m7g6kyBeDFWPMDpkYf_axqHEEp68w22j8A6cwXd0hpl1MHn-nfzchjYs-NbbkYYi93F6iQ8MN09Q8IYmXdiUd1Gqk4uWWTk_JazDPXdxe9Pzso6y_ENd56m_0eHf)

---
| |

subject: Judge Susan Crawford's opponent wants to ban abortion with NO exceptions
body:

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Some thoughts on Elon Musk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2240%2E135344%2EhAKbi2)

Friend,
In my 15 years of service to the federal government, I was focused on protecting the country from terrorist threats -- always with America's safety top of mind.
Recently, we've seen our federal government targeted in a way that makes America less safe. I have no problems with trimming excess spending in our government, but this approach is way too broad.
It's affecting everyone from law enforcement, to flight safety inspectors, to the people who test our drinking water, and even doctors conducting clinical trials for children with cancer.
Talk about throwing the baby out with the bathwater. These are professions that Michiganders and Americans rely on -- whether we know it or not.
I'm especially concerned about the role that Elon Musk is playing, a billionaire who voters didn't elect -- but who now has access to our citizens' most sensitive data, including tax documents.
That access raises all kinds of questions. Could that information be used for legal or financial gain? For the targeting of citizens?
We know that Musk's personal interests are out of step with the average Michigander -- he's got investments in Communist China, and a clear business opposition to the Big Three automakers.
I'll have more thoughts very soon, not just on this topic but also some suggestions of what we all can do in this moment. Keep an eye on your inbox.
Until then, thank you for reading.
Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan25.mLp_Iw&refcode=em25204&t=2&akid=2240%2E135344%2EhAKbi2)

name: Team Hayes
subject: An unprecedented power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101560769/526332308/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njc2NzI2Ni00M2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xmHkysmK3wcqzwNdfasz7nje_ndaTVppNKRTpAfRrU=&emci=7739680b-22e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=46767266-43e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=15529135) | **“'We would call it a coup': Watchdogs and Dems attack Elon Musk Treasury Department takeover”**
_— USA Today, February 2025_ _“Reports emerged over the weekend that Musk's DOGE operatives were at Treasury, going through the payment systems and that they had effectively ousted the top civil servant at the Treasury Department, David Lebryk, after he refused to grant access to Musk’s emissaries.”_ | [FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101560779/526332317/-1544467485?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njc2NzI2Ni00M2UzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xmHkysmK3wcqzwNdfasz7nje_ndaTVppNKRTpAfRrU=)
---
Team —
Donald Trump is letting an unelected billionaire wreak havoc on the American people. In an unprecedented power grab, Elon Musk has forced his way into the payment system for the American government — and who knows where next.
The U.S. Treasury and the systems that run it are necessary to ensure that Social Security payments are delivered, that Medicare payments are disbursed, and that everyone gets the tax refund they’re owed.
We have to be clear here: Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their unqualified cronies are waging war on the working class — all in favor of their ultra-rich allies. Our team has been fielding constant concerns from constituents over the weekend both in our D.C. and Waterbury offices.
Nonprofits and community organizations are worried. Community projects are at risk. Every day people are concerned about the programs they rely on for food, education, health care, and more. Jahana is doing all she can to fight back and make the government work for you, not the wealthy elite.
[**This is no way to run a government. The only way we can stand up to this chaos and confusion is by strengthening our Democratic coalition in Congress. Trump Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[snapped at CNN reporter Jeff Zeleny](https://substack.com/redirect/f9a1ea81-31c4-4a33-9412-8ad73f9dad2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for interrupting another reporter when he wasn't called on during White House press briefing.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9a1ea81-31c4-4a33-9412-8ad73f9dad2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f9a1ea81-31c4-4a33-9412-8ad73f9dad2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You're interrupting your colleague!" Karoline scolded Zeleny when he began asking a question out of turn. "I called on Lindsay."
"I thought you called on me," Zeleny answered, then still proceeded to ask his question.
Leavitt has quickly shown that she is taking not an ounce of crap from the legacy media that is used to having their way during White House press briefings.
Watch how Karoline handled the tense awkward moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9a1ea81-31c4-4a33-9412-8ad73f9dad2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Presented By American Alternative Assets](https://substack.com/redirect/9de8df19-b216-44f8-8abb-dbaacd3796cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# BREAKING: For the first time in American history, U.S. interest payments now exceed our entire defense budget.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9de8df19-b216-44f8-8abb-dbaacd3796cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The numbers are staggering:
* $36 trillion in national debt
* Every 1% rate increase = $90 billion in new costs
* Gold surging past $2,750 as central banks buy at fastest pace in history
* Over 1,082 metric tons of gold purchased by central banks in 2022 alone

As Trump prepares to retake office, a showdown with the Fed could determine the fate of your retirement savings. Smart money isn't waiting - central banks are racing to accumulate gold before 2025.
**[Get our FREE guide, "Fed vs Trump:](https://substack.com/redirect/9de8df19-b216-44f8-8abb-dbaacd3796cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The Coming Battle for America's Financial Future" to learn:
✓ Why central banks are stockpiling gold at record rates
✓ How gold rose from $35 to $850 during the last debt crisis
✓ Why experts predict gold could hit $9,000 as this crisis unfolds
✓ How to protect your savings before it's too late
[Get Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/9de8df19-b216-44f8-8abb-dbaacd3796cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **MAGA veteran Brian Mast DESTROYS Margaret Brennan live on CBS for trashing Trump 's USAID cuts**
Rep. Brian Mast **[defended President Trump's bureaucratic cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/43aa3f4e-5e96-4553-ba99-f6bace4b3792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including those to the USAID against corporate media reporter Margaret Brennan.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/43aa3f4e-5e96-4553-ba99-f6bace4b3792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/43aa3f4e-5e96-4553-ba99-f6bace4b3792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Has the Trump administration informed you of plans to significantly shrink this agency?" Brennan asked Mast.
"Most of these dollars that go out of USAID, +70%, don't come from U.S. farmers, U.S. ranchers or go through U.S. ports, and that's another big problem for America!" Mast explained, then expanding on the tremendous waste of tax dollars that the department has been responsible for.
"It's a failure!" Mast added.
The Trump administration's DOGE department, headed by Elon Musk, is tasked with eliminating government spending waste via making substantial cuts to bloated areas of the D.C. bureaucracy. **[Musk has made it clear](https://substack.com/redirect/a8a32bdc-7599-49c0-86d7-3023ec733d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that USAID is on his kill list.
"It's beyond repair," Musk said, adding that President Trump agrees it should be shut down.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/43aa3f4e-5e96-4553-ba99-f6bace4b3792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: We must get an EPA task force to protect Angelenos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101561292/526334169/628041926?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI5ZDBkNzItNDRlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XRQfS8RYsEB_zZZ2PsdUmXI1eAsZudMNN-UptHgBEkY=) Friend, there’s no question the people of Los Angeles are looking to the government for help. I hear it everyday from folks who are in need as we begin the restoration and rebuilding process after devastating wildfires ravaged our communities last month. As we work to recover, we know that the federal Air Quality Index (AQI) isn’t measuring dangerous pollutants like lead, chlorine, and asbestos – agents that can have a lasting impact on our health long after we’ve rebuilt. Our families need to know what they’re breathing, and what’s in our soil and water, and they need to know how to stay safe. **That’s why I’ve led my colleagues from across Los Angeles County in demanding action from the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and FEMA _now_.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101561293/526334171/374529186?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI5ZDBkNzItNDRlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XRQfS8RYsEB_zZZ2PsdUmXI1eAsZudMNN-UptHgBEkY=&emci=46431b50-44e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=629d0d72-44e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=8447100) A new federal task force overseeing consistent, regional monitoring, is needed to give our citizens the transparency they deserve. We should know the level of pollution as conditions change and cleanup begins, all across Los Angeles. If necessary, the public should be told how to take protective measures. I’ll fight to make sure that our communities receive up-to-date information to keep themselves and their loved ones safe. Laura | ****[Read More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101561295/526334172/374529186?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjI5ZDBkNzItNDRlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XRQfS8RYsEB_zZZ2PsdUmXI1eAsZudMNN-UptHgBEkY=&emci=46431b50-44e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=629d0d72-44e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=8447100)****
---

body:
I wanted to extend a personal thank you for your support ahead of our January deadline

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=xeEKrTQDJ3D57i0K8%2BSK9x7UGP43bKzzr14tj0stLGDkQi0nRJVZ0GCxsFUH8j68MMfL2DkhhDAHwuQllm%2FY5m%2BW02K3ZWNramxfFxoXYI8FpExOby7CiWdKaHUyc8R0WS%2Btq624WXq%2FWuaxtT4erv0OltPe8lea6arScUFimPdkwS7cjZ2biHJa0fLj7OsFT7QhV%2FOuhtAgpJioiIKB9mR%2FMkUYE1sz694Cz6vU7H9qfZNfYAcQA0%2BFxpHbdCf17x3c0SWmSqMlRhf5rO1WWpjLgUT%2BHhB1n5273d3QiXva0IgWMkI1hhCsbHqpS3AsRRtny3EFsx%2BgFgLdxz9rSCBT%2Ff%2FPOErUL0r8gHX8xDkvAyGokPFpTwYwaYdffIkP2xgYWjDWt9CgVhStAsOqBHC2yVCJVxBfPTYHpyFq782Rv9%2Bip7%2BEG7ggI3Df5dGh)

Hey folks! It’s Dr. Raul Ruiz. I wanted to extend a personal thank you for your support ahead of our January fundraising deadline. Thanks to you, we hit our $10,000 fundraising goal for January, and I couldn’t be more grateful. Consistently hitting our fundraising goals is more important than ever now that our country is under the control of a Republican trifecta led by Donald Trump. You helped us send a message that Democrats won’t back down in the face of MAGA extremism — not now, not ever. But here’s the thing: The real fight is only just beginning. With news outlets already citing CA-25 as a potential pickup for Republicans in 2026, we need to start building our war chest _now_ to prepare for what’s to come. We can’t afford to slow down, which is why our team set out to raise an emergency rapid response of $10,000 before tonight at midnight to build up our resources early and brace for the fight that lies ahead. We can’t afford to slow down for a single second, so I need to ask: [Will you chip in $10 or any amount possible to help us kickstart our February fundraising?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101561416/526334574/-1406267756?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_30DO_020425_1_1_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFlNmMzZTEtNDRlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n91xji6qv38WjJ0ucFkF-Tv2xA0zF9HY10_4Q_ORwM4=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101561417/526334575/-1406267756?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_30DO_020425_1_1_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFlNmMzZTEtNDRlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n91xji6qv38WjJ0ucFkF-Tv2xA0zF9HY10_4Q_ORwM4=)**

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-6740ef70964c41cfa676b7c37c872fe5/63]

Dear Friend,

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a
growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against
capitalism.

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-6740ef70964c41cfa676b7c37c872fe5/63]

BUT DO THEY TRULY UNDERSTAND THE HISTORY AND OUTCOMES OF SOCIALISM AND
CAPITALISM?

This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, _THE
HISTORY OF SOCIALISM AND CAPITALISM_
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-6740ef70964c41cfa676b7c37c872fe5/63]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-6740ef70964c41cfa676b7c37c872fe5/63],
from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis
Hanson.

This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in
conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly
analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and
provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on
outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being.

I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and
timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a
US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

SIMPLY CLICK HERE TO REQUEST YOUR FREE COPY OF _THE HISTORY OF
SOCIALISM AND CAPITALISM_.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-6740ef70964c41cfa676b7c37c872fe5/63]

Thanks,

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives,
the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing
ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and
democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s
work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom,
democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the
world._

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/21ccbe04ed4d45a684b1267d326bfe4e-11527dd5d27c4aaeaf16a4cb9ac2318d/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg

Zip Code: 20176

[] Dear Friend, Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism. [] BUT DO THEY TRULY UNDERSTAND THE HISTORY AND OUTCOMES OF SOCIALISM AND CAPITALISM? This is precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, THE HISTORY OF SOCIALISM AND CAPITALISM [] [], from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Gary Peters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, you might’ve heard the news by now: **Earlier this week, Senator Gary Peters announced he would not seek re-election — creating a huge opening for Michigan’s Senate seat next year.** Folks have reached out asking about my plans. I wanted to let you know that while I am not running, I am ready to do all that I can to help the Democratic nominee win this race. This is a big deal, and it shows why Fight Like Hell PAC’s work is so important. In 2023, after Senator Debbie Stabenow announced her retirement, I launched Fight Like Hell PAC to help keep Michigan’s Senate seat blue. **Michigan’s Senate election last year was one of the closest races in the nation, coming down to just 0.3%**. Every donation helped us beat that tiny margin and elect Elissa Slotkin. Now with another U.S. Senate seat open, national Republicans are already making Michigan one of their top targets again. My previous opponent, backed by Betsy Devos, has even openly floated running for this seat. Republicans came within 20,000 votes of flipping the Senate seat red last year — and it’s clear that they’re ready to try again. If we want to defend Senator Gary Peters’ legacy and all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work them right now. [**Will you rush in $10 to power Fight Like Hell PAC’s work? clean_body: | Team, you might’ve heard the news by now: Earlier this week, Senator Gary Peters announced he would not seek re-election — creating a huge opening for Michigan’s Senate seat next year. Folks have reached out asking about my plans. I wanted to let you know that while I am not running, I am ready to do all that I can to help the Democratic nominee win this race. This is a big deal, and it shows why Fight Like Hell PAC’s work is so important. In 2023, after Senator Debbie Stabenow announced her retirement, I launched Fight Like Hell PAC to help keep Michigan’s Senate seat blue. Michigan’s Senate election last year was one of the closest races in the nation, coming down to just 0.3%. Every donation helped us beat that tiny margin and elect Elissa Slotkin. Now with another U.S. Senate seat open, national Republicans are already making Michigan one of their top targets again. My previous opponent, backed by Betsy Devos, has even openly floated running for this seat. Republicans came within 20,000 votes of flipping the Senate seat red last year — and it’s clear that they’re ready to try again. If we want to defend Senator Gary Peters’ legacy and all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work them right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. — Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: VoteVets
subject: Fire Elon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets is suing Elon Musk and his fake department alongside an army of partner organizations.
#
Peter —
No one elected Elon Musk.
He has no statutory authority to do anything.
He is breaking the law, accessing classified information, hacking into essential government infrastructure, providing absolutely ZERO transparency, and taking a hatchet to congressionally authorized government agencies.
It was the Treasury and USAID over the weekend. Who knows where he’s at now. **_How long until he comes after the VA?**_
We don’t intend to let it get that far. It’s time to fire Elon.
**VoteVets is suing Elon Musk and his fake department alongside an army of partner organizations.**[**We’re asking you to chip in $1 (or more if you can afford it) to help us cover the cost. If you can chip in today, we’ll send you this FIRE ELON sticker.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb25-elon-sticker.9_gwhg&refcode=em250204-1-f&t=1&akid=34137%2E3013755%2EUFxy-S)

| | Peter,

As a nation currently _**$36.4 trillion in debt**_ , it’s no mystery that the United States is in _**desperate**_ need of large-scale spending cuts across our federal government. I’m not talking about cutting pennies on the dollar here and there, either. _We need to think**BIG** if we’re going to solve the debt crisis and set future generations up for prolonged success._ So while we may have upset the apple cart in DC when **Senator Rand Paul** and I introduced the [**largest spending cuts bill in history**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/GTyLiXNqLeRkvkCyqeTcivGZMoxNm4Tfx0vpa_Bv_-TcY203A1Rx6xxuDZp6w_OfAHOHHJrgcC6H4zQCm8VklEbkumnTabsVjvdaz6eSWTjUarq9OpLMeEDjMyhJeFa0-CZuvALp8YiWjVgvYo2Gy0_mV_DjIxo_Ya54Kn7EA7z_8_rxciEbDEC0J-Jg3aUk7J2mc-hJwLyMNBDKA7YD25VpYsaQWSeC7-EbvD5f6Tbc40EuXo1BwUbbf5A3JGbMeYws785d8Kp5VQx80yug3jWd3_RStrjsSWB1Kp267qGZIQnvp6BBcPw9DirTzgCGHgBrR09AhdnfkFIVBR4fdhayCj8Ae_JtMoMQuGz87qyTNXnk64NokBlOZV_dNxTRuyGPfwts8N54F_bz4wEMevCxlG-vvCKtAr3xYUPytoD4qBftOmwNhazBZuwoa5u0X1FyZasLgSpyVUZOH205YtSYYpGvz-xfRhUZsEH6vN8xkYJocNwcYLdUhrbtFMdJDwVFGPSKzCXsOq_HlrPYiCs/x0kf0YmMJUkkyxFDWtiBSFYeDKqzyhPn/5) last year – _our battle to pass the REINS Act is one worth fighting._

| | **_Meet Kat_** Kat Cammack is currently serving her third term representing the FREE state of Florida in the People’s House as FL-03 Congresswoman. And her road from the small cattle ranch she grew up on to the halls of Congress in our nation’s capital has been far from ordinary. A third generation commercial sandblaster, Kat originally aspired to take over her family’s business and continue the rural, rodeo lifestyle she had grown so accustomed to. That was until a failed Obama-era housing policy caused Kat’s family to lose their ranch, leaving her and her mother homeless. They lived in their car and bounced from cheap motel to cheap motel just to keep a roof over their heads. But overcoming these hardships moulded Kat into the gritty and unapologetic leader she is today. After her family’s livelihood was destroyed by big government, she made it her life mission to deliver federal reform in the DC Swamp for the American people. So she packed her belongings and moved to Florida’s 3rd Congressional District – where she would serve as a Deputy Chief of Staff for nearly a decade before running for Congress herself. After emerging victorious in a brutal, 10-way GOP primary contest, the people of FL-03 elected Kat to serve them in the People’s House in November of 2020. Throughout her journey from homelessness to the House of Representatives, Kat Cammack has shown unwavering and unapologetic grit in her fight for the American people. And she has no plans of backing down until we truly have a government for the people, by the people once again here in the United States. When she’s not going toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp, Kat enjoys spending time with her loving husband Matt – who serves as a firefighter and SWAT Medic with the Gainesville Fire Rescue. In the little spare time that they have, you can find Kat and Matt fishing, skeet shooting, or watching Gators football. They are incredibly proud to call north central Florida’s “Gator Nation” home. Go Gators, and let’s keep Florida the most FREE state in the union!

clean_body: If you support the largest spending cuts bill in history, we need you to add your name! | | | | | | Peter, As a nation currently $36.4 trillion in debt , it’s no mystery that the United States is in desperate need of large-scale spending cuts across our federal government. I’m not talking about cutting pennies on the dollar here and there, either. We need to thinkBIG if we’re going to solve the debt crisis and set future generations up for prolonged success. So while we may have upset the apple cart in DC when Senator Rand Paul and I introduced the last year – our battle to pass the REINS Act is one worth fighting. | | | | | This initiative would eliminate in unnecessary spending from the federal budget. And the long-term improvements we would see in the American economy would be profound. That being said, we can’t WIN this fight to rein in reckless government spending in Washington without YOUR support. | | | | | Thank you for being a PATRIOT, Kat Cammack | | | | Constitutional ConservativeGOP CongresswomanFL-03 | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Meet Kat Kat Cammack is currently serving her third term representing the FREE state of Florida in the People’s House as FL-03 Congresswoman. And her road from the small cattle ranch she grew up on to the halls of Congress in our nation’s capital has been far from ordinary. A third generation commercial sandblaster, Kat originally aspired to take over her family’s business and continue the rural, rodeo lifestyle she had grown so accustomed to. That was until a failed Obama-era housing policy caused Kat’s family to lose their ranch, leaving her and her mother homeless. They lived in their car and bounced from cheap motel to cheap motel just to keep a roof over their heads. But overcoming these hardships moulded Kat into the gritty and unapologetic leader she is today. After her family’s livelihood was destroyed by big government, she made it her life mission to deliver federal reform in the DC Swamp for the American people. So she packed her belongings and moved to Florida’s 3rd Congressional District – where she would serve as a Deputy Chief of Staff for nearly a decade before running for Congress herself. After emerging victorious in a brutal, 10-way GOP primary contest, the people of FL-03 elected Kat to serve them in the People’s House in November of 2020. Throughout her journey from homelessness to the House of Representatives, Kat Cammack has shown unwavering and unapologetic grit in her fight for the American people. And she has no plans of backing down until we truly have a government for the people, by the people once again here in the United States. When she’s not going toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp, Kat enjoys spending time with her loving husband Matt – who serves as a firefighter and SWAT Medic with the Gainesville Fire Rescue. In the little spare time that they have, you can find Kat and Matt fishing, skeet shooting, or watching Gators football. They are incredibly proud to call north central Florida’s “Gator Nation” home. Go Gators, and let’s keep Florida the most FREE state in the union! | | | | A Message From Congresswoman Kat, to You Peter, the opportunity to fight for YOU in the Washington Swamp has been the greatest honor of my life. If we’re going to guarantee a free and prosperous country for future generations of Americans, we need to shake up the status quo in our nation’s capital by cutting reckless government spending, securing our borders, and putting America FIRST in all facets of government operation once again. Can I count on you to chip in just $5 today so we can usher in a NEW era of leadership in our nation’s capital this year? | | | | | | | | | | Peter, my gratitude for your financial contributions can’t be put into words. Friend, PLEASE!
I just pulled off the ART OF THE DEAL...
Not once. Not twice. BUT 3x IN A ROW, WE ARE ON FIRE!
When Colombia said they wouldn’t accept illegal immigrants, I showed them America wasn’t playing around. You can guess what happened next - **THEY ARE TAKING ILLEGALS BACK NOW!**
When Mexico wouldn’t stop the flow of drug & gang violence spilling across our border, I politely informed them what our massive response would be. **NOW MEXICO HAS MOBILIZED 10,000 TROOPS TO STOP THE INVASION.**
Then when I got tough with Canada, **THEY PLEDGED TO SPEND $1.3 BILLION TO SECURE THEIR BORDER FROM DRUG TRAFFICKING!**
Everywhere you turn, the wins for our country are piling up, and I only have one person to thank - YOU!
Your participation in the polls I send out really makes a difference. THANK YOU!

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: We’re Falling Short—Can You Chip in $25 for Our Schools?
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/links [https://www.rushernbaker.com/links]
Friends and Neighbors,
Every student deserves to feel safe and supported when they step into the classroom. A secure learning environment allows students to focus on their education and grow into the future leaders of our community. But right now, too many of our schools are underfunded, leaving students and teachers without the resources they need to succeed.
I’m committed to making real change—advocating for increased school safety funding, ensuring every student has an individualized learning plan, and eliminating waste to maximize every education dollar. Our kids deserve nothing less.
But to make it happen, we need your help. We have to hit our fundraising goal by the end of the week , and we’re still $5,000 short . If just 200 people chip in $25 , we’ll reach our goal and keep fighting for the schools our students deserve.
Can we count on you to donate $25 today ? Every dollar makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

clean_body: [] [] Friends and Neighbors, Every student deserves to feel safe and supported when they step into the classroom. A secure learning environment allows students to focus on their education and grow into the future leaders of our community. But right now, too many of our schools are underfunded, leaving students and teachers without the resources they need to succeed. I’m committed to making real change—advocating for increased school safety funding, ensuring every student has an individualized learning plan, and eliminating waste to maximize every education dollar. Our kids deserve nothing less. But to make it happen, we need your help. We have to hit our fundraising goal by the end of the week , and we’re still $5,000 short . If just 200 people chip in $25 , we’ll reach our goal and keep fighting for the schools our students deserve. Can we count on you to donate $25 today ? Every dollar makes a difference. [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you for believing in a brighter future for Prince George’s County. Together, we can make it a reality. With gratitude, Rushern L. Baker III Candidate for County Executive P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: Tulsi Gabbard is a national security threat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:

But I’m not going to lie down and accept it either. The fact is, Elon Musk continues to unilaterally — and illegally — shut off payments to programs that millions of people depend on, from Head Start to global hunger prevention. And now he’s gained access to sensitive government databases that house Americans’ personal information, including our Social Security numbers.
