Listen, I know there’s a head-spinning amount of news right now, and it’s easy to feel demoralized. But none of us can give up.
We’ve got to fight back hard against these outrageous abuses of power — in Congress, in the courts, at the ballot box, and day by day however we can.
**We’re going to use every tool we’ve got to fight for a government that is accountable to the people and puts working families before special-interest billionaires. That’s how we break free of this chaos, and build a future that is brighter than today.**
Thank you for staying in the fight. We need you, and I’m grateful for you.
-Andrea

We’re going to use every tool we’ve got to fight for a government that is accountable to the people and puts working families before special-interest billionaires. That’s how we break free of this chaos, and build a future that is brighter than today. Thank you for staying in the fight. We need you, and I’m grateful for you. -Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Wednesday is the first day after crossover. We will now be taking a look at House bills that passed the House.
Remember. Bills will first start off in a subcommittee, then head to a committee and then finally the full Senate floor. That said, most bills will be in subcommittee tomorrow. So focus on subcommittees and committees until Monday.
Also, remember that each bill that passes a full committee in the Virginia Senate receives three Constitutional reads. So, if a bill passes a committee, look for it on the Senate calendar and then know it will be debated three days later. Focus on bills that are on third read.
---
| |
---
Also, please tune in tomorrow at 12:30pm for my interview with Rob Schilling on the Schilling Show. Click [here ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00181QIxVCDGm23ywVcZHq1_PLAtBjdMZAcmc2ct1AEGa42WFs39qoiEYBnO8Ay7rpveSUoTbA7OhUIJOY6VE-G_2K74miYasAPkstNIEIqhd07UzJ6ny4rJGmebcla4c9v3y_r--x6qsCLskkXHRMK-vWqmoxO1gBE&c=DRRWYJ3BieWnYvjKLpUnPolaxASvkrvuq5QGBfRP62VvNe7TLlAhBQ==&ch=h1wyfa37plu21rGb0sNmwU2BMAnY31vKySPHPP-EFc_IAJZkuvzU-w==)to tune in.
For God and Country, Amanda

|
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you.
I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos.
With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience.
I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable.
While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.
Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 SESSION THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | Wednesday What can you expect? | ATTEND IN PERSON OR CALL IN TO THE MEETING LIVE | Wednesday Senate Committee Meetings | == == == == == == == == == == == == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello Wednesday is the first day after crossover. We will now be taking a look at House bills that passed the House. Remember. Bills will first start off in a subcommittee, then head to a committee and then finally the full Senate floor. That said, most bills will be in subcommittee tomorrow. So focus on subcommittees and committees until Monday. Also, remember that each bill that passes a full committee in the Virginia Senate receives three Constitutional reads. So, if a bill passes a committee, look for it on the Senate calendar and then know it will be debated three days later. Focus on bills that are on third read. | | Also, please tune in tomorrow at 12:30pm for my interview with Rob Schilling on the Schilling Show. Click tune in. For God and Country, Amanda | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos. With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience. I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. | | == | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- mailto:?subject=What%20you%20can%20expect%3F%20%20Wednesday%2C%20Feb%205&body= | mailto:?subject=What%20you%20can%20expect%3F%20%20Wednesday%2C%20Feb%205&body= ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Team McBride
subject: Trump is working to purge employees, consolidate power, and gut programs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah joined Brianna Keilar on News Central to talk about the Trump administration’s illegal plan to gut federal agencies.
#
Did you catch Sarah’s segment on CNN yesterday?
She joined Brianna Keilar on _News Central_ to talk about the Trump administration’s illegal plan to gut federal agencies:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250204-1?refcode=em20250204-1736&amount=5&refcode2=1736_21716_awtyCm&akid=1736%2E21716%2EawtyCm)
[**Click here to watch Sarah’s interview now, and when you’re done, pitch in $5 or any amount you can to help her keep fighting for us in Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250204-1?refcode=em20250204-1736&amount=5&refcode2=1736_21716_awtyCm&akid=1736%2E21716%2EawtyCm)
The administration’s plan is clear: Piece by piece, department by department, they are working to **purge employees, consolidate power, and gut programs.**
Even if they can’t get everything they want immediately through executive fiat, they will decimate the federal government and sell it for parts.
**No program will be safe** — which is why it’s so important that we speak out and fight back.
[**But Sarah can’t keep this campaign going without your support. Will you pitch in $5 today to help her keep fighting for our neighbors in Delaware and throughout the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250204-1?refcode=em20250204-1736&amount=5&refcode2=1736_21716_awtyCm&akid=1736%2E21716%2EawtyCm)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250204-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250204-1736&refcode2=1736_21716_awtyCm&akid=1736%2E21716%2EawtyCm)**
Thank you,
Team McBride
* * *

name: Alan Cohn
subject: It's Time for Term Limits
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101562670/526339029/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIwMDM1YzctNGJlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G8olczp2irLgN51NqJqxqK7-AzktjA2vHZAe_tdfoMk=&emci=7c55f6bf-41e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=db0035c7-4be3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Doesn’t it feel like we’re all passengers in a car with no brakes?

Trade wars with our friends, mass firings at the FBI DOJ, and Elon Musk controls who gets paid and who doesn’t.

And that’s just week two of Trump 2.0

Trump and his troops are disregarding the law Congress, and they control the courts. There’s no one standing in the way.

Except us.

This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working with members of Congress, including Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, Jamie Raskin, and Sheldon Whitehouse, to end lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court and enact 18-year term limits.

The radical right-wing majority on SCOTUS, including Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito, are empowered to ignore the rule of law in favor of their radical personal politics because they’re unaccountable, have no oversight, and don’t care about our rights and civil liberties.

But that’s about to change because, over the last year, we’ve launched a movement that ends lifetime jobs for justices, takes the politics out of SCOTUS nominations, and puts the rule of law back in the driver's seat.

We’ve grown to 75 co-sponsors of the TERM Act in the House and Senate. We’re back at work raising what’s needed to back candidates who pledge to support SCOTUS term limits.
With so much on the line, will you help?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101562671/526339034/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIwMDM1YzctNGJlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G8olczp2irLgN51NqJqxqK7-AzktjA2vHZAe_tdfoMk=)

**[>>>Yes, there is a way to stop the mayhem and save the rule of law in our country. But we need your help to do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101562672/526339072/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIwMDM1YzctNGJlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G8olczp2irLgN51NqJqxqK7-AzktjA2vHZAe_tdfoMk=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101562673/526339074/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIwMDM1YzctNGJlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G8olczp2irLgN51NqJqxqK7-AzktjA2vHZAe_tdfoMk=)**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | HUGE NEWS, Peter: J.D. Vance and Marco Rubio are LEAVING the Senate! And now Democrats can flip TWO Senate Seats in Ohio and Florida Special Elections!!! **So we’re launching an emergency fund to RAISE $20,000, FLIP these seats blue, and ELIMINATE Trump’s power. | | We can’t waste a moment, Peter. Trump’s billionaire friends are ready to invest MILLIONS to win these special elections. REMEMBER: Elon Musk spent nearly $300 MILLION to elect Trump and his cronies. We’re counting on your grassroots donations to fight back. We have to start building a historic wave of Black voter turnout TODAY to win in 2026. That's why it's absolutely critical we raise $20,000 by midnight. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We can do this, Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Team Truth to Power
subject: [Petition] Keep the Department of Education!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39419%2E3422442%2Et7oTfS)
Derek, today the Trump Administration announced they’re trying to eliminate the Department of Education:
Eliminating the Department of Education has been a priority for conservatives for years. During the first Trump administration, Katie stood up to Trump cronies like Betsy DeVos when she attacked our public schools. Trump, DeVos, and other conservatives’ end goal has long been to auction off our public education assets to for-profit entities. Now, with an emboldened and unrestrained Trump in the White House–they see their opportunity.
**Here’s where you can make a difference today:** The Department of Education cannot be eliminated without approval from Congress. So, now is the time to demand Republican Members of Congress stand with American families and students who would suffer if the Department of Education was eradicated.
**[That’s why we’re asking you to join Katie in signing our petition calling on Congress to protect the Department of Education. If we are going to stop Trump, we all need to raise our voices right now.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250204-doe/?source=em20250204-39419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39419%2E3422442%2Et7oTfS)**
[Sign On ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250204-doe/?source=em20250204-39419&akid=39419%2E3422442%2Et7oTfS)
Thank you for standing with American students.
– Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250204-39419&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39419_3422442_t7oTfS&akid=39419%2E3422442%2Et7oTfS)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39419%2E3422442%2Et7oTfS).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Every day, our brave service members make countless unseen sacrifices -- and every day for the last 84 years, the USO has been there for them. Through times of war and peace, natural disasters and other uncertainties, our unwavering mission is to strengthen the well-being of those serving in America's military and their families, wherever they are in the world.
As a nonprofit organization, the USO relies on the generosity of people like you. **[So please, on this special day, will you rush a donation to support our heroes in uniform? Give $20 or more and we'll send you a USO hat so you can show off your military pride.](https://links.e.uso.)**

name: Mike Lawler [NY-17]
subject: A Blue Wave in 2026?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
Not If We Can Help It!

| | | | [ ](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/9-R~HVgAwKMe/UkxEbHZtdGxCKzRrZGN2UE16cEtvemtON1NuNXZCbDdodlVhdVJlVVlGY0lTRW1RWWJYZjExb1ZKQWNIVVY4T0tYb3FrVEZFS1MyNWcwd2ZIVXl0UEFxU2R3a0lWM1ZUbEFJN0s4a1pxZEk9S0/)

| | Peter, I wanted to give you a quick update on what’s happening with the Democrats' 2026 Recruitment Fund. They believe they can create a _**“Blue Wave”**_ in 2026 and take down our Republican House majority. _And, unfortunately, they’ve singled out my seat as one of their top targets._ My team and I have spent countless hours strategizing — how can we fight back against this massive fund and secure my re-election so we can continue working for all New Yorkers? Then we thought – what’s more powerful than their war chest? **People like you, Peter.** While the Democrats will throw millions into this race, we can counter that by having a strong, energized grassroots movement behind us. [**_Will you please chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $1000 to help me counter the Democrats Recruitment Fund?_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/AYz0f~eEbKt2/UkxEbHZtdGxCKzRrZGN2UE16cEtvemtON1NuNXZCbDdodlVhdVJlVVlGY0lTRW1RWWJYZjExb1ZKQWNIVVY4T0tYb3FrVEZFS1MyNWcwd2ZIVXl0UEFxU2R3a0lWM1ZUbEFJN0s4a1pxZEk9S0/)

| | Just to remind you how important a grassroots army is to our movement... Joe Biden won my district in 2020 by 10 points. Democrats outnumber Republicans in my district by 70,000. In 2022, _I won by less than one percentage point._ But in 2024, I won by over _23,000 votes._ These numbers make it clear: What made the difference each time was grassroots supporters like you. Now let’s get to work tripling down on our grassroots efforts for 2026! [**_Will you please chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $1000 to help me counter the Democrats Recruitment Fund?_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/-G7~fLevWmTP/UkxEbHZtdGxCKzRrZGN2UE16cEtvemtON1NuNXZCbDdodlVhdVJlVVlGY0lTRW1RWWJYZjExb1ZKQWNIVVY4T0tYb3FrVEZFS1MyNWcwd2ZIVXl0UEFxU2R3a0lWM1ZUbEFJN0s4a1pxZEk9S0/)

NY-17

**We can’t let billionaires buy our elections** – we live in a DEMOCRACY and we should decide our elections with our votes!

**The only way to prevent billionaires from wielding that kind of _UNDEMOCRATIC_ power is to stop Dark Money once and for all!**

**↓ HERE’S HOW YOU CAN HELP ↓**
[**We’re raising $10,000 toward our End _Citizens United_ Goal to fight back against the horrific influence of Dark Money. Chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59371?t=4&akid=22836%2E4449941%2EnoZzw8)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Elon Musk is attacking me. Again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elon and I both immigrated to the US, but clearly only one of us bothered to learn the law
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1490%2E791427%2EuMdfkP)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3092?t=2&akid=1490%2E791427%2EuMdfkP)
Friend — Elon Musk is attacking me. Again.
This time he’s spreading dangerous misinformation, claiming that simply informing people of their constitutional rights is somehow illegal.
**Elon Musk and I both immigrated to the US, but clearly only one of us bothered to learn the law.**
So let me set the record straight: Immigrants, even undocumented ones, are entitled to certain rights under the constitution. It’s my job as an elected official to make sure people in my district know their rights, and Elon will never stop me from doing that job.
But Elon’s on a power trip right now, consolidating more and more power into his hands despite the fact that he’s never received a single vote or been appointed to any office. He and Trump are working together to enrich themselves and their oligarch friends at America’s expense.
So, I asked you this yesterday when Musk attacked me the first time, and I’m asking today:
**[Can you make a contribution today to help me fight back against Trump, Musk, and the oligarchy trying to take over our government? We need all hands on deck to take on this constitutional crises and the billionaires trying to rip off the American people.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250204-1-90&t=3&akid=1490%2E791427%2EuMdfkP)

name: OKGOP
subject: Get Your Tickets Now for the OKGOP Lincoln Day Dinner
body:
Don't Miss Out...

| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=1)
---
Peter -- Get your tickets now for this years OKGOP Lincoln Day Dinner to be held on the evening of February 28, 2025, at 7:00 pm in the Embassy Church Ballroom located in Tulsa. This years event promises to be an entertaining, informative and unique experience as we will be having Mr. Larry Elliott, an Abraham Lincoln portrayer along with his wife as Mary Lincoln. Together they will take you first person from the birth of our 16th President through his life, the battle to save our republic and ultimately to his tragic death at Ford’s Theater at the hands of assassin John Wilkes Booth. Mr. Elliott has performed as President Lincoln for over 20 years and remains in full character throughout the entire evening helping to create the illusion of having the President right there in the room with you. It is our intent for this event to bring a clear focus on the 16th President, his life and the monumental impact this man had on our nation’s history. Additionally invitations are being sent to all members of the Oklahoma Congressional Delegation and will be emceed by Dr. Howard Hatcher. We hope that you will join us for the one of a kind experience and believe you will find this program to be a very enjoyable and memorable night. Please see the attached invitation for event details and registration or [register here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=C6hV7_0XX72mlOYFbGdwPxYbMCrjzVLTzfoE0zb37ZAagnXWDWvjj5k3u3FIYXXNsRg-vAlvf2JCcmn5aZEQ3A&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=2). We look forward to seeing you there! For questions or sponsorships please contact Stan Stevens at [918-397-5564](tel:918-397-5564) or email [Stan.Stevens@okgop.com](mailto:Stan.Stevens@okgop.com)
# [**GET YOUR TICKETS NOW!**](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=C6hV7_0XX72mlOYFbGdwPxYbMCrjzVLTzfoE0zb37ZAagnXWDWvjj5k3u3FIYXXNsRg-vAlvf2JCcmn5aZEQ3A&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=3)
### Friday, February 28th
Reception: 5:30pm to 6:30pm
Dinner & Event: 6:30pm - 9:00pm
### [**The Embassy Church Ballroom
** 7100 E. 31st St. Tulsa, OK 74145](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=S0Xenb6aO2qCL_TRIAEIbLjEhTXT1Qskfdj-CCQSSTS4Axhp4Pe_wn3vH-uO3kPC&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=4)
**Limited Sponsorships available for $500.00
(Those wanting to provide Sponsorships please contact Stan Stevens at [918-397-5564](tel:918-397-5564) or email [Stan.Stevens@okgop.com](mailto:Stan.Stevens@okgop.com))
Reception & Dinner for $125.00 + Sales Tax
Dinner Only for $75.00 + Sales Tax****** | [](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=C6hV7_0XX72mlOYFbGdwPxYbMCrjzVLTzfoE0zb37ZAagnXWDWvjj5k3u3FIYXXNmhAJVdy6pJcMxMQHjy4X_w&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=5 "Get Your Tickets Now") [Get Your Tickets Now](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=C6hV7_0XX72mlOYFbGdwPxYbMCrjzVLTzfoE0zb37ZAagnXWDWvjj5k3u3FIYXXNmhAJVdy6pJcMxMQHjy4X_w&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=5)

You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=7) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_0_get_your_tickets_now_for_t&n=8).

name: Carrie Anne Templeton
subject: Forward Friends: Volunteer Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Party news you can use!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invite_to_natl_vol_call&n=1)
---
| Peter\-- Hello**Forward Friends**! We are one month in to the new administration, and a lot is happening. How is everyone feeling? I would love for us all to come together and share our thoughts and ideas on how to continue to move this country _forward_. With that in mind I am now hosting a monthly national volunteer call, the **second Tuesday of every month at 7:30pm ET.** This is open to volunteers at all levels in all states, and is a great place to begin if you're just getting started. Our first meeting will be next **Tuesday, Feb 11th**. You can register for the link to join below. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invite_to_natl_vol_call&n=2 "REGISTER") [REGISTER](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invite_to_natl_vol_call&n=2)
---
_Volunteer Spotlight:_
As always, I would like to highlight someone making an impact in this movement. This month it is our Volunteer of the Month, **Clint Eisenhauer** , in SC. He has been with us since day one, and thanks largely in part to his dedication and perserverance, we not only have ballot access in SC, but also two elected officials! The first Forward affiliated official, SC State House **Representative Jermaine Johnson** , and **Carolina Jewitt** , on the Charelston County School Board. We could not have accomplished this without wonderful volunteers like Clint!
And like you! Thank you for reading this and thank you for being involved. I hope to see you next Tuesday.
Carrie Anne Templeton
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invite_to_natl_vol_call&n=3)

Fellow Patriot,

Former Trump attorney Rudy Giuliani – booked as “ _Inmate No.**P01135780**_ ” – is trying to reach you with a secure message from his Legal Defense Trust.

name: Royce White
subject: This is your United States Senator, Amy Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Sometimes I wonder how on earth she beat me in 2024 | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlPJbTMIkpnKgToFigfC8Fsm_1BmaV1oX-zQiw3ZgIRAD14BBBbDds-meo6hgn_IlKqT8p5Rl29ELcjSgcBdKDLkuud9ExtDbEw0UlWsRM4PEJULh9gbMoM_6kg6FwLsLq0iD9vhbjoCOaZQywTAYMDUw%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

Minnesota... This is your United States Senator, Amy Klobuchar.

Some days, I wake up and think, "How on earth did people possibly vote for this woman?" Then I remember... They've intentionally mis-educated all the people they need to vote. Then I think, "But who even counts the votes?"

_There’s no one word to describe Amy Klobuchar other than “cringe.”_

| [ **DEFEAT THE RADICAL LEFT** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlPtUtcwrZwgWkT0DpVCpAjmix0WiG4pTP0unCz5qWI2cItzlUVXoQRJyr487w1JZHLpLmsQ0ZIkxqtOl2ML5t7rsWXLjDXfbgv-t_adhrrkcY_jQUQeF4BXk5_JUGnTg_k5gaPVbtjsol3EeKdu9kWYQ%3D%3D)
---

She thought she dunked on President Trump over a tweet from 2019, and she hasn’t stopped talking about it since then. In rally after rally, she recites the tweet and laughs at her own joke. It’s UNBELIEVABLY SAD!!

When I ran against her in 2024, my People-First Movement nearly shocked America on Election Day. The entire cycle, the Industrial Media Complex lied to America, saying I would never have a chance to even come close. I proved the haters wrong when just under 1.3 MILLION Minnesotans voted for me.

**It’s time for America to WAKE UP!** White liberal women like Amy Klobuchar and Tina Smith have been pushing Obama’s Radical Agenda ever since they were elected to the Senate.

I may not have beaten Amy Klobuchar, but I KNOW I will beat Tina Smith in 2026.

[ **THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlP1ZvUmsSeVExKm8B_yWCU_2NucL0uWfT5r7UF1IMI6yVttQXKdxTnh3EIqV3EHTi-N__bt-qt3kBpZ-Hg4CLNpOdMmiRb33_Wz9pt-Zt4N845y56vGz2qMNLOsTYCujOq2BqGKWPGZjh87YPBWIH_7g%3D%3D)
---

_When I ran in 2022 against Ilhan Omar, I learned a lot. When I ran in 2024 against Klobuchar, I learned even more. Now, I have two years to prepare to take down Tina Smith. I’m ready to dunk on her; I just need your help to pass me the alley-oop assist._

[**Can you chip in just $10 before midnight so we can get a head start?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlPWu_xvnyYK94XiBlV90Bqu28201W9UnaZVTyOH5PGcwui5jtWL2VzDif72DT5SF_xfJgFB3Mk9imHTqQxfqKJajqMjdahN9L3HUtsmTLRntg4e0HYF9q8isnecztoaJecTHRtY_6PwWVvYX9IjwvQtg%3D%3D)

The People Are Coming!
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlPyTyezswPyBqruZanLFO2QH2ZXnypbL8hVDx47ag_xJNyPY7k--Vxc3US-mpvvSrZVBlpyISHmJOB-1WIATt1eFEMx2SmcUBnKopwj1i_SvOppCiydo0Tq6NEq-Nk8MNEtdEwG7NKZj-z8Dtd5WDaEA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a9197153e67d4aa8ab9c0e158a819d6c&_e=bhOrQFGar-rPB8Uw_LqJ3xtPSlh5unUyX8XNCR7h2yAmaupwBM3W2tyMARu4jGmNQ6d8lh0kViwu0325_5sWAjaOFaDVWeudIzaLqlVJDdgeot6R0_Tao5ng7WKxzfD7OHyuLw9kH4n_yLY0gxkXgqveShdLhAFQrZCmHlyMfrcPtIbSknqKbR6q4rEznnlPaw_qufS1iUdcCFPeuKJQxcPYX1ZIwc29YRZrsE4g3RWhzgCBtxXOgXpHX8027ZNbr9TI0UCy1xRshGycuvFzqq6dKW0GtErEBbdKu9AZTXRCNc5qs9IU3Pw5oK2hPEvvU0XS0yWrrA1z503OKTVB9Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: We know where President Trump stands. Now we want to hear from you >> | | | | | The Hill: "Nearly six in 10 Americans are opposed to President Trump pardoning Jan. 6, 2021, rioters convicted of crimes." Friend: On his first day in office, President Trump set a dangerous precedent — he granted a sweeping pardon of hundreds of Jan. 6 defendants, including rioters. By pardoning these insurrectionists, who threatened our democracy, Trump has FAILED to hold them accountable for their crimes, and instead, invites extremists to act without fear of punishment. A recent survey shows that most Americans oppose President Trump's action to pardon the Jan. 6 rioters — and we want to confirm this polling data. Friend, will you be one of the 28 responses we need from 43614 and answer our one-click survey before midnight tonight? Do you agree with President Trump's action to pardon the Jan. 6 rioters? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: You need to see this.| | | | | Friend: BREAKING:Democrats just handpicked their 2026 candidate, and surprise, surprise—she is NO different from the rest. Just. Another. Radical. Liberal. (Who doesn’t even live in the district 🙄) | | | | | | The Radical Left loves slapping a fresh coat of paint on the same broken-down car and calling it “new”. But beneath the shine? The same extreme and destructive agenda—packaged as "bipartisan." Meanwhile, Tom Kean, Jr. is in Congress day in and day out, fighting for YOU and delivering on the Republican agenda that the American people mandated. We won’t waste time on the Left’s newest pawn, but you should know—the attacks are starting. | | | | Nancy Pelosi and Hakeem Jefferies are so desperate to take back the House that they will say and do anything to make it happen— including hand-picking a candidate who doesn’t even live in the district. We must stay focused. We must continue delivering for our community and country. And we must not let the Left’s handpicked Radical candidate derail our mission and deceive voters. | | | | | | | | | | | | Stand by—we are just getting started. Peter, here at the Democratic Party of Georgia, we know that Black History is American History — and no amount of MAGA hatred can change that. February is Black History Month, and we’re taking this time to recognize some of our Black elected leaders here in Georgia. While Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies seek to erase Black history in American culture and our public schools, we’re busy empowering our Black elected leaders to continue paving the way for progress and shattering glass ceilings. But we can’t do it alone. We need grassroots supporters like you to support our voter outreach efforts and power candidates like Nikema Williams, Hank Johnson, Lucy McBath, David Scott, Sanford Bishop, and Rev. Raphael Warnock to victory. [Will you rush $10 now to support our work to elect Black Democratic champions up and down the ballot in Georgia this election cycle? name: AOC
subject: Unpredictable things can happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
And can even go our way.
#
Please do not fall for the illusion or the lie that any action is too small. **There is no action too small**.
In fact, when millions of us _do_ tiny things, we _can_ disrupt these systems. I'm not saying that getting in the game is going 100% to change the outcome, but it may, because **we are in an unprecedented time**.
The unprecedented time can mean, of course, many bad things happen — but it can also mean that **unpredictable things can happen, and can even go our way**.
I was elected in the first Trump administration and nobody ever, _ever_ thought that I have a prayer in order to win. I was a waitress. I was challenging the head of a political machine who was supposed to be the next Speaker of the House.
They spent $3 million against me while I was wiping down tables, and we won. Why?
**Because an unpredictable window has opened**.
Do not comply in advance. You try anyway.
We will not be afraid – **because that’s what they want**.
But our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250204.09jIaS&refcode=em20250204-8066-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8066%2E2526796%2EkY3SLY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250204.09jIaS&refcode=em20250204-8066-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8066%2E2526796%2EkY3SLY)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250204?refcode=em20250204-8066-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8066_2526796_kY3SLY&akid=8066%2E2526796%2EkY3SLY)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250204-8066-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=8066%2E2526796%2EkY3SLY)**
---|---
